title: Ai2-Kit: Streamlining AI-Accelerated Ab Initio Workflows for Complex Chemical Systems
abstract: Molecular simulations of complex chemical systems, such as catalysis, electrochemistry, and energy storage, often need to capture the interplay of effects such as electronic structure, finite-temperature fluctuations, and electric-field response. Such complexity is difficult to address with traditional ab initio calculations, which are limited by the time and length scales they can reach. AI-accelerated ab initio (AI2) methods use machine learning potentials trained on first-principles data to replace expensive electronic-structure calculations, extending ab initio accuracy to these regimes, but their routine application requires reliable workflows that connect first-principles calculations, model training, molecular dynamics, enhanced sampling, trajectory analysis, and HPC orchestration. Here we present ai2-kit, a software toolkit for developing accessible, reproducible, and extensible AI2 workflows. ai2-kit provides high-semantic-density command-line interfaces and Python APIs for structure and dataset conversion, batch task generation, active-learning screening, job orchestration, and workflow recovery. We demonstrate ai2-kit in four representative applications: active-learning-based machine learning potential construction, free-energy perturbation for redox and acid-base processes, electrochemical machine learning potentials for electrified interfaces, and spectroscopies from machine learning molecular dynamics. ai2-kit also provides AI-agent skills that help users adapt these use cases into customized workflows for their own chemical systems and computational software stacks. Together, ai2-kit helps turn AI2 methods from bespoke computational protocols into reusable and extensible workflows for complex chemical systems, from model construction to property prediction.
zh_abstract: 对复杂化学体系（如催化、电化学和能源存储）的分子模拟，通常需要捕捉电子结构、有限温度涨落和电场响应等效应之间的相互作用。传统的第一性原理计算受限于其所能达到的时间和长度尺度，难以处理此类复杂性。AI加速第一性原理(AI2)方法使用基于第一性原理数据训练的机器学习势函数来替代昂贵的电子结构计算，将第一性原理精度扩展到这些领域，但其常规应用需要可靠的工作流，以连接第一性原理计算、模型训练、分子动力学、增强采样、轨迹分析和HPC编排。本文介绍ai2-kit，一个用于开发可访问、可复现且可扩展的AI2工作流的软件工具包。ai2-kit提供高语义密度的命令行接口和Python API，用于结构和数据集转换、批任务生成、主动学习筛选、任务编排和工作流恢复。我们在四个代表性应用中展示了ai2-kit：基于主动学习的机器学习势函数构建、氧化还原和酸碱过程的自由能微扰、带电界面的电化学机器学习势函数，以及基于机器学习分子动力学的光谱学。ai2-kit还提供了AI智能体技能，帮助用户将这些用例改编为适用于自身化学体系和计算软件栈的定制化工作流。总之，ai2-kit帮助将AI2方法从定制化的计算协议转变为可复现且可扩展的工作流，用于从模型构建到性质预测的复杂化学体系。

title: Multi-Turn Agentic Scientific Literature Search via Workflow Induction
abstract: Scientific literature search often requires more than retrieving papers from a single query: users' intents are underspecified, preference-dependent, and evolve through interaction. Existing search agents typically rely on fixed pipelines or implicit language-only reasoning, making their search strategies difficult to control, inspect, and refine. We introduce PaperPilot, a multi-turn literature search agent that frames scientific search as workflow induction. Given an anchor paper and a user query, PaperPilot constructs an executable DAG of paper-search operators, including keyword search, citation expansion, filtering, scoring, reranking, and evidence extraction. User feedback is then used to refine both the query and the workflow itself. We train PaperPilot with supervised workflow imitation and preference optimization over controlled workflow corruptions. Experiments show that PaperPilot-9B improves over the base Qwen3.5-9B toolset agent under multi-turn interaction, increasing Hit@5 from 58.0 to 77.0, MRR from 47.5 to 59.4, and nDCG@10 from 26.8 to 32.5, while reducing workflow execution errors from 9.5% to 0%. These results show that explicit, editable search workflows provide an effective and controllable interface for aligning literature search agents with complex scientific intent.
zh_abstract: 科学文献检索通常不仅仅需要从单次查询中检索论文：用户的意图是不明确的、依赖于偏好的，并且会通过交互不断演变。现有的搜索智能体通常依赖固定流程或仅基于隐式语言的推理，使得其搜索策略难以控制、检查和优化。我们提出了PaperPilot，一个多轮文献搜索智能体，将科学搜索建模为工作流归纳(workflow induction)。给定一篇锚论文(anchor paper)和用户查询，PaperPilot构建一个可执行的论文搜索算子有向无环图(DAG)，包括关键词搜索、引文扩展、筛选、评分、重排序和证据提取。然后利用用户反馈来优化查询以及工作流本身。我们通过有监督工作流模仿(Supervised Workflow Imitation)和对受控工作流损坏(Controlled Workflow Corruptions)的偏好优化(Preference Optimization)来训练PaperPilot。实验表明，在多轮交互下，PaperPilot-9B相比基础Qwen3.5-9B工具集智能体有所提升，Hit@5从58.0提高到77.0，MRR从47.5提高到59.4，nDCG@10从26.8提高到32.5，同时工作流执行错误从9.5%降至0%。这些结果表明，显式、可编辑的搜索工作流为将文献搜索智能体与复杂的科学意图对齐提供了有效且可控的界面。

title: Adaptive fine-tuning of foundation models for crystal structure prediction: Discovery of high-pressure phases in the CaFeNi system
abstract: The prediction of crystal structures is a key challenge in chemistry and materials science, but evolutionary crystal structure prediction (CSP) remains computationally expensive because it relies on repeated \textit{ab initio} relaxations and energy ranking. Machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) can accelerate CSP, yet their use is limited by the need for large training sets and by the difficulty of choosing which candidate structures should be labeled by density functional theory (DFT). Here we introduce a self-consistent, foundation-model-assisted CSP workflow that combines evolutionary search with adaptive data selection and fine-tuning. Starting from a pretrained MLIP, the algorithm rapidly explores configuration space while iteratively selecting compact, representative, and physically relevant subsets of structures for DFT labeling, thereby reducing redundant calculations and improving a system-specific potential. We apply the method to the chemically complex Ca--Fe--Ni ternary system. The workflow reproduces the known low-pressure convex hull and enables efficient high-pressure exploration. It predicts a previously unreported compound, Ca$_6$FeNi, which becomes thermodynamically stable above 100~GPa. These results show that foundation-model-based, data-efficient CSP can greatly reduce computational cost while preserving accuracy and enabling the discovery of new materials in complex multicomponent systems.
zh_abstract: 晶体结构预测是化学与材料科学领域的一项关键挑战，然而进化晶体结构预测(CSP)由于依赖反复的\textit{ab initio}弛豫和能量排序，计算成本仍然很高。机器学习原子间势(MLIPs)可以加速CSP，但其应用受到以下限制：需要大量训练集，以及难以选择哪些候选结构应由密度泛函理论(DFT)进行标注。本文介绍了一种自洽的、基础模型辅助的CSP工作流程，该流程将进化搜索与自适应数据选择和微调相结合。从预训练的MLIP出发，该算法在快速探索构型空间的同时，迭代地选择紧凑、代表性且物理相关的结构子集用于DFT标注，从而减少冗余计算并改进特定体系的势函数。我们将该方法应用于化学组成复杂的Ca-Fe-Ni三元体系。该工作流程复现了已知的低压凸包，并实现了高效的高压探索。它预测了一种此前未被报道的化合物Ca$_6$FeNi，该化合物在100~GPa以上时具有热力学稳定性。这些结果表明，基于基础模型、数据高效的CSP可以大幅降低计算成本，同时保持准确性，并能够在复杂多组分体系中实现新材料的发现。
introduction:
Crystal structure prediction (CSP) is a cornerstone of modern materials science, providing a systematic route for discovering stable and metastable phases and for understanding structure--property relationships across wide ranges of composition, pressure, and temperature . In particular, CSP plays a crucial role in regimes where experimental characterization is challenging or infeasible, such as at high pressures or for complex multicomponent systems, where kinetic barriers and metastability strongly affect phase formation .



Over the past two decades, global optimization techniques, including evolutionary algorithms and related methods, have demonstrated remarkable success in identifying low-energy crystal structures directly from chemical composition . However, such approaches are traditionally coupled with  density functional theory (DFT) calculations for structural relaxation and energetic ranking, which leads to prohibitively high computational costs when exploring large compositional spaces, multicomponent systems, or high-pressure phase diagrams . These limitations become especially severe when high accuracy is required, for instance for constructing reliable convex hulls or resolving small enthalpy differences between competing phases.

Machine-learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) have emerged as a powerful solution to this computational bottleneck, offering near-DFT accuracy at a fraction of the computational cost . Their integration into CSP workflows enables large-scale structure screening, accelerated evolutionary searches, and efficient prescreening of candidate phases . Nevertheless, the construction of robust MLIPs typically relies on extensive system-specific training datasets and iterative active learning schemes, which themselves require substantial  labeling~. This creates a fundamental challenge for previously unexplored materials or extreme thermodynamic conditions, where representative training data are scarce or entirely unavailable.
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出一种结合预训练基础模型和自适应数据选择与微调的自我一致晶体结构预测工作流，显著降低了多组分体系下高精度结构搜索对DFT标注的依赖。

2. 关键结论: (1) 该方法在Ca-Fe-Ni三元体系中成功再现了已知的低压凸包，并以极少的DFT计算实现了高效的高压结构搜索；(2) 预测了一个之前未报道的化合物Ca6FeNi，在100 GPa以上热力学稳定；(3) 通过迭代选择紧凑、有代表性且物理相关的结构子集进行DFT标注，大幅减少了冗余计算，并针对性地优化了体系特定的原子间势。

3. 专家点评: 该工作巧妙地利用基础模型的迁移能力绕过了传统MLIP需要大量训练数据的瓶颈，为复杂多组分及极端条件下的晶体结构预测提供了实用的加速方案。然而，其效果高度依赖于预训练基础模型在目标体系上的初始表现，且未讨论对完全未知化学空间或非平衡态结构的适用性，未来需在泛化能力和不确定性量化方面进一步验证。

title: Excitons in Large Disordered Boron-Nitride Layer using Linear-Scaling Bethe-Salpeter Simulations
abstract: We introduce a real-space, linear-scaling Bethe-Salpeter framework that enables excitonic spectroscopy in large and possibly disordered boron-nitride-derived systems. Thanks to the use of a sublattice-resolved perturbative decoupling that maps localized electron-hole pairs onto a sparse tight-binding model, we implement the Kernel Polynomial Method to compute absorption spectra with O(N) cost. To illustrate the capabilities of our method, we apply it to Anderson-disordered monolayer hexagonal boron nitride with up to $10^{5}$ orbitals. The method reveals a disorder-induced asymmetric broadening of bright excitons, a crossover from quadratic to linear redshift of the main absorption peak, and Anderson localization of the exciton center of mass. This approach extends excitonic calculations beyond the reach of conventional ab initio Green's function methods (GW approximation and Bethe-Salpeter equation), opening optical spectroscopy to large-scale, disordered, moiré, quasicrystalline, and structurally complex quantum materials.
zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种实空间、线性标度的Bethe-Salpeter框架，能够对大型且可能无序的氮化硼衍生系统进行激子光谱学分析。通过使用子晶格分辨的微扰解耦方法，将局域电子-空穴对映射到稀疏紧束缚模型上，我们实现了核多项式方法(Kernel Polynomial Method)，以O(N)的计算成本计算吸收光谱。为了展示该方法的能力，我们将其应用于包含多达$10^{5}$个轨道的安德森无序(Anderson-disordered)单层六方氮化硼。该方法揭示了无序诱导的亮激子不对称展宽、主吸收峰从二次红移到线性红移的交叉行为，以及激子质心的安德森局域化(Anderson localization)。这一方法将激子计算拓展到传统第一性原理格林函数方法(GW近似和Bethe-Salpeter方程)无法触及的范围，为大规模、无序、莫尔(moiré)、准晶(quasicrystalline)以及结构复杂的量子材料的光谱学分析开辟了道路。

title: Strain-Tunable Harmonic Responses in Valley-Polarized Bilayer Graphene
abstract: We theoretically investigate the linear and second-order nonlinear optical responses of valley-polarized bilayer graphene under uniaxial strain. Employing a low-energy effective Hamiltonian that incorporates trigonal warping and strain-induced anisotropy, we calculate the optical susceptibilities within the quantum kinetic formalism. We show that, while the second-order response vanishes in valley-balanced bilayer graphene owing to the cancellation of contributions from opposite valleys, a finite valley polarization lifts this cancellation and enables a net second-harmonic generation (SHG) signal. Uniaxial strain substantially modifies the nonlinear response by distorting the low-energy electronic structure and altering the pseudospin texture, producing a highly anisotropic SHG spectrum. Pronounced resonant enhancements occur at photon energies $\hbarω\approx E_f$ and $\hbarω\approx 2E_f$, associated with two-photon and one-photon interband resonances, respectively. Remarkably, changing the sign of the strain parameter reverses the direction of the induced second-harmonic current, providing a mechanically controlled switching mechanism for nonlinear optical transport. These results establish strain engineering as an effective route for manipulating valley-dependent nonlinear optical phenomena in bilayer graphene and suggest new opportunities for tunable mid-infrared photonic and valley-optoelectronic applications.
zh_abstract: 我们从理论上研究了单轴应变下谷极化的双层石墨烯的线性和二阶非线性光学响应。利用包含三角翘曲和应变诱导各向异性的低能有效哈密顿量，我们在量子动力学框架内计算了光学极化率。我们表明，虽然由于相反谷的贡献相消，二阶响应在谷平衡的双层石墨烯中消失，但有限的谷极化消除了这种相消并产生了净二次谐波产生（SHG）信号。单轴应变通过扭曲低能电子结构和改变赝自旋织构，显著改变了非线性响应，产生了高度各向异性的SHG谱。在光子能量$\hbarω\approx E_f$和$\hbarω\approx 2E_f$处出现了显著的共振增强，分别对应于双光子与单光子的带间共振。值得注意的是，改变应变参数的符号会反转诱导的二次谐波电流的方向，为非线性光学输运提供了一种机械控制的开关机制。这些结果表明，应变工程是调控双层石墨烯中谷依赖非线性光学现象的有效途径，并为可调谐中红外光子学和谷光电子学应用提供了新的机遇。
introduction:
Bilayer graphene provides a highly versatile platform for investigating symmetry-controlled electronic and optical phenomena in two-dimensional quantum materials {McCann2013BLGReview,Kheirabadi2018Cyclotron,
Kheirabadi2016MagneticRatchet,Battilomo2019, Kheirabadi2022QuantumNonlinear,
Kagan2025BilayerGraphene,Li2026TwistedBilayerSystems}. In contrast to monolayer graphene, BLG hosts massive chiral quasiparticles and possesses a low-energy band structure that can be continuously tuned by external perturbations such as electric fields, strain, pressure, and stacking modifications . Owing to the interplay between interlayer coupling and trigonal warping, the electronic structure of BLG exhibits a rich variety of phenomena, including Lifshitz transitions, anisotropic transport, and tunable optical responses . These properties have made bilayer graphene an attractive system for exploring nonlinear optical effects and their manipulation through symmetry engineering.

Recent advances in nonlinear optics of quantum materials have generated significant interest in second-order optical processes, including second-harmonic generation (SHG), nonlinear photocurrents, and nonlinear Hall effects . In centrosymmetric crystals, electric-dipole second-order responses vanish because of inversion symmetry. Consequently, pristine bilayer graphene exhibits negligible SHG under ordinary conditions. Finite second-order optical responses can emerge only when inversion symmetry or other relevant symmetries are broken, for example through perpendicular electric fields, substrate-induced asymmetry, twist engineering, strain, or valley-selective population imbalance . Understanding how such symmetry-breaking mechanisms influence nonlinear optical phenomena remains a central topic in graphene-based optoelectronics.

Several routes for activating SHG in graphene systems have been explored. In electrically biased bilayer graphene, an interlayer potential difference breaks inversion symmetry and pro
conclusion:
In summary, we have theoretically investigated the linear and second-harmonic optical responses of valley-polarized bilayer graphene subjected to uniaxial strain within a low-energy quantum kinetic framework. Our findings demonstrate that the complex interplay among intrinsic trigonal warping, valley polarization, and strain-induced electronic anisotropy gives rise to a finite, highly tunable optoelectronic profile. Notably, the SHG spectrum exhibits a significantly heightened sensitivity to variations in the strain parameter compared to the linear optical response, providing an effective lever to completely reverse the directional orientation of the induced nonlinear current.

Microscopically, the strain parameter $w$ breaks the structural symmetry by distorting and shifting the low-energy Dirac cones, which fundamentally reshapes the sublattice pseudospin texture and alters the underlying momentum-dependent interband transition pathways. Depending on the magnitude and sign of $w$, the resulting SHG signal can be deterministically enhanced or suppressed. Within the parameter regime explored here, the nonlinear susceptibility profiles evolve continuously without adhering to a simple or universal scaling relation with $w$, highlighting the intricate quantum interference between competing transition channels. 

Furthermore, while the linear response exhibits a characteristic resonance threshold at the standard interband edge $  2E_f$, the second-order nonlinear response features a dual-peaked structure in the mid-infrared regime with pronounced resonant enhancements centered near both $  E_f$ and $  2E_f$, whose spectral positions remain largely invariant under strain.  Taken together, these results demonstrate that strain engineering provides an effective route for controlling valley-dependent nonlinear optical responses in bilayer graphene.
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 首次理论提出通过单轴应变符号反转实现谷极化双层石墨烯中二次谐波电流方向的可逆切换，构建了机械控制的非线性光学开关机制。

2. 关键结论: (1) 谷极化是产生有限二次谐波响应的前提，平衡态下谷间贡献抵消导致SHG消失；(2) 单轴应变通过扭曲低能狄拉克锥和赝旋纹理显著调制SHG谱，使其具有高度各向异性；(3) SHG在光子能量约等于费米能E_f和2E_f处出现共振增强，分别对应双光子与单光子带间跃迁；(4) 应变参数w的符号反转可使二次谐波电流方向完全反转，而线性响应对应变的敏感性较低；(5) 该效应源于应变诱导的结构对称性破缺与谷极化协同改变动量依赖的跃迁路径。

3. 专家点评: 该工作将应变工程与谷极化非线性光学巧妙结合，为二维材料中可调谐中红外光电子器件提供了新颖思路，尤其“应变开关”概念兼具基础物理意义和应用潜力。但需注意，理论基于低能有效模型，忽略了高能带贡献、无序及温度效应，且实验中同时实现可控谷极化与精确单轴应变仍具挑战，后续需验证其鲁棒性与可扩展性。

title: NQS-Agent: Health-Aware Agentic Hyperparameter Optimization for Neural-Network Quantum States
abstract: Neural-network quantum states (NQS) provide expressive variational representations for strongly correlated quantum many-body systems, but their practical accuracy depends sensitively on architecture-level hyperparameters and optimization schedules. Here we develop NQS-Agent, an implemented open-source software framework for health-aware hyperparameter optimization (HPO) in NQS calculations. Its workflow monitors energy trajectories, detects destructive optimization events, stops unstable calculations, modifies the learning-rate schedule, resumes optimization from safe checkpoints, and ranks candidates with an anomaly-aware score. We demonstrate the approach on a residual convolutional NQS for the square-lattice Heisenberg $J_1$-$J_2$ model, using architectures with parameter counts comparable to aCNN, a convolutional NQS architecture used here as a reference. The results show that NQS-Agent improves over the reported human-tuned aCNN baseline for the aCNN reference architecture and identifies a structurally distinct wide-and-shallow competitive candidate within the parameter-count-matched residual-CNN search space. These results show that the stability and recovery history of an optimization trajectory should be considered when assessing an NQS result. Health-aware HPO therefore provides a reproducible tuning protocol that goes beyond selecting a single lowest-energy calculation.
zh_abstract: 神经网络量子态(NQS)为强关联量子多体系统提供了富有表现力的变分表示，但其实际精度高度依赖于架构级超参数和优化策略。本文开发了NQS-Agent，一个已实现的开源软件框架，用于NQS计算中的健康感知超参数优化(HPO)。其工作流程可监控能量轨迹、检测破坏性优化事件、停止不稳定计算、修改学习率调度、从安全检查点恢复优化，并利用异常感知评分对候选配置进行排序。我们以残差卷积NQS为例，在方晶格海森堡$J_1$-$J_2$模型上演示了该方法，所使用的架构参数数量与作为参考的卷积NQS架构aCNN相当。结果表明，NQS-Agent在aCNN参考架构上超越了已报道的人工调优aCNN基线，并在参数数量匹配的残差-CNN搜索空间中识别出一个结构独特的宽而浅的竞争候选架构。这些结果表明，在评估NQS结果时应考虑优化轨迹的稳定性和恢复历史。因此，健康感知HPO提供了一种可复现的调优方案，其意义超越了单纯选择单一最低能量计算结果。
introduction:
Strongly correlated quantum many-body systems remain a central challenge in computational physics. In frustrated magnets and other two-dimensional lattice models, the exponential growth of Hilbert space prevents direct exact treatment beyond small clusters, while the competition among local constraints, long-range correlations, and possible ordered or disordered phases makes accurate ground-state calculations especially demanding. Representative numerical approaches include quantum Monte Carlo~, tensor-network methods~, density-matrix renormalization group calculations~, and variational Monte Carlo~. Nevertheless, accurate solutions of intermediate-size frustrated two-dimensional systems remain difficult because the different methods face sign problems, entanglement growth, boundary effects, or large variational search spaces, respectively.

Neural-network quantum states (NQS) offer a flexible variational route to this problem by representing many-body wave functions with trainable neural architectures~. Combined with variational Monte Carlo (VMC), NQS methods have been applied to spin models, frustrated systems, and quantum chemistry, using a growing range of architectures, including restricted Boltzmann machines~, convolutional networks~, recurrent networks~, graph-inspired networks~, and Transformers or vision-Transformer variants~. Their appeal lies in the possibility of learning compact but expressive wave-function ans\"atze directly from the variational principle.

In practice, however, the accuracy of an NQS calculation is influenced not only by the architecture class but also by architecture and optimizer hyperparameters. For convolutional NQS, the channel number, kernel size, network depth, residual-block count, learning rate, learning-rate schedule, regularization, random seed, and number of optimization steps can all influence the final energy~. Hyperparameter optimization (HPO) provides systematic ways to search these choices. Examples include random s
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出一种健康感知的代理式超参数优化框架，通过实时监控能量轨迹、检测破坏性优化事件并自动恢复，将优化过程的稳定性纳入NQS性能评估指标，超越了仅依赖最低能量的传统调优方法。

2. 关键结论: (1) NQS-Agent通过检测能量异常轨迹、自动停止不稳定计算、调整学习率并从安全检查点恢复，显著提升超参数搜索的鲁棒性和效率； (2) 在平方晶格Heisenberg J1-J2模型上，该框架不仅改进了人为调优的aCNN基线性能，还自动发现了参数数量匹配的宽而浅的残差卷积架构候选； (3) 研究强调，优化轨迹的稳定性和恢复历史应作为评估NQS结果的关键因素，健康感知HPO提供了一种可重复的调优协议，而非简单选择最低能量结果。

3. 专家点评: 该工作将运维领域常用的健康监测思想引入NQS超参数优化，解决了传统HPO忽略优化过程稳定性的重要缺陷，具有较强的工程实用价值。然而，其异常检测阈值和恢复策略的通用性尚未在多种模型和复杂系统中验证，且框架复杂度可能引入额外的计算开销。总体而言，这是一项务实的技术贡献，为NQS自动化调优提供了新方向，但理论创新深度有限。

title: Relaxation of Incommensurate Structures via Quantum Models
abstract: Accurately modeling structural relaxation in incommensurate systems is intrinsically challenging due to the absence of global translational symmetry. In this work, we develop a variational quantum framework for structural relaxation in incommensurate Schrödinger models, where displacement fields are formulated on the configuration space and the electronic Hamiltonian is represented in reciprocal space. This yields well-defined relaxed energy, local density of states, and forces through thermodynamic limits. We propose an anisotropic scattering-channel approximation, and prove exponential convergence of the approximate equilibria. Numerical experiments are performed to support the analysis and show that the model captures domain-wall formation and its impact on the electronic spectrum.
zh_abstract: 准确建模非公度系统中的结构弛豫由于缺乏全局平移对称性而具有内在挑战性。在本工作中，我们针对非公度薛定谔模型中的结构弛豫发展了一个变分量子框架，其中位移场在构型空间上描述，电子哈密顿量在倒空间表示。通过热力学极限，这一定义了明确的弛豫能量、局域态密度和力。我们提出了一种各向异性散射通道近似，并证明了近似平衡态的指数收敛性。数值实验支持了分析结果，并表明该模型能够捕捉畴壁形成及其对电子能谱的影响。
introduction:
Low-dimensional materials often exhibit emergent physical phenomena due to their strong sensitivity to geometry and external perturbations. 
A prominent example is the discovery of superconductivity in twisted bilayer graphene (TBG) near the magic angle, which has stimulated extensive interest in twisted incommensurate systems . 
In such systems, lattice mismatch or relative rotation between layers generates long-wavelength moir\'{e} patterns, leading to pronounced spatial modulation of interlayer stacking configurations. 
These moir\'{e} structures play a central role in determining both electronic and mechanical properties .
To minimize interlayer interaction energy, atomic positions undergo structural relaxation, which further reshapes the moir\'{e} pattern. 
This relaxation effect has been shown to significantly influence the resulting low-energy electronic band structure . 
It is therefore crucial to develop reliable and accurate models from a theoretical and computational perspective, that can provide a careful treatment of the interplay between geometric relaxation and electronic structure.
However, accurate modeling remains challenging, primarily due to the intrinsic incommensurability, which prevents the direct application of conventional periodic approaches.

The standard approach in electronic structure claculation is the supercell method, which approximates an incommensurate structure by a commensurate periodic system. 
This method becomes computationally prohibitive at small twist angles, where the moir\'{e} period grows rapidly . 
To address this limitation, continuum models such as the Bistritzer–MacDonald (BM) model provide an effective description at the moir\'{e} scale, capturing key features including flat electronic bands at significantly reduced computational cost . 
However, these models typically assume rigid lattices and ideal periodicity, and therefore do not account for accurate structural relaxation.

More recently, theoretical framework
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出了一种在配置空间上定义位移场并在倒空间表示电子哈密顿量的变分量子框架，并引入各向异性散射通道近似，首次实现了非公度系统结构弛豫的指数收敛理论保证。

2. 关键结论: (1) 该框架通过热力学极限定义了明确的弛豫能量、局域态密度和原子力，解决了非公度系统缺乏全局平移对称性带来的建模困难； (2) 各向异性散射通道近似被证明具有指数收敛性，数值实验验证了模型能准确捕捉畴壁形成及其对电子能谱的影响。

3. 专家点评: 该工作为非公度系统（如魔角石墨烯）的结构弛豫与电子结构耦合提供了一条严谨的理论路径，克服了超胞法的计算瓶颈和连续模型忽略弛豫的局限。然而，变分量子框架的实际计算复杂度、对强关联效应的处理能力，以及是否适用于大尺度真实材料，仍需进一步验证。其指数收敛性证明虽理论上优美，但可能依赖于特定近似假设，未来需与实验或第一性原理结果进行对比。

title: Nonequilibrium electron-phonon dynamics with high momentum resolution: Thermalization bottlenecks and the effects of phonon dispersion
abstract: The nonequilibrium electron-phonon interplay is central to thermalization of solids, yet the microscopic picture of transient states and relaxation pathways remains incomplete. Previous nonequilibrium Green's function (NEGF) studies were restricted to local phonons and local self-energy approximations, leaving momentum-dependent dynamics largely unexplored. In this work, we demonstrate the power of the recently developed quantics-tensor-train (QTT) NEGF framework through large-scale lattice simulations with arbitrary phonon dispersions. QTTs provide a memory-efficient representation of two-time Green's functions, enabling momentum-resolved simulations with full electron-phonon feedback on lattices up to 256x256 sites. Comparing optical and acoustic phonon models, we reveal a hierarchy of relaxation bottlenecks that extends the well-known phonon-window bottleneck effect. For optical phonons, we confirm the main phonon-energy window and uncover a reduced window separating momentum-space regions of excess and deficit electronic population. We also identify a separate bottleneck in phonon thermalization, rooted in the momentum-dependent coupling to the particle-hole continuum. For acoustic phonons, the phonon-energy window acquires pronounced momentum dependence dictated by simultaneous energy-momentum conservation. The reduced window becomes asymmetric; directional scattering between Brillouin-zone regions creates a persistent bottleneck for low-momentum phonon modes. The high momentum and frequency resolution of our spectra further reveals a direct correspondence between phonon relaxation and charge response. Our results establish QTT-NEGF simulations as a scalable and controlled framework for quantitative nonequilibrium electron-phonon dynamics, overcoming previous lattice-size and propagation-time limitations and providing accurate reference data for time-resolved spectroscopies.
zh_abstract: 非平衡电子-声子相互作用是固体热化的核心，然而瞬态和弛豫路径的微观图景仍不完整。先前的非平衡格林函数(NEGF)研究局限于局域声子和局域自能近似，导致动量依赖的动力学在很大程度上未被探索。在本工作中，我们通过具有任意声子色散的大规模晶格模拟，展示了近期发展的量子张量列(QTT) NEGF框架的强大能力。QTT提供了双时格林函数的内存高效表示，使得在高达256×256格点的晶格上实现具有完整电子-声子反馈的动量分辨模拟成为可能。通过比较光学和声学声子模型，我们揭示了一个弛豫瓶颈的层级结构，该结构扩展了众所周知的声子窗口瓶颈效应。对于光学声子，我们确认了主声子能量窗口，并揭示了一个缩小的窗口，该窗口将动量空间中电子布居过剩和不足的区域分隔开来。我们还识别出声子热化中的一个单独瓶颈，其根源在于与粒子-空穴连续体的动量依赖耦合。对于声学声子，声子能量窗口获得了显著的动量依赖性，该依赖性由同时的能量-动量守恒决定。缩小的窗口变为非对称；布里渊区区域之间的定向散射为低动量声子模式创建了一个持久的瓶颈。我们谱的高动量和高频率分辨率进一步揭示了声子弛豫与电荷响应之间的直接对应关系。我们的结果将QTT-NEGF模拟确立为一个可扩展且可控的框架，用于定量研究非平衡电子-声子动力学，克服了先前的晶格尺寸和传播时间限制，并为时间分辨光谱学提供准确的参考数据。
introduction:
In pump-probe experiments, phonons are crucial degrees of freedom which strongly influence the dynamics of photo-excited solids from subpicosecond to picosecond timescales.
Phenomenological descriptions of the transient evolution of an electron-phonon coupled system often assume separate temperatures of the electron and phonon subsystems, the so-called two-temperature model  or its extensions, the multi-phonon-temperature models or nonthermal lattice models .
However, these simplified treatments fail to capture phenomena associated with general nonthermal electron and phonon distributions, such as transient population inversions  or relaxation bottlenecks . 
More detailed insights can be obtained from studies of microscopic models , yet our understanding of the nonequilibrium dynamics in even the most basic electron-phonon systems is currently incomplete.

This knowledge gap originates from the difficulty of accurately simulating the many-body dynamics of electron-phonon coupled systems.
Wave-function-based techniques, such as exact diagonalization or the density-matrix renormalization group, face severe challenges because of the (in principle) infinite size of the phonon Hilbert space . Dealing with this in practice requires careful truncations , pseudosite formulations , or special basis optimizations .
This greatly restricts the maximum propagation times, and in particular, the lattice size and dimensionality (most previous studies considered one dimension).
While diagrammatic techniques bypass this issue by replacing wave functions by Green's functions, in nonequilibrium, the cost of storing the two-time electron and phonon Green's functions, as well as the corresponding self-energies, quickly becomes prohibitive with increasing propagation time.
The computational effort also rapidly grows due to the non-Markovian character of the equations of motion.
The above issues become particularly challenging when accounting for the phonon's dispersion, which requires sto
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 将量子张量列车方法引入非平衡格林函数框架，首次实现了对任意声子色散和大尺寸晶格（256x256）下电子-声子耦合系统的高动量分辨模拟，从而揭示了超越传统声子窗口效应的新热化瓶颈。

2. 关键结论: (1) 对光学声子，除确认主声子能量窗口外，还发现了一个“减少窗口”将动量空间中电子过剩与亏损区域分离，并指出声子热化中存在源于动量依赖粒子-空穴连续谱耦合的独立瓶颈；(2) 对声学声子，声子能量窗口表现出强烈的动量依赖性，由同时满足能量-动量守恒决定，且“减少窗口”不对称，导致低动量声子模式出现持久性瓶颈；(3) 高分辨率谱图直接揭示了声子弛豫与电荷响应之间的对应关系，为时间分辨光谱提供了定量参考。

3. 专家点评: 该工作突破了此前局域声子及局域自能近似的局限，在计算规模和动量分辨率上实现了质的飞跃，是非平衡电子-声子理论研究的重要进展。然而，方法对强耦合或更多自由度（如电子-电子相互作用）的可扩展性尚未验证，且QTT的压缩效率可能随系统复杂度下降，实际应用仍需谨慎评估其近似精度。

title: High-order tensor neural network for iteration-free structure relaxation
abstract: Structure relaxation is important for the discovery of new materials, yet conventional ab initio optimization remains a major bottleneck in high-throughput screening workflows. Machine learning potentials have accelerated relaxation by orders of magnitude, but they still rely on iterative optimization and high-quality DFT force labels. Here, we present HotRelax, a high-order tensor message-passing neural network for one-shot, end-to-end prediction of relaxed structures. Trained directly on paired unrelaxed and relaxed structures, HotRelax requires no DFT force labels and predicts relaxed structures in a single forward pass, without iterative inference or post-processing. Across five diverse datasets spanning 3D bulk crystals, 2D layered materials and catalysts, HotRelax shows strong performance relative to state-of-the-art end-to-end relaxation models, achieving lower prediction errors on several benchmarks while maintaining a compact model size and efficient inference. Extensive DFT calculations further show that the predicted structures are close in energy to their DFT-relaxed counterparts. When integrated into catalytic workflows, HotRelax also improves the accuracy and generalization of relaxed-state energy prediction models. Together, these results support HotRelax as an efficient and widely applicable framework for end-to-end structure relaxation, with strong potential to accelerate high-throughput materials discovery.
zh_abstract: 结构弛豫对新材料的发现至关重要，然而传统的从头算优化仍是高通量筛选流程中的主要瓶颈。机器学习势将弛豫速度提升了数个数量级，但仍依赖迭代优化和高精度的DFT力标签。本文提出HotRelax——一种用于单次端到端预测弛豫结构的高阶张量消息传递神经网络。该模型直接在未弛豫与弛豫结构的配对数据上训练，无需DFT力标签，且仅需一次前向传播即可预测弛豫结构，无需迭代推理或后处理。在涵盖三维块体晶体、二维层状材料及催化剂的五个不同数据集上，HotRelax相较于最先进的端到端弛豫模型展现出强劲性能，在多个基准测试中实现更低的预测误差，同时保持紧凑的模型尺寸和高效的推理能力。大量DFT计算进一步表明，预测结构与DFT弛豫结构在能量上接近。当集成至催化流程时，HotRelax还提升了弛豫态能量预测模型的准确性与泛化能力。综上，这些结果支持HotRelax作为一种高效且广泛适用的端到端结构弛豫框架，具有加速高通量材料发现的巨大潜力。

title: MALOQ: Massively Accelerated Learning of Operators for Quantum Transport
abstract: Machine-learned (ML) operator models can be trained to predict density functional theory (DFT) Hamiltonian/density matrices at significantly reduced computational cost, thus extending electronic-structure calculations to previously unfeasible scales. Here, we introduce MALOQ (Massively Accelerated Learning of Operators for Quantum Transport), an application built to train on and predict electronic-structure matrices for systems made of few to 100k atoms, described by large basis sets, and covering a wide range of atomic elements. Based on a state-of-the-art, SO(2)-equivariant backbone architecture, MALOQ provides (i) custom data-processing kernels to handle high-rank Hamiltonian matrix data and (ii) a scalable edge-wise distribution of atomic graph(s). Trained on the largest molecular Hamiltonian datasets available today, it reduces time-per-epoch by over 30% compared to a molecule-wise-distributed framework, and enables inference on material graphs of arbitrary size. We demonstrate scalable training and inference for 3,000-12,000 atoms on the Alps supercomputer, up to 192 GPUs and 256 GPUs, respectively.
zh_abstract: 机器学习的算子模型可以经过训练，以显著降低的计算成本预测密度泛函理论(DFT)哈密顿量/密度矩阵，从而将电子结构计算扩展到以前无法实现的规模。本文介绍了MALOQ（量子输运算子的大规模加速学习），这是一个用于训练和预测电子结构矩阵的应用，适用于由大型基组描述、涵盖多种原子元素、原子数从几个到10万个的系统。基于最先进的SO(2)-等变骨干架构，MALOQ提供了（i）处理高秩哈密顿量矩阵数据的自定义数据处理内核，以及（ii）可扩展的原子图边级分布。在目前最大的分子哈密顿量数据集上训练时，与分子级分布式框架相比，它每轮训练时间减少了30%以上，并支持任意大小的材料图推理。我们在阿尔卑斯超级计算机上展示了3000-12000个原子的可扩展训练和推理，分别使用了最多192个GPU和256个GPU。
introduction:
Machine-learned (ML) models are accelerating computational materials science research by extending the reach of atomistic simulations to previously infeasible scales . So far, these models have focused on learning  at the molecular and atomic level. This includes the class of ML Interatomic Potentials (MLIPs), which predict the molecular energies and atomic forces used in molecular dynamics (MD) simulations. State-of-the-art, graph-based `materials foundation models' are now capable of generating these quantities for arbitrary molecules and complex material geometries at quasi-DFT-level accuracy . 

An emerging class of ML materials models extends these architectures toward electronic-level quantities, defined by  . Rather than learning atom-centered properties, these `operator models' are directly trained on the matrices encoding interactions between the inter- and intra-atomic orbitals of a given system. The most commonly targeted operators are the Hamiltonian/Fock ($$) and density ($$) matrices, which describe the spatial and energetic distribution of states that electrons can occupy within the atomic structure considered. Recent works have extended these principles to learn other operators that can be represented in an atomic orbital basis, either directly, such as the Green's function (inverse of $$) , or indirectly, e.g., lower-rank Hessian  matrices which are derived from forces. Operator models are being developed for two main purposes:

Advanced QT solvers operate on electronic structure inputs at the level of density functional theory (DFT), one of the most powerful  methods for electronic structure calculations . deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出了一种基于边分布并行策略的SO(2)-等变图神经网络框架，实现了对超大体系（10万原子、大基组）哈密顿矩阵的高效训练与推理，且相比分子级分布式方法每个epoch加速超过30%。

2. 关键结论: (1) MALOQ能够处理从数个原子到10万原子、覆盖多种元素和大基组的电子结构哈密顿/密度矩阵预测任务；(2) 采用SO(2)-等变架构作为骨干，并设计了专用数据预处理内核以处理高阶矩阵；(3) 通过将原子图按边分布实现了可扩展的并行方案，在Alps超算上支持最多192 GPU训练和256 GPU推理，体系规模为3000-12000原子；(4) 该方法在训练吞吐量上相比传统的分子级分布式框架提升30%以上，并支持任意大小的材料图进行推理。

3. 专家点评: 该工作聚焦于ML算子模型在大规模并行计算上的工程优化，而非常见的模型架构创新，对于将电子结构预测推向实际应用（如量子输运）具有重要工程价值。但论文未提供结论部分，且缺乏对预测哈密顿矩阵在实际量子输运模拟中的精度验证，因此其生成矩阵的物理保真度以及在不同体系（如缺陷、异质结）中的泛化能力仍待进一步检验。

title: QueenBee Planner: Skill-Evolving Communication Topologies for Token-Efficient LLM Multi-Agent Systems
abstract: Large language model (LLM) multi-agent systems increasingly depend not only on how individual agents reason, but also on how agents are connected. This paper introduces QueenBee Planner, a framework that treats inter-agent communication topology as a retrievable and self-improving design skill. A pool of worker agents, the task adapter, and the scoring function are frozen; only an outer LLM planner learns to generate temporal communication DAGs specifying who sends information to whom, in which round, who merges messages, and who emits the final answer. Execution traces are distilled into evidence-backed design rules with three actions: \emph{Preserve}, \emph{Modify}, and \emph{Avoid}. To prevent self-evolution from turning lucky runs or plausible but false explanations into policy, QueenBee uses held-out acceptance gates, variance-aware credit, motif-level attribution, transfer trust, insight falsification, and structural deduplication. We evaluate the method on Count-Frequency aggregation and Silo-Bench-style distributed coordination tasks. With fixed workers, self-evolved graph generation produces communication structures that improve over fixed topologies and cold generation. In the CF fulltest setting, the best generated graph reduces RMSE from 12.53 for the strongest fixed topology to 7.87 while also reducing messages, model calls, and token cost; Silo-style results show the same direction of improvement over cold and fixed-topology baselines. These results suggest that multi-agent systems can learn reusable architectural design knowledge rather than merely memorizing task answers.
zh_abstract: 大型语言模型(LLM)多智能体系统越来越依赖于个体智能体的推理方式以及智能体之间的连接方式。本文提出QueenBee Planner框架，该框架将智能体间通信拓扑视为一种可检索且可自我改进的设计技能。工作智能体池、任务适配器和评分函数被冻结；仅外部LLM规划器学习生成时序通信有向无环图(DAG)，指定谁在哪个轮次向谁发送信息、谁合并消息、以及谁输出最终答案。执行轨迹被提炼为带有三种操作的基于证据的设计规则：\emph{保留(Preserve)}、\emph{修改(Modify)}和\emph{避免(Avoid)}。为防止自我进化将偶然成功或看似合理但错误的解释固化为策略，QueenBee采用了保留集验收门控、方差感知信用、动机级归因、迁移信任、洞察证伪和结构去重。我们在计数频率聚合(Count-Frequency)和Silo-Bench风格的分布式协调任务上评估该方法。在固定工作智能体下，自我进化的图生成产生的通信结构优于固定拓扑和冷启动生成。在CF fulltest设置下，最佳生成图将均方根误差(RMSE)从最强固定拓扑的12.53降至7.87，同时减少了消息量、模型调用次数和令牌成本；Silo风格的结果显示了与冷启动和固定拓扑基线相比相同的改进方向。这些结果表明，多智能体系统可以学习可复用的架构设计知识，而不仅仅是记忆任务答案。
introduction:
The design question for large language model (LLM) systems has shifted. Early work asked how to prompt a model, what intermediate steps to elicit, and how to make a single model's reasoning more reliable through chains, trees, or graphs of thought~. As LLM capability has moved into systems of interacting agents, the design question has moved with it: not only how an individual agent should reason, but how a collection of agents should be organized, and how that organization should improve with experience.

Two observations motivate this shift. First, structure matters. Within a single agent, the arrangement of intermediate computation materially changes what the agent can do: chain-of-thought, self-consistency, tree search, ReAct-style tool use, and graph-structured reasoning all improve performance by changing the structure of inference rather than the base model itself~. Across agents, structure matters again. Role specialization, communication protocols, and debate-style interaction can improve factuality, problem solving, and coordination, whether they are wired by hand as fixed multi-agent protocols~ or induced through rounds of deliberation~.

Second, communication topology has become an explicit design object. Recent systems optimize the organization of agent interaction itself: GPTSwarm learns communication graphs through reinforcement over edge probabilities~; MacNet studies large-scale agent collaboration on DAG-like organizations and reports advantages for small-world structures~; ADAS searches over agentic systems by having a meta-agent write new agents in code~; AFlow searches code-represented workflows with Monte-Carlo tree search~; MASS jointly optimizes prompts and topologies~; and G-Designer decodes task-specific topologies with graph representations~. This line of work makes clear that the ``architecture'' of a multi-agent system is not an implementation detail. It is a first-class determinant of accuracy, cost, and robustness.

Yet these systems s
conclusion:
This paper studies whether communication structure in LLM multi-agent systems can be learned, stored, and transferred as a design skill. Rather than optimizing a worker's prompt, reasoning trace, or model parameters, QueenBee Planner freezes the worker pool and lets an outer planner learn how to generate temporal communication DAGs. The lifecycle learning object is therefore not the task answer and not the workers' local reasoning ability, but design knowledge about how agents should be connected under different task conditions.

The method compresses execution experience into evidence-backed skills whose actions are , , or . To make this self-evolution loop trustworthy, skill updates are tested through a held-out gate and constrained by motif-level credit, variance-aware comparison, transfer trust, insight falsification, and structural deduplication. The experiments show that disciplined graph-generation memory can help the planner produce sparser, more reliable, and lower-cost communication structures. On the CF problem, self-evolved free-DAG generation finds structures that outperform fixed topologies across multiple model settings. On Silo-style tasks, the current three-round result also improves over cold generation and fixed-topology baselines.

These findings support the view that the architecture of a multi-agent system is not merely an implementation detail, but an explicit object of learning. QueenBee Planner is not meant to discover one universally optimal topology; instead, it accumulates transferable priors about when to preserve, modify, or avoid communication patterns. Future work should evaluate this mechanism on larger task suites, broader worker configurations, and longer evolution horizons, and should further analyze which structural motifs most consistently improve accuracy, cost, and robustness.

deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 将多智能体系统的通信拓扑视为一种可检索、可自我进化的设计技能，通过冻结所有底层组件、仅让外部的LLM planner学习生成时序通信DAG来实现架构知识的复用与改进。

2. 关键结论: (1) 在Count-Frequency聚合任务上，经过自我进化生成的通信图相比最强固定拓扑将RMSE从12.53降至7.87，同时减少了消息数、模型调用次数和token成本；(2) Silo-Bench分布式协调任务同样证明了进化图生成优于冷启动和固定拓扑基线；(3) 所引入的hold-out验收门、方差感知信用、动机级归因、迁移信任、洞察证伪和结构去重等六种约束有效防止了自我进化被随机成功或虚假解释误导。

3. 专家点评: 该工作揭示了多智能体系统可以学习可迁移的架构设计知识而非仅记忆任务答案，这是一项有深度的概念突破。但其验证任务规模较小（计数聚合与Silo协调），且高度依赖于外规划器的能力与记忆压缩质量，实际部署中跨任务泛化和长期稳定性仍需更系统的检验。

title: Low-energy model for doped graphene nanoribbons
abstract: We analyse in this article the many-body behavior of free-standing doped graphene nanoribbons where the chemical potential lies inside the bulk single-particle bands. We perform an exact mapping from both an extended and an on-site Hubbard model of the ribbons to a Kanamori model, which includes ferromagnetic exchange and pair-hopping interactions. We determine the resulting Coulomb matrix elements analytically, and identify their scaling behavior as a function of ribbon width and length. We propose a low-energy version of the Kanamori Hamiltonian to address the response of the ribbons to external fields, with a view to their use as transport channels in nanoelectronics. We find that the model and the proposed ribbon parameters can produce open-shell, high-spin many-body states that can lead to shell- and spin-blockade responses.
zh_abstract: 本文分析了化学势位于体单粒子带内的自支撑掺杂石墨烯纳米带的多体行为。我们将纳米带的扩展及在位哈伯德模型精确映射至包含铁磁交换和配对跳跃相互作用的金森模型。解析确定了所得库仑矩阵元，并识别了其随纳米带宽度和长度的标度行为。我们提出了低能版本的金森哈密顿量，以研究纳米带对外部场的响应，旨在将其用作纳米电子学中的传输通道。我们发现该模型及所提出的纳米带参数能够产生开壳层、高自旋的多体态，从而引发壳层和自旋阻塞响应。
introduction:
Graphene was originally envisioned as the dreamed-of electronic material~. The vision 
included the realization of nano-electronic devices such as transistors or quantum dots, frequently
based on graphene nanoribbons (GNRs) . However, the expected revolution was hindered 
by a variety of factors, among which are the difficulties in producing atomically-precise GNRs~.
Recently, atomically-precise GNRs have been grown in ultra-high vacuum chambers and transferred to substrates 
with metal electrodes. Transport through single- or few-nanoribbon devices has recently been measured, 
showing single-electron transistor and quantum dot behavior~.
In understanding their behavior, it is important to realize that graphene nanoribbons are different from 
carbon nanotubes because $$ wave-vectors are
mixed by boundary conditions, so valleys are not good quantum numbers. Spin-splitting 
is expected to be absent in graphene nanoribbons except when the chemical potential is pinned around 
the edge-state energy window. Furthermore, both the intrinsic and Rashba spin orbit interactions are 
expected to be small like 
in bulk graphene, which exhibits a gap of about $25~$eV~. 

In previous work , we diagonalized analytically the tight-binding model of 
GNRs with arbitrary length and width, and showed that the existence or not, magnetic nature and energy of 
edge states 
in $N=5,\,7$ and 9 GNRs could be described by the use of an effective dimer Hubbard model.
The tight-binding solution was extended to the full Hubbard model of a GNR in 
Ref. . The Hubbard term was rewritten in the ribbon eigen-state basis, whereby a 
huge sum containing  operator products  $^_{1}\,
^_{2'}\,_{3'}\,_{4}$ was generated. The
sum was truncated by keeping only direct $1-4$, $2-3$ pairings, and the Coulomb integrals were calculated 
analytically. Explicit analytical mean-field equations for the paramagnetic, ferromagnetic and antiferromagnetic 
phases were deduced. The electronic band structure for narrow ribb
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 从扩展和现场Hubbard模型到包含铁磁交换与对跳跃的Kanamori模型的精确映射，并解析得到库仑矩阵元随带长宽的标度行为，从而构建了一个描述掺杂石墨烯纳米带低能输运响应的有效哈密顿量。

2. 关键结论: (1) 通过映射可解析确定Kanamori模型中的全部库仑矩阵元，且其大小随带宽度和长度呈特定标度关系；(2) 低能Kanamori哈密顿量能描述外加电场或磁场下纳米带的响应，尤其能产生开壳层高自旋多体态，进而引发壳层阻塞和自旋阻塞效应；(3) 与碳纳米管不同，石墨烯纳米带中谷量子数因边界混合而不守恒，且自旋轨道耦合极小，使得自旋分裂仅在边缘态化学势附近出现。

3. 专家点评: 该工作为理解掺杂石墨烯纳米带中的强关联现象提供了理论上精确且可解析处理的新框架，尤其对设计基于自旋阻塞的量子点器件具有指导意义。但映射过程中仅保留直接配对截断，忽略了其他非对角相互作用项，这可能会在高掺杂或窄带极限下引入误差；同时，缺乏与实验输运数据的直接对比，使得模型的预测能力尚待严格验证。

title: A Hybrid Quantum Mechanics Machine Learning Forcefield (QM/ML) Framework for Accurate Solute-Dislocation Interaction Simulations
abstract: Solute-dislocation interactions play a central role in controlling microstructural evolution and mechanical behaviour of structural materials, yet conventional atomistic modelling approaches struggle to combine the chemical accuracy with computational scalability. In the nuclear industry, these challenges become particularly acute, as experiments reveal strong correlations between solute segregation and irradiation-induced dislocation loops. However, theoretical insight remains limited because density functional theory (DFT) simulations are prohibitively expensive at relevant length scales, while traditional semi-empirical interatomic potentials lack the chemical fidelity required for predictive solute-defect calculations. Here, we introduce a hybrid quantum-mechanics/machine-learning (QM/ML) simulation framework that couples DFT with neural-network machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs), enabling accurate atomistic dislocation simulations at reduced computational cost. We demonstrate the QM/ML framework's capability by reproducing the experimentally observed Sn and Fe segregation to dislocation loops in Zr and investigating magnetically complex solute-dislocation interactions in steel. These results establish the approach as a transferable, high-fidelity tool for modelling irradiation-induced defect structures and benchmarking emerging MLIPs.
zh_abstract: 溶质-位错相互作用在控制结构材料的微观组织演化与力学行为中起着核心作用，然而传统的原子尺度建模方法难以将化学精度与计算可扩展性结合起来。在核工业中，这些挑战尤为严峻，因为实验揭示了溶质偏析与辐照诱导位错环之间的强相关性。然而，理论认识仍然有限：密度泛函理论（DFT）模拟在相关尺度上成本过高，而传统的半经验原子间势则缺乏预测性溶质-缺陷计算所需的化学保真度。本文提出了一种混合量子力学/机器学习（QM/ML）模拟框架，将DFT与神经网络原子间势（MLIPs）耦合，能够在降低计算成本的同时实现精确的原子尺度位错模拟。我们通过重现实验观察到的Zr中Sn和Fe在位错环处的偏析，并研究钢中磁性复杂的溶质-位错相互作用，展示了QM/ML框架的能力。这些结果确立了该方法作为一种可迁移、高保真度的工具，可用于模拟辐照诱导缺陷结构以及基准测试新兴的MLIPs。

title: Barocaloric phase transformation from data efficient fine-tuning of machine learned interatomic potentials
abstract: Solid-state cooling based on the barocaloric (BC) effect has emerged as promising environmentally friendly prospective alternative to conventional vapor-compression refrigeration. The search for suitable BC materials relies on efficient atomistic simulations of their phase behavior. Machine-learned interatomic potentials (MLIPs) enable such simulations at near density functional theory (DFT) accuracy, but generating the required DFT training data remains computationally demanding, which motivates development of strategies that reduce the amount of data needed to train accurate models. In this work, we use a prototypical BC material, ammonium sulfate, as a model system and investigate how small a training set can be while still reproducing the temperature-driven structural phase transformation that underlies its BC response. We train a series of MLIPs based on the MACE architecture using three strategies: training from scratch, and naive- and multihead replay fine-tuning of the MACE-MPA-0 foundation model. These strategies are evaluated on their ability to reproduce the phase transformation of ammonium sulfate in molecular dynamics simulations across a range of training-set sizes. We find that, while the MACE-MPA-0 foundation model itself fails to reproduce the transformation, and models trained from scratch break down for small datasets, fine-tuned models reproduce the transformation using as few as 5 to 10 60-atom DFT configurations. Both fine-tuning protocols yield similarly accurate results for ammonium sulfate, but we also find some indications that multihead replay fine-tuning is more robust on configurations outside the fine-tuning domain. Exploiting this data efficiency, we further show that models can be trained on small datasets and the hybrid-DFT level, and that some form of inclusion of dispersion correction is necessary to describe the phase behavior correctly.
zh_abstract: 基于气压热（BC）效应的固态冷却技术已成为传统蒸汽压缩制冷的极具前景的环保替代方案。寻找合适的BC材料依赖于对其相行为的高效原子尺度模拟。机器学习原子间势（MLIP）能够以接近密度泛函理论（DFT）的精度进行此类模拟，但生成所需的DFT训练数据仍需要大量计算资源，这促使我们开发减少训练精确模型所需数据量的策略。本研究以典型的BC材料硫酸铵作为模型体系，探究在仍能复现其BC响应所依托的温度驱动结构相变的前提下，训练集的最小规模。我们基于MACE架构训练了一系列MLIP，采用了三种策略：从头训练，以及基于MACE-MPA-0基础模型的朴素回放微调与多头回放微调。通过在一系列训练集规模下进行分子动力学模拟，评估这些策略复现硫酸铵相变的能力。我们发现：尽管MACE-MPA-0基础模型本身无法复现该相变，且从头训练的模型在小数据集下失效，但微调后的模型仅需5到10个60原子DFT构型即可复现该相变。两种微调方案对硫酸铵均给出了相近的精确结果，但我们也发现某些迹象表明，在微调域之外的构型上，多头回放微调更为鲁棒。利用这种数据高效性，我们进一步展示了模型可在小数据集及混合DFT水平下训练，并且正确描述相行为需要某种形式的色散修正。

title: Spin-orbit coupling driven topological superconductivity in twisted bilayer graphene-WSe$_2$ heterostructures
abstract: Commencing from the low-energy Bistritzer-MacDonald continuum model of twisted bi-layer graphene (tBLG) with proximity-induced Ising, Rashba, and intrinsic spin-orbit couplings (SOCs), we construct the corresponding Bogoliubov-de Gennes Hamiltonian with conventional $s$-wave pairing and theoretically investigate the emergence of topological superconductivity in it. The latter can possibly be experimentally demonstrated in tBLG, Niobium and tungsten diselenide heterostructures. The topological superconducting phases, bearing an effective $p$-wave pairing profile and exhibiting inverted band dispersion, are protected by a bulk gap and are topologically characterized by Chern numbers. In the absence of intrinsic SOC, variation of the twist angle and other SOC strengths yield extended gapless, trivial, and topological phases, with phase boundaries exactly matching the closing of direct band gaps. The topological regime exhibits clear band inversion in the combined particle-hole and spin space, along with distinct Bloch localization profiles compared to the trivial phase. Including intrinsic SOC generates additional topological phases and eliminates the gapless phase, indicating the enhanced stability of the gapped topological superconducting regime in tBLG.
zh_abstract: 从具有邻近诱导的Ising、Rashba和本征自旋轨道耦合(SOCs)的扭曲双层石墨烯(tBLG)的低能Bistritzer-MacDonald连续模型出发，我们构建了相应的常规$s$-波配对的Bogoliubov-de Gennes哈密顿量，并理论上研究了其中拓扑超导性的出现。后者可能可以在tBLG、铌和二硒化钨异质结构中通过实验证明。有效$p$-波配对轮廓且具有反转能带色散的拓扑超导相受到体带隙的保护，并通过陈数进行拓扑表征。在本征自旋轨道耦合缺失的情况下，扭转角和其他自旋轨道耦合强度的变化会产生扩展的无隙、平凡和拓扑相，其相边界与直接带隙的闭合精确匹配。拓扑区域在粒子-空穴和自旋组合空间中表现出清晰的能带反转，以及与平凡相比不同的布洛赫局域轮廓。包含本征自旋轨道耦合会产生额外的拓扑相并消除无隙相，这表明tBLG中有带隙的拓扑超导区域的稳定性增强。

title: Symplectic Neural Networks for learning Generalized Hamiltonians
abstract: Hamiltonian Neural Networks (HNNs) integrate physical priors into neural models by learning a system's Hamiltonian, improving generalization and sample efficiency. Identifying the system Hamiltonian from noisy observations of state variables is a challenging task. For simulations to faithfully reflect the long-term behavior of Hamiltonian systems, especially energy conservation, it is essential to use symplectic integrators, which preserve the system's geometric structure. This fidelity comes at a cost: implicit symplectic integrators are more computationally intensive and make backpropagation through the ODE solver non-trivial. However, by leveraging the fact that symplectic discretizations of the adjoint system yield the same sensitivities associated by backpropagation, we obtain an efficient method of training the Neural Network parameters. In our work, we explore this alternate method of HNN training under noisy observation of trajectories with our HNN model based on an implicit symplectic integrator. Computationally, a predictor-corrector based ODE solver and fixed point iteration help to mitigate the computational cost of the implicit timestepping, resulting in more efficient generation of gradient updates. We showcase the numerical advantage, in experiments, in system identification and energy preservation on a range of non-separable, chaotic systems and the efficient computation and memory complexity of our method. We also observe that the post-processing of the learned Hamiltonian using backward error analysis yields a modified Hamiltonian that is a more accurate approximation of the true Hamiltonian without the need to use more accurate discretizations of the flow map.
zh_abstract: 哈密顿神经网络(Hamiltonian Neural Networks, HNNs)通过学习系统的哈密顿量将物理先验融入神经模型，从而提升泛化能力和样本效率。从状态变量的含噪观测中识别系统哈密顿量是一项具有挑战性的任务。为使仿真能够忠实反映哈密顿系统的长期行为（尤其是能量守恒），必须使用能够保持系统几何结构的辛积分器(Symplectic Integrator)。这种保真度是有代价的：隐式辛积分器计算量更大，且使得通过常微分方程求解器进行反向传播变得复杂。然而，利用伴随系统(Adjoint System)的辛离散化能够产生与反向传播相同的灵敏度这一事实，我们获得了一种训练神经网络参数的高效方法。在本研究中，我们基于隐式辛积分器的HNN模型，探索了在轨迹含噪观测下训练HNN的另一种方法。在计算上，基于预测-校正的ODE求解器和不动点迭代有助于降低隐式时间步进的计算成本，从而更高效地生成梯度更新。我们通过实验展示了该方法在系统辨识和能量守恒方面的数值优势（针对一系列不可分离的混沌系统），以及其高效的计算和内存复杂度。我们还观察到，利用后向误差分析对学习到的哈密顿量进行后处理，能得到更精确逼近真实哈密顿量的修正哈密顿量，而无需使用更高精度的流映射离散化。
introduction:
The Hamiltonian formalism is standard in mathematical physics for expressing dynamics in many physical systems. Beyond yielding a systematic framework for deriving the dynamics of the system, there are deep structural, geometric, topological, and analytic properties of Hamiltonian functions that can be used to understand the physics of the system and its dynamics~. Hamiltonian systems are described by a single scalar function in the phase space $ :   ^{2d}  $ and the corresponding system for $y  $ in Hamilton's equations~.

0 & 1\\
-1 & 0
