It also successfully decoding the critical defect threshold (~8%) for lifting the Au(100) surface reconstruction. Our work challenges classical scalar defect models and provides a fresh paradigm for engineering catalyst surface integrity.
zh_abstract: 空位形成能从根本上决定了金属表面的结构完整性与催化行为。与传统依赖配位数的断键模型不同，我们在面心立方（FCC）晶格的Ir、Pt、Au以及六方密堆积（HCP）晶格的Be、Zn、Cd的密排表面上发现了一种反常的热力学反转现象：次表面空位本质上比表面空位更稳定。通过高通量DFT计算与机器学习力场，我们证明这种反常现象的物理起源在两种晶格体系中本质上是解耦的。对于FCC体系的三元素，显著的表面弛豫和强烈的实空间电子局域化诱导了定向的、类共价键的层内成键，从而形成一种"几何-电子解耦"机制。关键在于，这种非常规的热力学层级关系在Pt(111)表面实现了一种动态"自修复"机制，能够保持最表层的完整并防止其在析氢反应和氧还原反应中的催化性能衰减。该机制也成功解码了Au(100)表面重构消失的关键缺陷阈值（约8%）。本研究挑战了经典的标量缺陷模型，并为调控催化剂表面完整性提供了新范式。

title: Target-Distribution-Guided Cross-Functional Fine-Tuning of Machine-Learning Interatomic Potentials
abstract: Cross-functional fine-tuning of machine-learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) is often treated as a relabeling problem, where configurations generated at one density-functional level are relabeled using a higher-fidelity target functional. However, the resulting training data may be drawn from the wrong equilibrium distribution, because the statistical weights of configurations change across exchange--correlation functionals. Here we address this distribution mismatch using a target-distribution-guided workflow based on self-learning hybrid Monte Carlo (SLHMC), in which trial configurations are proposed by a machine-learning potential and accepted or rejected using target-functional density-functional-theory energies. Using rutile TiO$_2$ as a test system, we fine-tune the MACE-MP-0 foundation potential toward PBE, r$^2$SCAN, and HSE06 target functionals. The resulting adapted potentials reproduce target-anchored nearest-neighbor Ti--O distributions, radial distribution functions, and the NPT cell metrics examined here more accurately than the foundation-model and off-target relabeling controls considered in this work. In particular, HSE06-guided fine-tuning improves structural and thermodynamic properties that are difficult to access with direct hybrid-functional molecular dynamics because of the computational cost of exact exchange. These results indicate that target-distribution coverage is an essential component of cross-functional MLIP transfer, and that accurate target-level labels alone may be insufficient when the configurational distribution is mismatched.
zh_abstract: 机器学习原子间势（MLIPs）的跨泛函微调通常被视为一种重新标注问题，即在一个密度泛函级别生成的构型使用更高精度的目标泛函进行重新标注。然而，由此产生的训练数据可能来自错误的平衡分布，因为构型的统计权重会随交换-关联泛函的改变而改变。本文通过一种基于自学习混合蒙特卡洛（SLHMC）的目标分布引导工作流程来解决这种分布不匹配问题。在该流程中，试验构型由机器学习势提出，并使用目标泛函的密度泛函理论能量进行接受或拒绝判断。以金红石TiO$_2$作为测试体系，我们将MACE-MP-0基础势函数分别向PBE、r$^2$SCAN和HSE06目标泛函进行微调。所得适应势比本文考虑的基础模型及非目标重新标注对照组，更准确地再现了目标泛函锚定的最近邻Ti-O分布、径向分布函数以及本文所检测的NPT晶胞参数。特别是，HSE06引导的微调改善了结构和热力学性质，这些性质由于精确交换的计算成本而难以通过直接混合泛函分子动力学获取。这些结果表明，目标分布覆盖是跨泛函MLIP迁移的关键组成部分，当构型分布不匹配时，仅凭准确的目标级别标注可能是不够的。
introduction:
Machine-learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) enable molecular simulations with near density functional theory (DFT) accuracy at much lower cost. Early high-dimensional neural-network potentials established the basic MLIP framework for representing DFT potential-energy surfaces . Recent equivariant models such as NequIP and MACE have improved accuracy and data efficiency, while foundation models trained on broad materials datasets can be adapted to specific systems through fine-tuning . This strategy is especially attractive when the desired target level of theory is too expensive for routine molecular dynamics.

Fine-tuning MLIPs across exchange--correlation functionals remains difficult. Within Jacob's ladder of DFT , generalized-gradient approximations, meta-GGAs, and hybrid functionals form a hierarchy of increasing physical complexity and computational cost. Moving up this ladder changes not only the energy reference but also the potential energy surface, equilibrium structures, and statistical weights of configurations. Energy-alignment strategies can stabilize cross-functional transfer , but a model with low energy and force errors can still sample an incorrect equilibrium ensemble.

Here we focus on the sampling distribution of the training configurations. Conventional cross-functional workflows generate configurations using lower-level DFT or lower-level MLIPs and then relabel them at the target level . Recent cross-functional transfer studies have likewise reported that transfer toward higher-fidelity targets such as r$^2$SCAN can remain difficult even when target-level labels are available, indicating that label fidelity alone does not remove all transfer barriers . The training set is therefore effectively drawn from a lower-level distribution, whereas the target thermodynamic observables are defined by the Boltzmann distribution of the target functional,

deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出了一种基于目标分布引导的自学习混合蒙特卡洛方法，用于解决机器学习原子间势在跨泛函微调中因训练数据分布与目标泛函平衡分布不匹配而导致的关键问题。
2. 关键结论: (1) 传统的跨泛函微调常被视为重标注问题，但仅提供高精度目标泛函的标签不足以克服迁移障碍，因为训练数据的统计权重在不同泛函间会发生变化；(2) 采用目标分布引导的SLHMC工作流，通过ML势提出构型并用目标泛函DFT能量进行接受/拒绝，能生成符合目标泛函平衡分布的训练数据；(3) 以金红石TiO2为测试体系，该方法生成的适应势能更准确地复现目标泛函下的结构特性，尤其对于计算昂贵的杂化泛函HSE06，该方法能有效获取其结构热力学性质。
3. 专家点评: 这项工作敏锐地指出了当前MLIP跨精度迁移中一个被忽视但至关重要的问题——分布失配，其提出的解决方案在概念上具有清晰性和针对性。该方法为在计算昂贵的杂化泛函级别进行可靠的分子动力学模拟提供了一条实用路径，潜在影响显著。然而，该方法的计算成本主要取决于目标泛函单点计算的次数，其在大规模体系或更复杂相变过程中的普适性和效率仍需进一步验证；此外，工作主要关注结构性质，对动力学性质、缺陷形成能等更敏感性质的迁移效果有待后续研究。

title: DGLD: Domain-Gated Latent Diffusion for the Discovery of Novel Energetic Materials
abstract: Energetic-materials performance gains translate directly into reduced propellant mass, smaller warheads, and more efficient civilian gas-generators, yet no new HMX-class compound has been disclosed in fifteen years. Designing one is a sparse-label problem: of ~66 k labelled CHNO molecules only ~3 k carry experimental or DFT-quality measurements, and naive generative models trained on the full mixture either memorise the high-performance tail or extrapolate without calibration. We introduce Domain-Gated Latent Diffusion (DGLD): a label-quality gate at training time, multi-task score-model guidance at sample time, and a four-stage chemistry-validation funnel ending in first-principles DFT audit. The result is 12 DFT-confirmed novel leads. The headline compound, 3,4,5-trinitro-1,2-isoxazole (L1), reaches \r{ho}_"cal" =2.09 g/cm3 and D_"K-J,cal" =8.25 km/s and is structurally dissimilar from all 65 980 training molecules (nearest-neighbour Tanimoto 0.27). A co-headline lead, E1 (4-nitro-1,2,3,5-oxatriazole), exceeds L1 on calibrated detonation velocity (D_"K-J,cal" =9.00 km/s) from a chemotype family disjoint from L1's. DGLD is the only method to land in the productive quadrant (simultaneously novel and on-target) at DFT level. SMILES-LSTM memorises 18.3% of its outputs exactly; SELFIES-GA's best novel candidate loses 3.5 km/s under DFT audit; REINVENT 4 generates novel high-N heterocycles but peaks at D=9.02 km/s. Code, checkpoints, and 918 mined hard negatives are released on Zenodo (DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19821953); the next compound to enter the HMX-class band can be discovered, validated, and recommended for synthesis at the cost of a few GPU-days.
zh_abstract: 含能材料性能的提升可直接转化为推进剂质量减轻、弹头尺寸缩小及民用气体发生器效率提高，然而十五年来尚未公开任何新型HMX级化合物。此类设计属于稀疏标签问题：在约6.6万个标记的CHNO分子中，仅约3000个具备实验或DFT质量数据，而在全数据集上训练的原始生成模型要么记忆高性能尾部数据，要么进行无校准的外推。本文提出域控隐扩散模型（DGLD）：训练阶段采用标签质量门控机制，采样阶段引入多任务评分模型引导，并通过四阶段化学验证漏斗以第一性原理DFT审核收尾。该方法最终获得12个经DFT确认的全新先导化合物。标志性化合物3,4,5-三硝基-1,2-异噁唑（L1）达到计算密度ρ_cal=2.09 g/cm³与计算爆速D_K-J,cal=8.25 km/s，且与全部65,980个训练分子结构迥异（最近邻Tanimoto系数0.27）。另一核心先导物E1（4-硝基-1,2,3,5-氧杂三唑）在校准爆速（D_K-J,cal=9.00 km/s）上超越L1，且其化学型家族与L1完全独立。DGLD是唯一能在DFT层级同时实现新颖性与目标性产出（即落入高效象限）的方法。对比显示：SMILES-LSTM精确复现18.3%的输出；SELFIES-GA的最佳新型候选物在DFT审核中损失3.5 km/s爆速；REINVENT 4能生成新型高氮杂环但爆速峰值仅9.02 km/s。代码、检查点及918个挖掘的硬负样本已发布于Zenodo（DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19821953）；下一代HMX级化合物的发现、验证与合成推荐可在数个GPU日内完成。

title: Transformer refined quantum sampling for strongly correlated electronic structure
abstract: Although quantum computing offers a promising solution for strongly correlated system simulation, existing algorithms face significant bottlenecks on current noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) devices. Here, we introduce QiankunNet-QSCI, a hybrid quantum-classical framework that addresses this challenge by combining efficient quantum-sampling with a transformer neural network. An efficient unitary selected configuration Interaction (USCI) ansatz especially designed for quantum sampling is proposed to identify the most chemically significant electronic configurations on the Zuchongzhi 3.1 quantum processor. Subsequently, the transformer model QiankunNet learns from these sparse yet critical quantum data to infer and reconstruct the complete electronic wavefunction with high fidelity. Simulation of the challenging 40-qubit [2Fe-2S] ferredoxin active center achieves chemical accuracy. Simulation of the nitrogenase P-cluster in a 114-electron 73-orbital active space also reaches 12 milli-Hartree-level agreement with the best density matrix renormalization group (DMRG) result. QiankunNet-QSCI thus offers a practical route to accurate quantum-assisted electronic structure calculations on current devices.
zh_abstract: 尽管量子计算为强关联体系模拟提供了极具前景的解决方案，但现有算法在当前含噪声中等规模量子（NISQ）设备上面临显著瓶颈。本文提出 QiankunNet-QSCI，一种混合量子-经典框架，通过结合高效量子采样与 Transformer 神经网络来解决这一挑战。我们提出一种专为量子采样设计的高效酉选组态相互作用（USCI）拟设，在祖冲之 3.1 量子处理器上识别最具化学重要性的电子组态。随后，Transformer 模型 QiankunNet 从这些稀疏但关键的量子数据中学习，以高保真度推断并重构完整的电子波函数。对具有挑战性的 40 量子比特 [2Fe-2S] 铁氧还蛋白活性中心的模拟达到了化学精度。对固氮酶 P 簇在 114 电子 73 轨道活性空间中的模拟也与最佳密度矩阵重正化群（DMRG）结果达到了 12 毫哈特里级别的吻合。因此，QiankunNet-QSCI 为在当前设备上实现精确的量子辅助电子结构计算提供了一条实用路径。

title: Multitask learning with semiempirical orbital charges enables sample-efficient MLIPs
abstract: Machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) require generating computationally expensive, large-scale training datasets to accurately simulate materials and molecules. Incorporating electronic structure information using multitask learning improves sample efficiency, however, training on full Hamiltonian matrices, which scale quadratically with the number of atoms, is intractable for large datasets. In this work, we show that multitask learning utilizing orbitally resolved semiempirical charges significantly improves sample efficiency and accuracy in MLIPs. To efficiently predict orbital charges, we implement a specialized equivariant model, reducing charge prediction error compared to an invariant baseline. By augmenting training with computationally inexpensive GFN1-xTB orbital charges, which scale linearly with the number of atoms, our model achieves a 46\% reduction in energy mean absolute error and requires five times less data to match the performance of energy-only models. Furthermore, our approach outperforms models trained on expensive density functional theory (DFT) atomic charges, capturing orbitally resolved electronic complexity and forcing the network to learn a physically accurate latent space that spontaneously clusters metals by shared chemical properties. Because orbital charges are only required during training, this approach preserves inference efficiency, providing a scalable recipe for developing accurate, data-efficient foundation models for complex chemical systems.
zh_abstract: 机器学习原子间势（MLIPs）需要生成计算成本高昂的大规模训练数据集，以精确模拟材料和分子。通过多任务学习融入电子结构信息可提升样本效率，但直接使用完整的哈密顿矩阵进行训练（其规模随原子数呈平方增长）对于大型数据集而言难以实现。本研究证明，利用轨道分辨的半经验电荷进行多任务学习可显著提升MLIPs的样本效率和准确性。为高效预测轨道电荷，我们实现了一个专用的等变模型，相比不变基线模型降低了电荷预测误差。通过使用计算成本低廉、随原子数线性增长的GFN1-xTB轨道电荷数据增强训练，我们的模型将能量平均绝对误差降低了46%，且仅需五分之一的数据量即可达到仅使用能量训练的模型的性能。此外，我们的方法优于使用昂贵的密度泛函理论（DFT）原子电荷训练的模型，能够捕捉轨道分辨的电子复杂性，并迫使网络学习具有物理精确性的潜在空间，该空间能依据共享化学性质自发对金属进行聚类。由于轨道电荷仅在训练阶段需要，此方法保持了推理阶段的高效性，为开发面向复杂化学体系的精确、数据高效的基础模型提供了一条可扩展的路径。
introduction:
MLIPs have fundamentally transformed the landscape of computational chemistry, enabling the simulation of complex systems at length and time scales previously inaccessible to first-principles methods. By learning the underlying quantum mechanical interactions, these models are accelerating discoveries across diverse domains, from solid-state materials to drug design . However, the accuracy and transferability of MLIPs are bound by the size and quality of their training datasets. Generating this reference data using high-fidelity electronic structure methods, such as density functional theory (DFT), requires immense computational resources. For instance, constructing the recent OMol25 dataset required approximately 6.6 billion CPU hours . To mitigate this data bottleneck, multitask learning and transfer learning have emerged as powerful strategies. By training MLIPs to predict additional electronic properties, models can achieve higher sample efficiency. Recent work has demonstrated that training on the full electronic Hamiltonian drastically improves MLIP performance on the energy prediction task . Yet, because Hamiltonian matrices scale quadratically $O(N^2)$ with the number of atoms, computing, storing, and training on these massive objects is computationally intractable for large-scale or high-throughput applications.

A natural proxy for electronic structure is the distribution of charge. Due to the historical scarcity of charge labels, MLIPs have traditionally incorporated atomic charge information through the inclusion of local magnetic moments  or via classical charge equilibration schemes . While equilibration methods with quasi-linear scaling have been developed , they frequently suffer from delocalization and overpolarization errors . Multitask learning frameworks that use atomic charges have recently achieved state-of-the-art performance on purely organic systems . Extending these methods to complex organometallic molecules, which are critical for cat
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 通过引入线性标度的半经验轨道电荷作为多任务学习的辅助预测目标，在保持推理效率的同时，显著提升了机器学习原子间势（MLIP）的数据利用效率和精度。

2. 关键结论: (1) 使用GFN1-xTB方法计算的轨道电荷作为训练时的辅助任务，能使模型在能量预测上的平均绝对误差降低46%，并将达到同等性能所需的数据量减少五倍；(2) 该方法在提升样本效率方面，优于使用计算成本更高的DFT原子电荷进行多任务学习的模型；(3) 预测轨道电荷的任务迫使模型学习到更准确的物理隐空间，能自发地依据化学性质对金属原子进行聚类。

3. 专家点评: 这项工作巧妙地绕开了传统多任务学习中使用全哈密顿量（O(N^2)标度）的计算瓶颈，通过引入线性标度的半经验轨道电荷作为代理目标，在数据效率和计算成本之间取得了极佳的平衡。其核心价值在于提供了一条可扩展的路径，有望应用于构建复杂化学体系（如有机金属化合物）的高精度、数据高效的“基础模型”。然而，该方法的最终精度和泛化能力在多大程度上受限于半经验方法GFN1-xTB本身的理论近似水平，仍需在更广泛的体系上进行系统性验证，这是其潜在的局限性与未来需要关注的方向。

title: Upscaling DFT-trained machine-learning interatomic potential toward Quantum Monte Carlo accuracy: Sulfur-vacancy migration in monolayer MoS$_2$ as a testbed
abstract: We designed a procedure to train a machine learning interatomic potential (MLIP) at benchmark-quality quantum Monte Carlo (QMC) accuracy. To avoid the complexities of high-quality atomic force determination with the stochastic QMC methods, we use a multi-fidelity approach wherein high-level QMC energies are used alongside suitably processed low-level DFT atomic forces to train a QMC fine-tuned MLIP which significantly improves both the energetics and atomic forces over the baseline DFT-based MLIP. Fine-tuning is only applied to the readout layers of an equivariant message-passing MACE MLIP. We used sulfur mono- and multiple vacancies in monolayer MoS$_2$ as a testbed and demonstrate a near QMC accuracy of the model in a number of in- and out-of-domain tests. We show that a fairly limited dataset of QMC energies suffice to significantly improve the baseline DFT MLIP. The accuracy of our approach is demonstrated on energy and free energy migration barriers of mono- and multiple S-vacancy defects. The results open the window to large-scale near QMC quality simulations with large numbers of atoms and/or molecular dynamics configurations which would not be possible by a direct brute-force application of QMC methods.
zh_abstract: 我们设计了一种在基准级量子蒙特卡罗（QMC）精度下训练机器学习原子间势（MLIP）的方法。为了避免随机性QMC方法在高质量原子力确定中的复杂性，我们采用了一种多精度策略：在训练QMC精调MLIP时，结合使用高精度QMC能量与经过适当处理的低精度密度泛函理论（DFT）原子力数据。该方法显著提升了基于DFT的基准MLIP在能量学和原子力方面的表现。精调仅应用于等变消息传递MACE MLIP的读出层。我们以单层MoS$_2$中的单硫空位与多硫空位为测试平台，通过多项域内及域外测试证明了该模型接近QMC的精度。研究表明，仅需相当有限的QMC能量数据集即可显著改进基准DFT MLIP。我们通过单硫空位及多硫空位缺陷的能量与自由能迁移势垒验证了该方法的准确性。这一成果为开展大规模、接近QMC精度的大尺度原子体系及/或分子动力学模拟打开了窗口，而此类模拟通过直接暴力应用QMC方法是无法实现的。

title: Backward Mapping from Device Targets to Chemical Genomes for Interpretable Discovery of Phase-Stable Lead-Free Double Perovskites with DFT-Validated Design Rules
abstract: Lead-free halide double perovskites are promising alternatives to Pb-based semiconductors, but their discovery is challenging because structural formability, thermodynamic stability, band-gap placement, optical-transition strength, dielectric screening, and carrier transport must all be satisfied within the vast A2BB'X6 space. We present a backward-mapping, genome-guided framework linking device-level targets to chemically interpretable descriptor families for Pb-free double-perovskite discovery. From 13,088 charge-balanced compositions, we apply a halide-aware workflow integrating geometric formability filtering, six-family chemical-genome descriptor encoding, evolutionary-optimized machine learning surrogates, SHAP-based interpretation, and DFT phenotype closure. Stability is modeled using Ehull-derived labels, while a band-gap surrogate predicts scalar-relativistic PBE Eg for target-driven selection. The funnel reduces the search space to seven DFT-validated candidates: K2BePdF6, K2MnCdCl6, Rb2TeCuBr6, Cs2SnGeBr6, Cs2GeSrBr6, Cs2NiBaI6, and Cs2AgInCl6, all verified for structural assignability, band-edge character, effective masses, dielectric response, optical absorption, conductivity, reflectivity, energy-loss spectra, and XRD fingerprints. Functional rules emerge from stability-function coupling rather than band-gap optimization alone, providing an interpretable inverse-design paradigm to accelerate Pb-free double-perovskite discovery.
zh_abstract: 无铅卤化物双钙钛矿是铅基半导体的有前景的替代材料，但其发现极具挑战，因为必须在广阔的A2BB'X6空间中同时满足结构可成形性、热力学稳定性、带隙位置、光学跃迁强度、介电屏蔽和载流子传输等要求。我们提出了一种逆向映射、基因组引导的框架，该框架将器件级目标与化学上可解释的描述符族联系起来，用于无铅双钙钛矿的发现。从13,088个电荷平衡的组分出发，我们应用了一个包含卤素感知的工作流程，该流程整合了几何可成形性过滤、六族化学基因组描述符编码、进化优化的机器学习代理模型、基于SHAP的解释以及DFT表型闭合。我们使用Ehull衍生的标签对稳定性进行建模，同时利用带隙代理模型预测标量相对论PBE Eg，以进行目标驱动的筛选。该漏斗流程将搜索空间缩减至七个经DFT验证的候选材料：K2BePdF6、K2MnCdCl6、Rb2TeCuBr6、Cs2SnGeBr6、Cs2GeSrBr6、Cs2NiBaI6和Cs2AgInCl6，所有这些材料均验证了结构可指认性、带边特征、有效质量、介电响应、光吸收、电导率、反射率、能量损失谱以及XRD指纹。功能规则源于稳定性与功能的耦合，而非仅仅基于带隙优化，这为加速无铅双钙钛矿的发现提供了一个可解释的逆向设计范式。

title: Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials: Advancing Open-Source Software for Efficient and Scalable Molecular Simulation
abstract: Machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) enable atomistic simulations with near ab initio accuracy at significantly reduced computational cost, but their broader adoption is often limited by fragmented tooling, limited scalability, and inflexible software design. We present mlip v2, a new generation of the mlip library that advances efficient and scalable molecular simulation through a unified and extensible framework. The new release features a targeted API redesign with improved modularity and control, enabling flexible customization of training, data processing, and simulation workflows. It further integrates a new high-performance backend for equivariant operations, e3j, significantly accelerating model inference and simulations. In addition, the framework introduces a range of entirely new capabilities, including the eSEN architecture with a Mixture-of-Experts formulation for scalable training on large and diverse datasets, improved handling of electrostatics through more physically grounded charge modeling and long-range interaction treatment, and advanced simulation features such as NPT ensembles and nudged elastic band methods. Together, these extensions significantly broaden the scope of MLIP applications, enabling efficient modeling of complex, reactive, and out-of-equilibrium systems, and bridging the gap between ML research and practical molecular simulation applications. The library is available on GitHub and on PyPI under the Apache license 2.0.
zh_abstract: 机器学习原子间势（MLIPs）能够以接近从头算的精度进行原子尺度模拟，同时显著降低计算成本，但其更广泛的应用常受限于工具分散、可扩展性有限以及软件设计不够灵活。我们推出了 mlip v2，这是 mlip 库的新一代版本，通过一个统一且可扩展的框架，推进高效、可扩展的分子模拟。新版本进行了针对性的 API 重新设计，增强了模块化和可控性，能够灵活定制训练、数据处理和模拟工作流。它还集成了一个用于等变操作的新型高性能后端 e3j，显著加速了模型推理和模拟。此外，该框架引入了一系列全新的功能，包括采用专家混合（Mixture-of-Experts）架构的 eSEN 模型，用于在大型多样化数据集上进行可扩展训练；通过物理基础更强的电荷建模和长程相互作用处理，改进了静电学处理；以及先进的模拟功能，如 NPT 系综和推弹性能带方法。这些扩展共同显著拓宽了 MLIP 的应用范围，使得对复杂、反应性和非平衡系统的高效建模成为可能，并弥合了机器学习研究与实际分子模拟应用之间的差距。该库已在 GitHub 和 PyPI 上发布，采用 Apache 2.0 许可证。

title: LLM-driven design of physics-constrained constitutive models: two agents are better than one
abstract: Developing constitutive models that capture how materials deform under load traditionally requires years of specialized expertise in continuum mechanics, machine learning, and scientific programming. Large language models (LLMs) have recently been shown to lower this barrier by generating constitutive models on demand, but existing single-agent pipelines lack systematic checks that the resulting models respect fundamental physical laws. To close this gap, we introduce the first multi-agent LLM-driven approach for constitutive model generation: a Creator agent proposes a model tailored to the data, while an Inspector agent critically audits each proposal against nine physical constraints and returns it for refinement whenever a violation is detected. We demonstrate this concept with constitutive artificial neural networks (CANNs) and benchmark it on brain tissue, experimental rubber, and synthetic rubber, using two different LLM backbones (Claude Opus 4.7 and Kimi K2.5). Adding the Inspector raises the share of exported models that truly satisfy all physical constraints from 91% to a perfect 100% for Opus and from 37% to 56% for Kimi, while preserving near-baseline accuracy and remarkable generalization to unseen loading paths. In combination, the generated models are physically valid, highly accurate, and extrapolate reliably beyond the training data - properties that together make them directly usable in practice. Separating generation from inspection thus turns LLM-driven constitutive modeling into a genuinely trustworthy process. The paradigm is deliberately technique-agnostic and scales automatically with advances in LLM capability, opening a promising path toward automated, physics-aware model discovery.
zh_abstract: 开发能够捕捉材料在载荷下变形行为的本构模型，传统上需要多年在连续介质力学、机器学习和科学编程方面的专业积累。最近研究表明，大语言模型（LLMs）能够按需生成本构模型，从而降低这一门槛，但现有的单智能体流程缺乏系统性检查，无法确保生成的模型遵循基本物理定律。为弥补这一不足，我们首次提出了一种多智能体LLM驱动的本构模型生成方法：一个创建者智能体根据数据提出定制化模型，而一个审查者智能体则依据九项物理约束对每个提案进行严格审核，并在检测到违规时将其返回修改。我们通过本构人工神经网络（CANNs）演示了这一概念，并使用两种不同的LLM骨干模型（Claude Opus 4.7 和 Kimi K2.5）在脑组织、实验橡胶和合成橡胶数据上进行了基准测试。引入审查者智能体后，最终导出的模型完全满足所有物理约束的比例，在Opus上从91%提升至完美的100%，在Kimi上从37%提升至56%，同时保持了接近基线水平的精度，并对未见过的加载路径表现出卓越的泛化能力。综合来看，所生成的模型具有物理有效性、高精度以及超出训练数据的可靠外推能力——这些特性共同使其可直接应用于实践。因此，将生成与审查分离，使LLM驱动的本构建模成为一个真正可信赖的过程。该范式刻意保持技术无关性，并能随LLM能力的进步自动扩展，为迈向自动化、物理感知的模型发现开辟了一条充满前景的道路。

title: Self-Refining Topology Optimization via an LLM-Based Multi-Agent Framework
abstract: Topology optimization is a widely used design method that produces optimized material distributions for prescribed objectives and constraints through well-established numerical algorithms. Throughout the workflow, engineers make a series of decisions ranging from setting and adjusting numerical parameters to assessing whether the converged design meets considerations beyond those explicitly included in the optimization problem, such as physical feasibility. These decisions, which draw on domain expertise, interfere with the autonomous design process. To address this difficulty, this study presents TopOptAgents, a multi-agent system for automating not only the design process but also decision-making during the key stages of the topology optimization process. TopOptAgents consists of six LLM-based agents collaborating through iterative self-refinement cycles spanning problem formulation, validation, code generation and execution, and quality assessment of the optimized structure. This process enables error correction and progressive improvement of both the optimization setup and resulting design. The framework is demonstrated on optimization problems selected to cover a range of settings that differ in their literature coverage and numerical characteristics The benefits of iterative self-refinement are found to be particularly pronounced for problem classes where the pretrained language model has limited prior exposure, such as formulations whose literature and open-source implementations are comparatively sparse. In such cases, the proposed framework reliably produces converged designs where a single state-of-the-art LLM struggles, suggesting that self-refinement broadens the range of topology optimization problems that LLM-based automation can reliably address.
zh_abstract: 拓扑优化是一种广泛应用的设计方法，它通过成熟的数值算法为预设的目标和约束条件生成优化的材料分布。在整个工作流程中，工程师需要做出一系列决策，包括设定和调整数值参数，以及评估收敛后的设计是否满足优化问题中未明确包含的考量（例如物理可行性）。这些依赖于领域专业知识的决策，干扰了自主设计过程。为解决这一难题，本研究提出了TopOptAgents，一个多智能体系统，旨在自动化拓扑优化过程中的关键阶段，不仅包括设计过程，还包括决策制定。TopOptAgents由六个基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能体组成，它们通过迭代式的自我优化循环进行协作，涵盖问题表述、验证、代码生成与执行，以及优化结构的质量评估。这一过程实现了对优化设置和最终设计的错误修正与渐进式改进。该框架在选定的优化问题上进行了演示，这些问题覆盖了一系列文献覆盖度和数值特性各不相同的场景。研究发现，迭代式自我优化的优势在预训练语言模型先前接触有限的问题类别中尤为明显，例如那些文献和开源实现相对较少的表述形式。在这种情况下，所提出的框架能够可靠地产生收敛的设计，而单一的最先进大语言模型则难以应对，这表明自我优化扩展了基于大语言模型的自动化技术能够可靠处理的拓扑优化问题的范围。

title: TriForces: Augmenting Atomistic GNNs for Transferable Representations
abstract: Machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) achieve excellent accuracy when trained on large Density Functional Theory (DFT) data. To be useful in practice, they must often be adapted to target chemistries using small and expensive task-specific datasets. However, MLIPs transfer inconsistently across domains, with representations that often loose accessible composition and structure information. To address this, we present TriForces, a model-agnostic three-stream framework that separates composition and structure information, combined with self-supervised learning to preserve transferable representations. TriForces improves performance on MatBench and QM9 over baselines without needing DFT labels and enables efficient similar structure retrieval through its learned latent space. On OMat24, in limited-data training regime, TriForces reduces energy MAE by 57% at 20K samples only and improves force MAE across sample sizes. We release pretrained TriForces variants across multiple MLIP architectures with code at https://github.com/Ramlaoui/triforces.
zh_abstract: 机器学习原子间势（MLIPs）在基于大量密度泛函理论（DFT）数据进行训练时能够达到优异的精度。在实际应用中，它们通常需要利用小型且计算成本高昂的特定任务数据集来适应目标化学体系。然而，MLIPs在不同领域间的迁移表现不稳定，其表征常常丢失可获取的成分与结构信息。为解决这一问题，我们提出了TriForces——一个与模型无关的三流框架，该框架将成分信息与结构信息分离，并结合自监督学习以保持可迁移的表征。TriForces在MatBench和QM9数据集上的表现优于基线方法，且无需DFT标签，同时通过其学习到的潜在空间实现了高效的相似结构检索。在OMat24数据集上，在有限数据训练条件下，TriForces仅用2万个样本就将能量平均绝对误差降低了57%，并在不同样本规模下均提升了力的平均绝对误差。我们发布了基于多种MLIP架构的预训练TriForces模型变体，代码公开于https://github.com/Ramlaoui/triforces。
introduction:
Density functional theory (DFT)~ provides a computational model to obtain atomistic properties like energies and forces, but remains expensive, typically scaling as $(n^3)$ with the number of electrons~. Fueled by large-scale DFT datasets~, geometric Graph Neural Networks (GNNs)~ now achieve remarkable accuracy on property prediction tasks. Such Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials (MLIPs) can drive simulations and materials discovery workflows~ through geometry optimization, molecular dynamics, and exploration of reaction pathways~.

However, the diversity and complexity of chemical systems require frequent adaptation of models to new properties, systems and DFT functionals, often using small costly task-specific datasets. Retraining from scratch is computationally expensive and does not transfer learned representations, while fine-tuning involves many parameters and often leads to catastrophic forgetting~. We find that MLIPs pre-trained on 100M structures can fail to fine-tune even on simple diagnostic tasks, such as identifying the crystal system or predicting the majority element in a structure's composition (App.~).
Transfer performance also varies substantially across tasks and benchmarks~, and practical choices, such as which layers to fine-tune~, how much data to use, or which pretrained model to start from, can significantly affect outcomes~.


A second limitation points to the same underlying issue: current MLIPs learn representations optimized for prediction rather than for reuse. In other domains, self-supervised learning (SSL) has shown that representations can preserve semantic structure enabling nearest-neighbour retrieval in embedding space for exploratory analysis~. Such retrieval also offers practical advantage in materials science for comparing candidates and exploring structure-property relationships~. By contrast, training to regress energies and forces encourages representations sufficient for those targets but not organized to preserve c
conclusion: We introduced TriForces, a model‑agnostic three‑stream augmentation combined with multi-objective self supervised pretraining that consistently improves accuracy, data efficiency, and interpretability across datasets and backbones (Orb‑v3, eSEN, MACE). Its plug‑in design makes it immediately applicable to new or modality‑specific architectures while enabling chemistry and structure‑aware retrieval. We released pretrained checkpoints and training recipes to support reuse and further study in downstream atomistic modeling.
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出了一个模型无关的三流框架（TriForces），通过分离化学组成与结构信息并结合自监督学习，旨在解决现有机器学习原子间势能模型在跨领域迁移时表征信息丢失和迁移性能不稳定的根本问题。

2. 关键结论: (1) TriForces框架通过分离组成与结构信息流，并结合自监督目标，能有效保留可迁移的表征信息，提升模型在有限目标任务数据下的性能；(2) 该方法在MatBench、QM9和OMat24等多个基准测试上，特别是在小样本（如20K数据点）微调场景下，显著降低了能量和力的预测误差（如OMat24上能量MAE降低57%）；(3) 学习到的潜在空间支持高效的相似结构检索，为材料探索和分析提供了新工具。

3. 专家点评: 这项工作直面了MLIPs从大规模预训练走向实际应用的核心瓶颈——表征的可迁移性与数据效率，其提出的信息分离思想具有深刻的洞察力。将自监督学习与特定的物理先验（组成/结构分离）相结合，是提升科学机器学习模型泛化能力和可解释性的一条有前景的路径。然而，该分析主要基于现有基准数据集，其在实际、复杂且分布外（OOD）的化学空间或极端条件下的迁移鲁棒性仍有待更严苛的验证；此外，三流设计带来的计算开销与性能增益的权衡，以及其对于不同基干网络架构的普适性深度，也需要在更广泛的实践中进行评估。

title: Dataset-aware entropy-maximized active learning for machine-learned interatomic potentials
abstract: We present an active learning framework for efficiently generating training data for machine-learned interatomic potentials (MLIPs). The method combines local entropy-driven molecular dynamics with global dataset-aware filtering: a per-configuration entropy term biases MD trajectories toward structurally diverse snapshots, while a global entropy measure, the log-determinant of the fingerprint covariance matrix of the entire dataset, selects only those configurations that provide genuinely new information. We employ dual covariance modes (per-atom for disordered structures and per-config for ordered phases) to achieve broad coverage of configuration space. Combined with a pre-trained foundation model (Allegro-OAM-L) and analytical fingerprint gradients from Gaussian overlap matrix eigenvalues, the framework produces high-quality domain-specific potentials with near- or sub-meV/atom accuracy on test data drawn from the same distribution at training-set sizes of order $10^{2}$ to $10^{3}$ entropy-selected DFT-labeled structures. We demonstrate the method on three systems spanning diverse bonding types and pressure-driven phase transitions: carbon (covalent), silicon (covalent/metallic), and NaCl (ionic). In learning curve comparisons against random molecular dynamics sampling at matched training set sizes ($N = 100$ to $800$), evaluated over three independent training-set draws per condition, entropy-driven sampling achieves a factor of approximately $3$ to $10$ lower energy MAE at $N = 800$ on in-distribution holdouts across the three systems, with the magnitude of the gain depending on the bonding type and the size at which the random-MD baseline saturates.
zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种主动学习框架，用于高效生成机器学习原子间势（MLIPs）的训练数据。该方法将局域熵驱动的分子动力学与全局数据集感知过滤相结合：基于每个构型的熵项将分子动力学轨迹偏向结构多样的快照，而全局熵度量——整个数据集指纹协方差矩阵的对数行列式——则筛选出那些能提供真正新信息的构型。我们采用双协方差模式（针对无序结构的每原子模式和针对有序相的每构型模式），以实现对构型空间的广泛覆盖。结合预训练的基础模型（Allegro-OAM-L）以及来自高斯重叠矩阵特征值的解析指纹梯度，该框架能够生成高质量的领域专用势，在训练集规模约为$10^{2}$至$10^{3}$个熵筛选的DFT标记结构时，对来自相同分布的测试数据达到近meV/atom或亚meV/atom的精度。我们在三种涵盖不同键合类型和压力驱动相变的体系上验证了该方法：碳（共价键）、硅（共价/金属键）和氯化钠（离子键）。在与随机分子动力学采样进行的学习曲线比较中（训练集规模匹配，$N = 100$至$800$，每种条件基于三个独立训练集抽取进行评估），熵驱动采样在三个体系的分布内保留测试集上，于$N = 800$时实现了约$3$至$10$倍更低的能量平均绝对误差（MAE），增益幅度取决于键合类型以及随机分子动力学基线达到饱和时的数据规模。
introduction:
Machine-learned interatomic potentials (MLIPs) have emerged as a powerful approach to atomistic simulation, achieving near-ab initio accuracy at a fraction of the computational cost~.
Modern MLIPs span a spectrum of architectures and representations: high-dimensional neural networks built on atom-centered symmetry functions~, Gaussian approximation potentials~ with smooth-overlap-of-atomic-positions~ or atomic-cluster-expansion~ descriptors, deep-learning packages such as SchNet~ and DeePMD-kit~, and message-passing equivariant neural networks including NequIP~, MACE~, and Allegro~ have collectively established the modern accuracy and efficiency trade-off for element-specific models.
Recent universal foundation models, including MACE-MP-0~, CHGNet~, MatterSim~, GNoME~, and Allegro-OAM-L~, have demonstrated impressive transferability across the periodic table.
However, for quantitative studies of specific materials under targeted conditions, particularly at high pressures where training data are sparse, fine-tuning on domain-specific density functional theory (DFT) data remains essential.

The central challenge in MLIP training is generating a diverse and compact training set.
Random sampling of molecular dynamics (MD) trajectories produces highly correlated structures, requiring thousands of DFT calculations to adequately cover configuration space.
Entropy-maximized sampling~ addresses this by adding a diversity-driving term to the potential energy surface, but the original per-configuration formulation suffers from self-averaging: independently generated configurations are individually diverse but collectively redundant.

Several active learning strategies have been developed for MLIPs.
Concurrent learning frameworks such as DP-GEN~ use committee disagreement among an ensemble of models to identify uncertain configurations during MD exploration, triggering on-the-fly DFT labeling and retraining; committee-based neural network potentials more broadly~ apply the s
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新：提出了一种结合局部构型熵驱动与全局数据集感知过滤的双重熵最大化主动学习框架，并创新性地引入了基于原子指纹协方差矩阵行列式的全局熵度量与双协方差模式，以高效生成用于机器学习势函数训练的数据集。

2. 关键结论：该方法通过局部熵偏差驱动分子动力学采样与全局指纹协方差行列式过滤相结合，能有效选择信息量最大的构型；针对无序和有序相分别采用每原子和每构型协方差模式，实现了对构型空间的广泛覆盖；在碳、硅、氯化钠三个体系中，相比随机采样，该方法在相同训练集规模下（如N=800）能将能量平均绝对误差降低约3到10倍。

3. 专家点评：该工作将主动学习从传统的“不确定性采样”范式推进到“信息量最大化”范式，其全局数据集感知过滤机制是解决构型冗余问题的关键理论进展，对高压等数据稀疏领域的高效势函数构建具有重要价值。然而，其性能增益高度依赖于初始预训练基础模型（如Allegro-OAM-L）的质量与覆盖度，且全局熵计算的计算复杂度随数据集增长而增加，可能限制其向超大规模主动学习任务的扩展。

title: Direct Simulation of LiNi0.8Mn0.1Co0.1O2 Transport Properties Using an Efficient and Accurate Machine Learning Potential
abstract: The rate capability of layered lithium nickel manganese cobalt oxide (NMC) cathode materials plays a decisive role in high-power applications such as fast charging, necessitating a detailed understanding of lithium-ion diffusion. However, the mechanisms governing lithium-ion transport in NMC remain insufficiently understood, both experimentally and computationally. In this study, we employ an advanced and efficient machine learning potential (MLP) to simulate lithium self-diffusion in LiNi0.8Mn0.1Co0.1O2 (NMC811), enabling direct large-scale molecular dynamics (MD) simulations. The workflow integrates a fine-tuned MACE (Message Passing Atomic Cluster Expansion) foundation model as a structural generator and leverages an active learning strategy applied to a near-ground-state dataset. This approach enables the construction of a reliable MLP for NMC811 in a data-efficient manner using a limited number of density functional theory (DFT) reference calculations. Based on this potential, we performed MD simulations to predict lithium diffusion coefficients. The MLP-based simulations preserve the accuracy of DFT while overcoming its time and length scale limitations, thereby allowing direct simulation of lithium self-diffusion in NMC811.
zh_abstract: 层状锂镍锰钴氧化物（NMC）正极材料的倍率性能在快速充电等高功率应用中起着决定性作用，这需要深入理解锂离子扩散机制。然而，目前无论通过实验还是计算手段，对NMC中锂离子传输机制的理解仍然不足。在本研究中，我们采用一种先进高效的机器学习势函数（MLP）来模拟LiNi0.8Mn0.1Co0.1O2（NMC811）中的锂自扩散，从而实现了直接的大规模分子动力学（MD）模拟。该工作流程集成了经过微调的MACE（Message Passing Atomic Cluster Expansion）基础模型作为结构生成器，并利用应用于近基态数据集的主动学习策略。这种方法能够以数据高效的方式，通过有限数量的密度泛函理论（DFT）参考计算，为NMC811构建可靠的MLP。基于此势函数，我们进行了MD模拟以预测锂离子扩散系数。基于MLP的模拟在保持DFT精度的同时，克服了其在时间和空间尺度上的限制，从而实现了对NMC811中锂自扩散的直接模拟。

title: Atomistic Modeling of Chemical Disorder in Materials: Bridging Classical Methods and AI-Assisted Approaches
abstract: Chemical disorder, originating from the mixed occupation of crystallographic sites by multiple elements, is widespread in alloys, ceramics, and compositionally complex materials, where short- and long-range orderings can strongly influence properties. A central obstacle is the representation gap between experiments and simulations: experiments often report disorder as partial occupancies and ensemble-averaged behaviors, whereas atomistic simulations and AI workflows usually require fully specified configurations. Tackling this gap requires computational methods that convert averaged disorder descriptions into representative configurational ensembles while balancing cost, bias, and fidelity. This challenge has become more urgent in AI-driven computational discovery, where ignoring disorder may cause AI workflows to misrank stability, misjudge novelty, and misdirect experiments with too-idealized representations. This Review highlights how classical and AI-driven methods can bridge this representation gap. We assess the strengths and limitations of approaches spanning mean-field theories, cluster expansion, quasi-random approximations, Monte Carlo, and emerging schemes powered by universal interatomic potentials and generative models. We further highlight how AI can accelerate classical computational schemes by lowering the cost of microstate evaluation, configurational exploration, and atomistic-to-thermodynamic closure. We also emphasize how AI can enable disorder-native capabilities, including workflow triage, ordering-sensitive and alchemical representations, generative models of disordered structures and distributions, and kinetics-aware disorder prediction. Together, this framework outlines a practical roadmap toward disorder-native AI, which can transform chemical disorder from a representational obstacle into a controllable variable for realistic AI-accelerated materials discovery.
zh_abstract: 化学无序，源于多种元素在晶体学位点上的混合占据，广泛存在于合金、陶瓷和成分复杂的材料中，其短程与长程有序度可强烈影响材料性质。一个核心障碍在于实验与模拟之间的表征鸿沟：实验通常以部分占位和系综平均行为来报告无序，而原子尺度模拟和人工智能工作流通常需要完全明确的构型配置。弥合这一鸿沟需要计算方法，能够将平均化的无序描述转化为具有代表性的构型系综，同时权衡计算成本、偏差与保真度。在人工智能驱动的计算发现中，这一挑战变得更为紧迫，因为忽略无序可能导致AI工作流错误评估稳定性、误判新颖性，并基于过于理想化的表征误导实验。本综述重点阐述了经典方法与人工智能驱动方法如何弥合这一表征鸿沟。我们评估了包括平均场理论、团簇展开、准随机近似、蒙特卡洛方法，以及由通用原子间势和生成模型驱动的新兴方案在内的多种方法的优势与局限。我们进一步强调，AI如何通过降低微观状态评估、构型探索以及从原子尺度到热力学闭合的计算成本，来加速经典计算方案。我们还强调AI如何实现原生处理无序的能力，包括工作流分流、有序度敏感与元素置换表征、无序结构与分布的生成模型，以及考虑动力学的无序预测。总之，该框架为迈向“无序原生AI”描绘了一条实用路线图，从而能够将化学无序从一个表征障碍，转变为现实AI加速材料发现中一个可控变量。

title: Qumus: Realization of An Embodied AI Quantum Material Experimentalist
abstract: While modern Large Language Models (LLMs) and agentic artificial intelligence (AI) have demonstrated transformative capabilities in digital domains, the realization of embodied AI capable of real-world scientific discovery remains a difficult frontier. The advancements are hindered by the inherent complexity of integrating high-level reasoning, multimodal information processing and real-time physical execution. Here we introduce Qumus, the first AI quantum materials experimentalist. Physically embodied within a robotic mini-laboratory, Qumus is an intelligent, multimodal, and multi-agent system designed for the creation and nano-processing of atomically thin two-dimensional (2D) materials and stacked van der Waals (vdW) structures. Qumus autonomously navigates the full scientific cycle, from hypothesis generation and protocol planning to multi-step experimental execution, result analysis and reporting, acting as an experimentalist. Markedly, the system has achieved, for the first time, the AI-creation of graphene, as well as the first AI-fabrication of complex nanodevices including atomically thin field-effect transistors via vdW stacking. Qumus excels at these tasks by demonstrating autonomous error correction and closed-loop experimentation. Our results establish a generalizable framework for self-improving embodied AI systems that learn directly from the quantum world, opening a pathway toward accelerated discovery in quantum materials, electronics and beyond.
zh_abstract: 尽管现代大语言模型（LLM）与智能体人工智能（AI）已在数字领域展现出变革性能力，但实现能够在现实世界进行科学发现的具身AI仍然是一个艰巨的前沿课题。其进展受到整合高层次推理、多模态信息处理与实时物理执行等固有复杂性的制约。在此，我们介绍Qumus，首个AI量子材料实验科学家。该系统物理实体化于一个机器人微型实验室中，是一个智能、多模态、多智能体系统，专为原子级薄二维（2D）材料及堆叠范德华（vdW）结构的制备与纳米加工而设计。Qumus能够自主完成从假设生成、实验方案规划，到多步骤实验执行、结果分析与报告的全科学周期，扮演着实验科学家的角色。尤为显著的是，该系统首次实现了AI自主制备石墨烯，并首次通过AI制造了包括基于范德华堆叠的原子级薄场效应晶体管在内的复杂纳米器件。Qumus通过展示自主纠错与闭环实验能力，在这些任务中表现出色。我们的研究成果为一种可推广的、能够直接从量子世界学习的自我改进型具身AI系统建立了框架，为量子材料、电子学及其他领域的加速发现开辟了道路。

title: DynaMate2: Democratization of Agentic AI for Expert-Designed Custom Workflows
abstract: Scientific workflows in computational chemistry and materials science typically involve multiple interdependent steps, such as model preparation, system construction, simulation execution, and data analysis, that researchers have refined over the years into highly specialized, validated codebases. While large language model (LLM) agent frameworks have demonstrated the potential to automate such workflows, existing systems are built for specific, pre-defined task sequences. Adapting them to new domains or integrating custom expert-developed tools requires substantial programming expertise, which limits their adoption across the broader scientific community. Here we present DynaMate2, a hierarchical agentic framework and open-source template whose central design goal is to lower the barrier for any researcher to convert their existing expert-defined Python functions into AI-callable tools within a supervised multi-agent pipeline. The key design principle is that the LLM is never asked to generate scientific code since all domain logic resides in expert-defined tools. The LLMs sole responsibility is to route tasks, select the appropriate tool, and use outputs to guide subsequent actions. Tools and agents can be registered at runtime from inline code, existing source files, or plain-language descriptions, and all extensions persist automatically across sessions. We demonstrate the framework through an end-to-end molecular dynamics workflow. We provide a Tool Registration Protocol that guides researchers step-by-step through the process of integrating their validated code into the framework. DynaMate2 is released as an open-source reference implementation with a web-based interface and is designed to serve as a reusable template for community-driven extension across arbitrary scientific domains.
zh_abstract: 计算化学和材料科学领域的科学工作流通常涉及多个相互依赖的步骤，例如模型准备、系统构建、模拟执行和数据分析。研究人员多年来已将这类流程优化为高度专业化、经过验证的代码库。虽然大型语言模型（LLM）智能体框架已展现出自动化此类工作流的潜力，但现有系统通常针对特定、预定义的任务序列构建。将其适配到新领域或集成专家开发的自定义工具需要大量编程专业知识，这限制了其在更广泛科学界的应用。本文介绍 DynaMate2，一个分层智能体框架和开源模板，其核心设计目标是降低研究者将现有专家定义的 Python 函数转化为可在受监督的多智能体流程中由 AI 调用的工具的难度。关键设计原则是：由于所有领域逻辑都封装在专家定义的工具中，因此从不要求 LLM 生成科学代码。LLM 的唯一职责是路由任务、选择合适的工具，并利用输出来指导后续操作。工具和智能体可在运行时通过内联代码、现有源文件或自然语言描述进行注册，且所有扩展内容会在会话间自动持久化。我们通过一个端到端的分子动力学工作流来演示该框架。我们提供了一套工具注册协议，逐步指导研究者将已验证代码集成到框架中。DynaMate2 作为开源参考实现发布，提供基于 Web 的界面，旨在成为可复用的模板，以支持社区在任意科学领域进行扩展。

title: LEAP: A closed-loop framework for perovskite precursor additive discovery
abstract: Efficient discovery of precursor additives is essential for improving the performance of perovskite solar cells, yet the large chemical space makes conventional trial-and-error screening inefficient. We develop LEAP(LLM-driven Exploration via Active Learning for Perovskites), an expert-in-the-loop closed framework that couples a domain-specialized large language model(LLM) with active learning for iterative additive prioritization. The LLM is trained to extract mechanism-relevant knowledge from the perovskite additive literature and to represent candidate molecules through interpretable descriptors, which are further integrated into a Bayesian optimization workflow for uncertainty-aware prioritization under low-data conditions. Benchmark results on unseen literature show that the domain-specialized model outperforms general-purpose models in mechanism-consistent reasoning. Experimental validation in an expert-in-the-loop proof-of-concept study suggests improved additive prioritization across three screening rounds, leading to average device PCEs of 20.13% and 20.87% for the later-round 6-CDQ- and 2-CNA-treated devices, respectively, compared with 19.25% for the control, with a champion PCE of 21.32%. These results provide preliminary evidence that literature-grounded mechanistic descriptors, when coupled with Bayesian optimization and expert feasibility review, can support mechanism-aware additive prioritization in perovskite photovoltaics.
zh_abstract: 高效发现前驱体添加剂对于提升钙钛矿太阳能电池性能至关重要，然而巨大的化学空间使得传统的试错筛选效率低下。我们开发了LEAP（钙钛矿领域基于主动学习的LLM驱动探索框架），这是一个专家在环的闭环框架，将领域专用大语言模型（LLM）与主动学习相结合，实现迭代式添加剂优先级排序。该LLM经过训练，能够从钙钛矿添加剂文献中提取与机理相关的知识，并通过可解释描述符表征候选分子，这些描述符进一步整合到贝叶斯优化工作流中，实现在低数据条件下的不确定性感知优先级排序。在未见文献上的基准测试结果表明，该领域专用模型在机理一致性推理方面优于通用模型。一项专家在环概念验证研究的实验验证表明，经过三轮筛选，添加剂优先级排序得到改善：在后续轮次中，经6-CDQ和2-CNA处理的器件平均光电转换效率（PCE）分别达到20.13%和20.87%，而对照组为19.25%，最高效率达到21.32%。这些结果初步证明，基于文献的机理描述符与贝叶斯优化及专家可行性评估相结合，能够为钙钛矿光伏领域实现机理感知的添加剂优先级排序提供支持。

title: Structure of Molten FeCl2 and FeCl3
abstract: Molten iron chlorides are central to emerging energy technologies, including electrochemical iron production and redox flow batteries. Optimizing their electrochemical performance and transport properties requires atomic-scale structural understanding, yet detailed data for molten FeCl2 and its differences from FeCl3 remain scarce. Here, we determined the structures of molten FeCl2 and FeCl3 using High Energy X-ray diffraction (HEXRD), Empirical Potential Structure Refinement (EPSR), and molecular dynamics (MD) simulations with machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs). HEXRD measurements provided structure factors and total radial distribution functions (RDFs), which were quantitatively reproduced through EPSR refinement directly constrained by experimental data. MD simulations using MACE foundation and fine-tuned models reproduced experimental structure factors as well as total and partial RDFs, capturing key structural differences between the melts. The models resolved the octahedral to tetrahedral coordination transition of Fe upon melting in FeCl3 and predicted a similar transition in FeCl2. Analysis of MD trajectories quantified coordination environments, bridging Cl populations, bond-angle distributions, and connectivity patterns, revealing distinct degrees of polymerization and local geometry. Polymer chain statistics further showed that, contrary to prior reports, both liquids predominantly consist of extended chains containing six or more Fe centers rather than discrete Fe2Cl6 units. Finally, diffusion coefficients of the two melts calculated from the MACE-MD simulations were compared. Together, these results establish atomic-scale structural benchmarks for molten FeCl2 and FeCl3 and demonstrate the reliability of MACE-based MLIPs for predictive modeling of high-temperature molten salts, while providing practical guidance for MLIP development in complex ionic liquids.
zh_abstract: 熔融氯化铁是新兴能源技术（包括电化学铁生产和氧化还原液流电池）的核心。优化其电化学性能和传输特性需要原子尺度的结构理解，然而，关于熔融FeCl2及其与FeCl3差异的详细数据仍然匮乏。本研究利用高能X射线衍射（HEXRD）、经验势结构精修（EPSR）以及采用机器学习原子间势（MLIPs）的分子动力学（MD）模拟，确定了熔融FeCl2和FeCl3的结构。HEXRD测量提供了结构因子和总径向分布函数（RDFs），这些数据通过受实验数据直接约束的EPSR精修得到了定量再现。使用MACE基础模型和微调模型进行的MD模拟，重现了实验结构因子以及总RDFs和偏RDFs，捕捉了两种熔体之间的关键结构差异。模型解析了FeCl3熔化时Fe从八面体到四面体配位的转变，并预测FeCl2中存在类似转变。对MD轨迹的分析量化了配位环境、桥连Cl数量、键角分布和连接模式，揭示了不同的聚合程度和局部几何结构。聚合物链统计进一步表明，与先前报道相反，两种液体主要由包含六个或更多Fe中心的长链构成，而非离散的Fe2Cl6单元。最后，比较了基于MACE-MD模拟计算的两种熔体的扩散系数。总之，这些结果为熔融FeCl2和FeCl3建立了原子尺度的结构基准，证明了基于MACE的MLIPs用于高温熔盐预测建模的可靠性，同时为复杂离子液体中的MLIP开发提供了实用指导。

title: Reweighting free energy profiles between universal machine learning interatomic potentials for fast consensus building
abstract: Free energy profiles serve as a fundamental bridge between microscopic atomic fluctuations and macroscopic thermodynamic observables. Estimating the free energy profile along a reaction coordinate, referred to as the potential of mean force (PMF), with density functional theory (DFT) accuracy is computationally expensive. Universal machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) drastically reduce this cost, but their accuracy is strongly determined by their training data and hence can be uncertain for a given system. In this work, we present a systematic and scalable framework for reweighting PMFs, initially sampled with a single 'source' MLIP, across a representative suite of target MLIPs. Because traditional direct exponential reweighting fails for large system sizes due to low phase-space overlap between potentials, we deploy robust analytical corrections. Applying this to a complex 601-atom system of Li$^+$ transport in a nanoconfined electrolyte, we demonstrate that a mean energy-gap approximation effectively bypasses statistical collapse, producing a highly stable PMF matching the target PMF. Using this approach, we recover high-fidelity target thermodynamics across multiple DFT reference levels (PBE+D3, PBE-sol, r$^2$SCAN,r$^2$SCAN-D4) at a fraction of the computational cost of full simulations. Furthermore, thermodynamic analysis reveals that the studied MLIPs partition into two distinct clusters driven by their training data. Our reweighting framework successfully recovers target thermodynamic properties--specifically, reaction and activation free energies--even when the phase-space overlap between potentials is critically low. Ultimately, this approach establishes a vital diagnostic protocol to achieve affordable cross-model consensus on materials chemistry properties without redundant, resource-intensive simulations.
zh_abstract: 自由能剖面是连接微观原子涨落与宏观热力学观测量的基本桥梁。使用密度泛函理论（DFT）精度估算沿反应坐标的自由能剖面（即平均力势，PMF）在计算上非常昂贵。通用机器学习原子间势（MLIPs）能大幅降低此成本，但其准确性在很大程度上取决于其训练数据，因此对于特定系统可能存在不确定性。本研究提出了一种系统化、可扩展的框架，用于对最初使用单一“源”MLIP采样的PMF，在一系列具有代表性的目标MLIPs之间进行重新加权。由于传统直接指数重加权方法在体系较大时因势函数间相空间重叠度低而失效，我们采用了稳健的解析修正。将此方法应用于锂离子（Li⁺）在纳米受限电解质中传输的复杂601原子体系，我们证明平均能隙近似能有效避免统计崩溃，产生与目标PMF高度匹配的稳定PMF。利用此方法，我们在仅需全模拟计算成本一小部分的情况下，恢复了跨多个DFT参考级别（PBE+D3、PBE-sol、r²SCAN、r²SCAN-D4）的高保真目标热力学性质。此外，热力学分析表明，所研究的MLIPs根据其训练数据可分为两个不同的聚类。即使势函数间的相空间重叠度极低，我们的重加权框架仍能成功恢复目标热力学性质——特别是反应自由能和活化自由能。最终，该方法建立了一种重要的诊断方案，可在无需重复进行资源密集型模拟的情况下，以可承受的计算成本实现材料化学性质的跨模型共识。

title: Equivariant Space Group and Hamiltonian for Collinear Magnetic Systems
abstract: Condensed matter physics increasingly focuses on exploiting the magnetic order parameter orientation n as a tuning knob for properties of collinear magnetic materials, but a general method for constructing effective Hamiltonians with explicit n-dependence has been lacking. Here, we develop a symmetry-based framework, built on the equivariant space group, for constructing such Hamiltonians, termed equivariant magnetic Hamiltonians (EMHs). The resulting EMH lives in a higher-dimensional k-n space and exhibits unconventional symmetry actions and topological features. Using a 1D ferromagnetic chain and a 3D antiferromagnet as examples, we demonstrate that explicit n-dependence in EMHs enables the study of magnetic-dynamics-driven topological pumping, including even-integer charge pumping and a second-Chern-number-induced quantized pumping of surface anomalous Hall conductivity. Beyond model systems, we incorporate the framework into first-principles calculations to construct ab-initio EMHs that accurately capture the n-dependent band structures of real materials. The approach can also be generalized to non-collinear magnetic systems. Our work establishes a general framework for constructing EMHs and for exploring the rich physics arising from magnetic anisotropy and magnetic dynamics.
zh_abstract: 凝聚态物理学日益关注利用磁序参量取向 **n** 作为共线磁性材料物性的调控手段，但构建具有显式 **n** 依赖性的有效哈密顿量一直缺乏通用方法。本文基于等变空间群，发展了一种基于对称性的框架来构建此类哈密顿量，称为等变磁哈密顿量。所得的等变磁哈密顿量存在于高维的 **k-n** 空间中，并展现出非常规的对称性作用与拓扑特征。以一维铁磁链和三维反铁磁体为例，我们证明等变磁哈密顿量中显式的 **n** 依赖性使得研究磁动力学驱动的拓扑泵浦成为可能，包括偶数电荷泵浦以及由第二陈数诱导的表面反常霍尔电导的量子化泵浦。在模型系统之外，我们将该框架融入第一性原理计算，构建了能够精确捕捉真实材料 **n** 依赖性能带结构的从头算等变磁哈密顿量。该方法亦可推广至非共线磁系统。我们的工作为构建等变磁哈密顿量以及探索由磁各向异性和磁动力学产生的丰富物理现象建立了一个通用框架。

title: Fast contracted Clebsch--Gordan tensor products for equivariant graph neural networks
abstract: We present an $\mathcal{O}(L^3)$ algorithm for evaluating contracted Clebsch--Gordan tensor products in $\mathrm{O}(3)$-equivariant machine learning potentials at fixed Canonical Polyadic (CP) rank. Mapping the angular integral to a structured Gauss--Legendre and Fourier tensor-product grid decouples the radial channel contractions from the angular transforms. The antisymmetric parity-odd Clebsch--Gordan channels, unreachable by the symmetric pointwise product on a scalar $S^2$ grid, are recovered through the surface-curl pairing $\hat r \cdot [\nabla_{S^2} A \times \nabla_{S^2} B]$, the spherical Poisson bracket, which supplies the $L=1$ angular momentum on the grid while preserving rotational equivariance. The construction extends to parity-aware equivariant message passing in atomic-cluster-expansion-style architectures and is verified by direct numerical quadrature. The full uncontracted Clebsch--Gordan tensor product remains subject to the $\mathcal{O}(L^4)$ output-size lower bound. A benchmark shows wall-clock scaling empirically as $L^2$ across the practical $l_{\max}$ range. For the on-site contraction this is pre-asymptotic, giving way to $L^3$ at large $l_{\max}$. For message passing it is structural and the runtime is memory-bandwidth bound on $L^2$-sized grid tensors.
zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种复杂度为 $\mathcal{O}(L^3)$ 的算法，用于在固定规范张量积（CP）秩下评估 $\mathrm{O}(3)$ 等变机器学习势中的缩并 Clebsch–Gordan 张量积。通过将角向积分映射到结构化 Gauss–Legendre 与 Fourier 张量积网格上，实现了径向通道缩并与角向变换的解耦。在标量 $S^2$ 网格上无法通过对称逐点积访问的反对称奇宇称 Clebsch–Gordan 通道，通过表面旋度配对 $\hat r \cdot [\nabla_{S^2} A \times \nabla_{S^2} B]$（即球面泊松括号）得以恢复，该配对在网格上提供了 $L=1$ 的角动量，同时保持了旋转等变性。该构造可推广至原子簇展开风格架构中具有宇称感知的等变消息传递，并通过直接数值积分验证。完整的非缩并 Clebsch–Gordan 张量积仍受限于 $\mathcal{O}(L^4)$ 的输出尺寸下界。基准测试显示，在实际 $l_{\max}$ 范围内，实测墙钟时间缩放约为 $L^2$。对于局域缩并，此为前渐近行为，在较大 $l_{\max}$ 时过渡至 $L^3$；对于消息传递，此为结构性特征，运行时间受限于 $L^2$ 大小网格张量的内存带宽。

title: Lang2MLIP: End-to-End Language-to-Machine Learning Interatomic Potential Development with Autonomous Agentic Workflows
abstract: Developing machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) for complex materials systems remains challenging because it requires expertise in atomistic simulations, machine learning, and workflow design, as well as iterative active learning procedures. Existing automated pipelines typically assume a fixed sequence of stages or depend on domain experts, which limits their adaptability to heterogeneous materials systems where the optimal curriculum is not known in advance. To lower the barrier to developing MLIPs for non-experts, we propose Lang2MLIP, a multi-agent framework that takes natural-language input and formulates end-to-end MLIP development as a sequential decision-making problem solved by large language models (LLMs). At each step, a decision-making agent observes the current dataset, model, evaluation results, and execution log, and then automatically selects an appropriate action to improve the model. This removes the need for a predefined pipeline and enables the agent to self-correct by revisiting earlier subsystems when new failures arise. We evaluate this approach on a solid electrolyte interphase (SEI) system with multiple components and interfaces. These results suggest that LLM-based multi-agent systems are a promising direction for automating MLIP development and making it more accessible to non-experts.
zh_abstract: 为复杂材料系统开发机器学习原子间势（MLIPs）仍然具有挑战性，因为它需要原子模拟、机器学习和工作流设计方面的专业知识，以及迭代式的主动学习过程。现有的自动化流程通常假设固定的阶段序列或依赖领域专家，这限制了它们对异质材料系统的适应性，因为此类系统的最优学习路径无法预先获知。为了降低非专家开发MLIP的门槛，我们提出了Lang2MLIP，这是一个多智能体框架，它接收自然语言输入，并将端到端的MLIP开发过程构建为由大型语言模型（LLMs）解决的序列决策问题。在每一步，一个决策智能体观察当前的数据集、模型、评估结果和执行日志，然后自动选择适当的操作来改进模型。这消除了对预定义流程的依赖，并使得智能体能够在出现新的失败时，通过重新访问早期子系统来进行自我纠正。我们在一个包含多组分和多界面的固体电解质界面（SEI）系统上评估了该方法。这些结果表明，基于LLM的多智能体系统是自动化MLIP开发并使其对非专家更易用的一个有前景的方向。

title: Rongzai agent: A Large Language Model-Based Autonomous Assistant for Rietveld Refinement of Neutron Diffraction Data
abstract: Neutron diffraction (ND) is an indispensable technique for determining atomic positions (especially light elements) and thus serves as a critical probe for revealing microscopic structures in materials science. However, traditional Rietveld refinement of ND data relies heavily on manual operation of specialized software, which is time-consuming, labor-intensive, and highly dependent on user expertise, severely hindering automated analysis. The automation of Rietveld refinement has long been a long-standing and challenging problem in crystallography. To address this challenge, this paper presents the Dr.Sai-Rongzai agent, an autonomous refinement assistant based on a large language model (LLM), a specialist knowledge base, and the GSAS-II refinement engine, achieving for the first time an intelligent refinement that integrates knowledge-driven decision-making. The agent accomplishes a fully automated workflow from natural language task parsing to autonomous decision-making, execution of refinement strategies, and report generation. Evaluation on five representative samples shows that the Rongzai agent achieves lower Rwp values than human specialists on three samples (2.88% vs. 4.42%, 5.06% vs. 5.40%, 7.60% vs. 9.00%), while on the other two samples its results are very close to those of the specialists. The agent is currently deployed at the China Spallation Neutron Source (CSNS) and is open for external user registration, providing an intelligent and user-friendly analytical tool for materials research. This work fully leverages the cutting-edge advantages of LLM, offers a new path to solve the long-standing problem of automated refinement, takes a key step toward intelligent and fully automated crystallographic analysis, and holds great potential to accelerate AI for Science discoveries in neutron-based materials characterization.
zh_abstract: 中子衍射（ND）是确定原子位置（尤其是轻元素）不可或缺的技术，因此是揭示材料科学微观结构的关键探针。然而，传统的ND数据Rietveld精修高度依赖专业软件的手动操作，耗时费力且极度依赖用户专业经验，严重阻碍了自动化分析。Rietveld精修的自动化长期以来一直是晶体学中一个长期存在且具有挑战性的难题。为应对这一挑战，本文提出了Dr.Sai-Rongzai智能体，这是一个基于大语言模型（LLM）、专业知识库和GSAS-II精修引擎的自主精修助手，首次实现了知识驱动决策融合的智能精修。该智能体完成了从自然语言任务解析到自主决策、精修策略执行及报告生成的全自动化工作流程。在五个代表性样品上的评估表明，荣仔智能体在三个样品上获得了比人类专家更低的Rwp值（2.88% vs. 4.42%，5.06% vs. 5.40%，7.60% vs. 9.00%），而在另外两个样品上其结果与专家结果非常接近。该智能体目前部署于中国散裂中子源（CSNS）并对外开放用户注册，为材料研究提供了一个智能化、用户友好的分析工具。这项工作充分利用了LLM的前沿优势，为解决自动化精修这一长期难题提供了新路径，朝着智能化、全自动化的晶体学分析迈出了关键一步，在加速基于中子的材料表征的AI for Science发现方面具有巨大潜力。

title: TSAgent: An Agentic Workflow for Autonomous Transition State Search
abstract: Identifying transition states (TSs) on potential energy surfaces is a central computational bottleneck in mechanistic studies of catalytic materials. A TS search is not a single calculation but a long-horizon, multi-step workflow of atomistic simulations with delayed, asynchronous feedback and heterogeneous failure modes that require a joint multimodal analysis of scalar convergence diagnostics and atomic geometries along the reaction path. To address this challenge, we propose TSAgent, an agentic workflow that automates TS search directly at the density functional theory (DFT) level of quantum chemical accuracy. TSAgent operates through a persistent plan-execute-analyze-replan loop, continuously adapting its strategy based on convergence diagnostics and geometric feedback without human intervention. We evaluate TSAgent on a diverse 100-example subset of the OC20NEB heterogeneous catalysis benchmark, where it successfully locates TSs with 83% accuracy. In a direct comparison against expert DFT practitioners on 10 held-out examples, TSAgent achieves a 70% success rate compared to a human-expert average of 73 +/- 12%. Finally, TSAgent independently reproduces Bronsted-Evans-Polanyi scaling relationships for NH3 dissociation on metal and single-atom alloy surfaces from a published heterogeneous catalysis study, demonstrating that its utility extends beyond curated benchmarks to real scientific investigations.
zh_abstract: 在势能面上识别过渡态（TSs）是催化材料机理研究的核心计算瓶颈。过渡态搜索并非单一计算任务，而是一个长周期、多步骤的原子模拟工作流，其反馈具有延迟性与异步性，且存在多种异质失效模式，需对反应路径中的标量收敛诊断数据与原子几何结构进行联合多模态分析。为应对这一挑战，我们提出TSAgent——一种能在量子化学精度的密度泛函理论（DFT）层级实现全自动过渡态搜索的智能体工作流。TSAgent通过持续运行的“规划-执行-分析-重规划”循环进行操作，基于收敛诊断与几何反馈自主调整策略，无需人工干预。我们在OC20NEB异相催化基准测试的100个多样化样本子集上评估TSAgent，其成功定位过渡态的准确率达到83%。在与DFT领域专家对10个预留样本的直接对比中，TSAgent取得70%的成功率，而人类专家平均成功率为73±12%。最后，TSAgent在一项已发表的异相催化研究中，独立复现了金属及单原子合金表面NH3解离的Bronsted-Evans-Polanyi标度关系，证明其应用价值可超越人工构建的基准测试，拓展至真实科学研究场景。

title: Beyond the Black Box: An Interpretable Machine Learning Framework for Predicting Electronic Structure Microdescriptors and Structure-Performance Relationships in Fe-based Catalytic Systems
abstract: The current catalyst discovery and development pipeline for energy-intensive applications like methane conversion remains bottlenecked by expensive trial-and-error experimentation, irreproducible chemical intuition, and a lack of frameworks linking complex catalytic design spaces to performance. This work presents an interpretable machine learning framework that integrates SHAP-based feature importance analysis (Explainable AI) with tree-based ensembles (Random Forest and Bayesian-optimized CatBoost) to characterize Fe-zeolite and oxide-supported catalysts for the partial oxidation of methane (POM). Despite limited data, the framework decodes complex structure-performance relationships by identifying and ranking thermodynamic, structural, and geometric microdescriptors that influence the electronic band gap and govern macroscale performance metrics such as selectivity, activity, and stability. This work explicitly demonstrates that thermodynamic lattice stability and geometric factors are the primary drivers of electronic band gap (a critical proxy for redox reactivity) rather than bulk stoichiometry. Non-linear models achieve an R2 of 0.61 - 0.77, significantly outperforming traditional linear baselines (R2 = 0.32). This workflow provides both a light-weight generalizable methodology and a prioritized list of physical features for accelerated catalyst screening - and these features can subsequently be integrated into microkinetic and reaction engineering models to create digital twins of complex reactor systems and to enable predictive optimization in autonomous R&D laboratories.
zh_abstract: 当前针对甲烷转化等高能耗应用的催化剂发现与开发流程，仍受限于昂贵的试错实验、不可复现的化学直觉，以及缺乏将复杂催化设计空间与性能关联的理论框架。本研究提出一种可解释的机器学习框架，该框架整合了基于SHAP的特征重要性分析（可解释人工智能）与树集成方法（随机森林及贝叶斯优化的CatBoost），用于表征铁沸石和氧化物载体催化剂在甲烷部分氧化（POM）反应中的特性。尽管数据有限，该框架通过识别并排序影响电子带隙（决定宏观性能指标如选择性、活性和稳定性的关键因素）的热力学、结构和几何微观描述符，解码了复杂的结构-性能关系。本研究明确揭示了热力学晶格稳定性和几何因素（而非整体化学计量比）是电子带隙（氧化还原反应活性的关键代理指标）的主要驱动因素。非线性模型取得了0.61至0.77的R²分数，显著优于传统线性基线模型（R² = 0.32）。该工作流程不仅提供了一种轻量级、可推广的方法论，还给出了可用于加速催化剂筛选的物理特征优先级列表——这些特征后续可整合至微动力学和反应工程模型中，以构建复杂反应器系统的数字孪生体，并在自动化研发实验室中实现预测性优化。

title: OpenAaaS: An Open Agent-as-a-Service Framework for Distributed Materials-Informatics Research
abstract: The Materials Genome Initiative catalyzed the proliferation of centralized platforms--SaaS, PaaS, and IaaS--that aggregate computational and experimental resources for accelerated materials discovery. In parallel, breakthroughs in large language models (LLMs) and autonomous agents have created powerful new reasoning capabilities for scientific research. Yet a critical "last mile" problem remains: while we possess world-class models and vast repositories of materials data, we lack the organizational infrastructure to compose these capabilities securely across institutional boundaries. The development of structural and functional materials for harsh service environments--high-temperature alloys, radiation resistant steels, corrosion-resistant coatings--remains characterized by long-term iteration, mechanistic complexity, and high domain expertise--demands that exceed both monolithic agent systems and traditional centralized platforms. To address this gap we propose OpenAaaS, an open-source hierarchical and distributed Agent-as-a-Service framework that enables organized multi-agent collaboration for intelligent materials design. OpenAaaS is built on a single foundational principle: code flows, data stays still. A Master Agent plans and decomposes complex research tasks without requiring direct access to subordinate agents' managed data and computational resources. Sub-agents, deployed as near-data execution nodes, retain full sovereignty over local datasets, proprietary algorithms, and specialized hardware. This architecture guarantees that raw data never leaves its domain of origin while enabling cross-scale, cross-domain secure integration of previously isolated materials intelligence silos. We validate the framework through two representative case studies: (i) AlphaAgent, an evidence-grounded materials literature analysis executor that achieves 4.66/5.0 on deep analytical questions against single-pass RAG baselines; and (ii) an ultra-large-scale hexa-high-entropy alloy descriptor database service that demonstrates secure near-data execution and domain-specific scientific workflows under strict data-sovereignty constraints. OpenAaaS establishes a principled pathway toward "organized research" via agent collectives, offering a scalable foundation for next-generation materials intelligent design platforms. All source code is available at https://github.com/Wolido/OpenAaaS.
zh_abstract: 材料基因组计划推动了集中式平台（SaaS、PaaS和IaaS）的激增，这些平台通过整合计算与实验资源以加速材料发现。与此同时，大语言模型（LLMs）和自主代理技术的突破为科学研究带来了强大的新型推理能力。然而，一个关键的“最后一英里”问题依然存在：尽管我们拥有世界级的模型和海量的材料数据资源，却缺乏能够在跨机构边界安全组织与组合这些能力的体系架构。面向苛刻服役环境（如高温合金、抗辐射钢、耐腐蚀涂层）的结构与功能材料的研发，仍具有长期迭代、机理复杂和高度依赖领域专业知识的特点——这些需求超出了单体代理系统和传统集中式平台的能力范围。为弥补这一差距，我们提出了OpenAaaS，一个开源、分层、分布式的“代理即服务”框架，旨在为智能材料设计实现有序的多代理协作。OpenAaaS构建于一个基本原则之上：代码流动，数据静止。主代理负责规划和分解复杂的研究任务，无需直接访问下属代理所管理的本地数据与计算资源。作为近数据执行节点部署的子代理，对其本地数据集、专有算法和专用硬件保持完全的主权。该架构确保原始数据永不离开其原始领域，同时实现了先前孤立的材料智能孤岛之间跨尺度、跨领域的安全集成。我们通过两个代表性案例验证了该框架：（i）AlphaAgent，一个基于证据的材料文献分析执行器，在处理深度分析性问题时，相对于单次检索增强生成基线，其得分达到4.66/5.0；（ii）一个超大规模六元高熵合金描述符数据库服务，在严格的数据主权约束下，展示了安全的近数据执行和领域特定的科学工作流。OpenAaaS通过代理集体为“有组织的研究”建立了一条原则性路径，为下一代材料智能设计平台提供了可扩展的基础。所有源代码可在https://github.com/Wolido/OpenAaaS获取。

title: Generating Symmetric Materials using Latent Flow Matching
abstract: Tackling the task of materials generation, we aim to enhance the previously proposed All-atom Diffusion Transformer (ADiT) by introducing SymADiT, a symmetry-aware variant. To do so, we use a representation of materials based on Wyckoff positions. We follow ADiT and perform generative modelling in latent space, adapted to our symmetry-aware representation. By forcing the output of the generative model to adhere to the symmetry restrictions imposed by the generated crystal's space group and each atom's Wyckoff-position, the generated materials exhibit more realistic symmetry properties. We benchmark our method against both symmetry-aware and symmetry-agnostic models for materials generation and show competitive performance, generating stable, symmetric materials with a simple Transformer architecture.
zh_abstract: 针对材料生成任务，我们旨在通过引入SymADiT（一种对称性感知的变体）来改进先前提出的全原子扩散Transformer（ADiT）。为此，我们采用基于Wyckoff位置的材料表示方法。我们遵循ADiT框架，在潜在空间中进行生成建模，并使其适应我们的对称性感知表示。通过强制生成模型的输出符合生成晶体空间群及每个原子Wyckoff位置所施加的对称性约束，所生成的材料展现出更真实的对称性特征。我们将本方法与材料生成领域中的对称性感知及对称性无关模型进行基准测试，结果表明其具有竞争力，能够通过简单的Transformer架构生成稳定、对称的材料。
introduction:
The vast combinatorial space of yet unexplored materials holds considerable potential for advancing several fields, including the discovery of novel 2D materials, next-generation energy storage systems, and materials for carbon capture . In exploration of this space, generative models have emerged as an attractive class of methods , largely due to their ability to rapidly generate large numbers of candidate materials.


Early generative models for crystals , as well as more recent approaches , typically do not explicitly model the intrinsic symmetries of crystalline materials, instead relying on learning such symmetries directly from data. These symmetries are fundamental to determining material properties; for example, crystal symmetry governs whether phenomena such as piezoelectricity can occur . In addition, these symmetry-agnostic methods exhibit two fundamental shortcomings: first, their representations are inherently redundant, as they include more structural detail than necessary, given that much of it is determined by the material’s symmetry; second, while these models are effective at generating novel crystal structures, the generated structures often exhibit only translational symmetry. This is highly implausible for real-world materials and, from a generative modelling standpoint, inconsistent with materials databases (e.g., ), where usually only a small fraction of structures lack symmetry beyond pure translations.

To overcome these two issues, recent works have focused on symmetry-aware generative modelling of crystals . These methods adopt a -based representation that explicitly encode the crystal’s symmetry, retaining only the minimal information required to reconstruct the full structure via its symmetry operations. We contribute to this line of Wyckoff-based research by building on  (ADiT) , a recent generative framework for materials and molecules. While ADiT employs a symmetry-agnostic representation of materials, we propose , a symmetry-aware a
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新：提出了一种基于Wyckoff位置表征、在潜在空间中通过流匹配进行生成建模的对称感知晶体材料生成方法SymADiT，将晶体学对称性约束显式地融入生成过程。
2. 关键结论：采用Wyckoff位置表征能够有效减少结构冗余信息，并确保生成过程直接满足空间群和Wyckoff位置的对称性约束；所提出的SymADiT模型能够生成具有更真实对称性（超越单纯平移对称）的稳定晶体结构；在基准测试中，该方法与现有对称感知及对称无关的生成模型相比，展示了具有竞争力的性能。
3. 专家点评：该工作将晶体学先验知识（Wyckoff位置）与先进的生成模型（流匹配、Transformer）相结合，是提升生成材料物理合理性的重要技术路径。其核心价值在于从表征层面硬性约束对称性，而非依赖模型从数据中隐式学习，这有望提高生成样本的保真度和成功率。然而，方法的有效性高度依赖于Wyckoff位置表征的完备性和初始空间群设定的合理性，对于复杂或低对称性体系，其优势与通用性仍需在更广泛的数据集上进行验证；此外，与端到端的“黑箱”生成相比，引入显式对称性约束可能在一定程度上限制了结构探索的广度。

title: Multi-Fidelity Computational Screening of High-Entropy MBenes for CO$_2$ Electroreduction
abstract: High-entropy MBenes (HE-MBenes) represent a promising, unexplored class of 2D materials for electrocatalysis. In this work, we present a systematic computational screening of 56 equiatomic quinary HE-MBene compositions from the {Ti, V, Cr, Mo, Nb, Ta, Zr, Hf} pool for CO$_2$ adsorption and electroreduction. Using the Monte Carlo Special Quasirandom Structure (MCSQS) algorithm, we generated disordered M$_1B_1$-type supercells and assessed structural stability via DFT (PBE+D3) in VASP. Of the 56 candidates, 55 passed relaxation, with 45 exhibiting negative formation energies, confirming thermodynamic stability. To efficiently screen CO$_2$ adsorption across disordered surfaces, we developed a machine-learning interatomic potential (MLIP) using the MACE architecture. Fine-tuned on our DFT dataset, the model achieved energy RMSEs of 3.49 and 3.0 meV/atom for adsorbed and pristine sets, respectively. Active sites were identified via PDOS analysis, matching metal d-orbital signatures with CO$_2$ molecular orbitals. The rate-determining step of the CO$_2$-to-CO pathway was evaluated using the computational hydrogen electrode (CHE) model. Short-time structural integrity was assessed via AIMD at 500 K over 2.5 ps; phonon-based stability remains a priority for future work. Our results establish an integrated DFT-MLIP-AIMD framework for the rational design of high-entropy 2D materials tailored for CO$_2$ conversion.
zh_abstract: 高熵MBenes（HE-MBenes）是一类极具潜力且尚未被深入探索的二维电催化材料。本研究对从{Ti, V, Cr, Mo, Nb, Ta, Zr, Hf}元素池中选取的56种等原子比五元HE-MBene组分，进行了系统的计算筛选，以评估其CO$_2$吸附与电还原性能。我们采用蒙特卡洛特殊准随机结构（MCSQS）算法构建了无序的M$_1$B$_1$型超晶胞，并利用VASP软件中的DFT（PBE+D3）方法评估了结构稳定性。在56个候选结构中，55个成功完成结构驰豫，其中45个具有负的形成能，证实了其热力学稳定性。为高效筛选无序表面的CO$_2$吸附行为，我们基于MACE架构开发了一种机器学习原子间势（MLIP）。该模型在我们的DFT数据集上进行微调后，在吸附体系和原始体系上的能量均方根误差（RMSE）分别达到3.49和3.0 meV/原子。通过投影态密度（PDOS）分析识别了活性位点，将金属d轨道特征与CO$_2$分子轨道相匹配。利用计算氢电极（CHE）模型评估了CO$_2$还原为CO路径的决速步。通过500 K下2.5 ps的从头算分子动力学（AIMD）模拟评估了短期结构完整性；基于声子分析的长程稳定性将是未来工作的重点。我们的研究成果建立了一个集成的DFT-MLIP-AIMD框架，为理性设计面向CO$_2$转化的高熵二维材料奠定了基础。
introduction:
The unabated combustion of fossil fuels has driven atmospheric  concentrations to approximately 429~ppm by the beginning of 2026~, imposing increasing pressure on the scientific community to develop scalable carbon capture and use strategies. Electrochemical reduction of  (RR) occupies a central position in this effort because it can be powered by renewable electricity, operates under mild aqueous conditions, and offers the prospect of tunable product selectivity through the choice of applied potential and catalyst composition~. Depending on the number of steps of proton-electron transfer steps (2 to 12), RR produces a range of value-added C$_1$ products, including carbon monoxide (CO), formic acid (HCOOH), methanol (), and methane (), as well as long-chain -- serving as renewable energy carriers or industrial feedstocks~.

Despite decades of research, the practical implementation of RR remains severely constrained by the intrinsic limitations of conventional single-metal electrocatalysts. The  molecule is thermodynamically inert (C=O bond dissociation energy 532~kJ~mol$^{-1}$; overall dissociation enthalpy $ H_{ diss}  1598$~kJ~mol$^{-1}$), and its activation requires, a concerted proton-coupled multi-electron transfer process~. On transition metal surfaces, the adsorption energies of key intermediates (, , ) are governed by linear scaling relationships (LSRs) that tie all binding strengths to a single descriptor, typically the CO adsorption energy~. This thermodynamic coupling imposes a fundamental volcano-top ceiling: any perturbation that strengthens binding of one intermediate simultaneously weakens others, precluding independent optimization of activity and selectivity. Noble metals (Au, Ag) produce CO selectively, but only at high overpotentials ($-0.9$ to $-1.2$~V vs.\ RHE), while copper, the only elemental metal capable of reducing  to hydrocarbons, operates at even more negative potentials ($<-1.0$~V vs.\ RHE) with poor product selectivity~. 
These limitat
conclusion:
We have presented the first systematic, multi-fidelity computational screening of high-entropy MBenes as electrochemical  reduction catalysts. Our study covered all 56 equiatomic quinary compositions accessible from the \{Ti, V, Cr, Mo, Nb, Ta, Zr, Hf\} elemental pool. 
To efficiently navigate this vast compositional space, we employed a five-stage sequential screening funnel comprising structural relaxation and mechanical stability assessment, thermodynamic formation energy filtering, phonon dynamical stability screening, density functional theory (DFT)  adsorption screening guided by PDOS-identified active sites, and computational hydrogen electrode (CHE) rate-determining step analysis. 
The integration of a MACE machine-learning interatomic potential ($R^2 = 0.9991$; RMSE $= 3.49$~meV/atom) enabled computationally efficient adsorption evaluation across 1,375 unique surface environments, ultimately reducing the initial space from 56 down to 18 viable candidates.
These 18 candidate structures demonstrate robust stability and favorable thermodynamics for catalytic applications. Ab initio molecular dynamics (AIMD) simulations conducted at 500~K confirm thermal stability, showing minimal root-mean-square deviations (RMSD 0.12--0.20~) without structural degradation. 
Crucially, selectivity for the  reduction reaction over the competing hydrogen evolution reaction (HER) was successfully verified, with all 18 candidates satisfying the thermodynamic condition $ G_{^*} <  G_{^*}$.
Among the viable candidates, three compositions emerged with exceptional zero-overpotential -to-CO performance:, , and . All three exhibit spontaneously downhill free energy profiles at $U = 0$~V vs.\ RHE. This remarkable performance surpasses all reported conventional MBene and high-entropy alloy benchmarks for the two-electron -to-CO pathway.
Our atomistically complete and internally consistent mechanistic analysis reveals the underlying principles driving this catalytic activity. Bader charge
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 首次构建并应用了一个整合DFT、机器学习原子间势（MACE架构）和AIMD的多保真度计算框架，用于系统筛选面向CO2电还原的高熵MBenes材料。
2. 关键结论: (1) 从{T, V, Cr, Mo, Nb, Ta, Zr, Hf}元素池中筛选出的56种等原子比五元高熵MBene，绝大多数（45/55）表现出负的形成能，证实其热力学稳定性；(2) 利用MACE架构开发的MLIP模型实现了对无序表面CO2吸附的高效准确评估（RMSE为3.49 meV/atom），将初筛候选材料从56种缩减至18种；(3) 通过PDOS分析与CHE模型相结合，识别了活性位点并评估了CO2至CO路径的决速步。
3. 专家点评: 本工作将高熵材料的设计理念引入二维MBenes体系，并建立了高效的计算筛选流程，对探索该新兴材料库在催化领域的应用具有重要的方法论意义。然而，研究对材料长期电化学环境下的稳定性（如氧化、溶解）及更复杂C-C耦合产物的选择性评估不足，且AIMD模拟时间尺度（2.5 ps）过短，难以充分论证实际工况下的结构完整性。后续实验验证与更深入的反应机理研究将是关键。

title: Teaching Molecular Dynamics to a Non-Autoregressive Ionic Transport Predictor
abstract: Unlike most static material properties widely studied in the machine learning literature, ionic transport properties are inherently dynamic, making their fast and accurate prediction from static atomic structures challenging. The current standard approach, molecular dynamics (MD) simulations, suffers from prohibitively high computational cost. Recent autoregressive learning-based MD acceleration methods requiring sequential inference remain slow and prone to error accumulation; in contrast, existing non-autoregressive material property prediction models are less accurate because they fail to exploit dynamics. Moreover, existing methods typically benefit from datasets either with or without atomic trajectories, but not both. To overcome these limitations, we propose a non-autoregressive learning framework based on auxiliary modality learning, which treats atomic trajectories as an auxiliary modality during training but does not require them at inference. This enables the predictor to learn dynamics without sequential inference while benefiting from both types of datasets. As a result, our framework achieves over 200 times speedup compared to autoregressive models on the dataset with atomic trajectories while substantially reducing prediction error relative to non-autoregressive benchmarks across both types of datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/jykim-git/MD.
zh_abstract: 与机器学习文献中广泛研究的大多数静态材料性质不同，离子传输性质本质上是动态的，这使得从静态原子结构中快速准确地预测它们具有挑战性。当前的标准方法——分子动力学（MD）模拟——受限于极高的计算成本。最近基于自回归学习的MD加速方法需要顺序推理，速度仍然较慢且容易产生误差累积；相比之下，现有的非自回归材料性质预测模型则因未能利用动态信息而准确性较低。此外，现有方法通常只能受益于包含或不包含原子轨迹的数据集之一，而不能同时利用两者。为了克服这些局限性，我们提出了一种基于辅助模态学习的非自回归学习框架，该框架在训练时将原子轨迹视为辅助模态，但在推理时不需要它们。这使得预测器能够在不进行顺序推理的情况下学习动态信息，同时受益于两种类型的数据集。因此，与包含原子轨迹的数据集上的自回归模型相比，我们的框架实现了超过200倍的加速，同时在两种类型的数据集上，相对于非自回归基准模型，预测误差显著降低。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/jykim-git/MD 获取。
introduction:
Predicting ionic transport properties from equilibrium atomic structures is fundamentally challenging because it requires inferring long-time atomic dynamics~ from static input lacking temporal information, thereby creating a severe modality gap between the input and the target.
Despite its central importance in materials science, especially for rechargeable batteries~, this task remains underexplored in the machine learning (ML) literature.
Most benchmark datasets~ for material prediction focus on static properties obtained from quantum mechanical simulations of single atomic configurations.
In contrast, ionic transport properties are conventionally computed by molecular dynamics (MD) simulations~, which generate atomic trajectories from equilibrium structures.
However, the high computational cost of MD severely limits large-scale materials screening for ionic transport properties.
