title: A New Paradigm for Computational Chemistry
abstract: Computational chemistry has become an indispensable tool for generating data and insights, pervading all branches of experimental chemistry. Its most central concept is the potential energy hypersurface, key to all chemistry and materials science, as it assigns an energy to a molecular structure, the necessary ingredient for reaction mechanism elucidation and reaction rate calculation. Density functional theory (DFT) has been the most important method in practice for obtaining such energies, which is mirrored in the use of high-performance computing hardware. In the last two decades, a new class of surrogate potential energy functions has been evolving with remarkable properties: quantum accuracy combined with force-field speed. Until very recently, their application was hampered by the fact that they needed to be trained on truly large system-specific data sets, generated before a computational chemistry study could be started (in sharp contrast to DFT, which, as a first-principles method, works out of the box, but at a far higher price of computational cost). Very recently, this roadblock has been overcome by so-called foundation machine learning interatomic potentials, which are poised to completely change the way we do computational chemistry, likely prompting us to abandon DFT as the prime method of choice for this purpose in less than a decade.
zh_abstract: 计算化学已成为生成数据和提供洞见不可或缺的工具，渗透到实验化学的各个分支。其最核心的概念是势能超曲面，这是所有化学和材料科学的关键，因为它为分子结构分配能量，是阐明反应机理和计算反应速率的必要要素。密度泛函理论（DFT）在实践中一直是获取此类能量最重要的方法，这也反映在高性能计算硬件的使用上。近二十年来，一类新的替代势能函数逐渐发展起来，其特性引人注目：兼具量子精度与分子力场速度。直到最近，这类函数的应用仍受限于一个事实：它们需要在计算化学研究开始之前，基于真正庞大的特定系统数据集进行训练（这与DFT形成鲜明对比；DFT作为第一性原理方法，可以开箱即用，但计算成本要高得多）。最近，这一障碍已被所谓的“基础机器学习原子间势”所克服。这类势函数有望彻底改变我们进行计算化学研究的方式，很可能在不到十年的时间里，促使我们放弃将DFT作为实现此目的的首要方法。
introduction:
Central to our understanding of chemical processes is the assignment of a potential energy to a molecular structure, more specifically to a nuclear configuration, which leads to the concept of a potential energy surface that allows us to study reaction chemistry in terms of stable intermediates, reaction paths, transition state structures, and so forth. It is the Born-Oppenheimer approximation, the so-called clamped-nuclei approximation, which allows us to calculate the electronic energy of such a fixed arrangement of atomic nuclei. There exists a plethora of quantum chemical methods to calculate this electronic energy, all characterized by some balance of accuracy and feasibility. These methods allow us to predict reaction energies and activation barriers routinely , alongside molecular structures and transition states on the basis of the first principles of quantum mechanics, an accomplishment that was recognized by a share of the 1998 Nobel Prize in Chemistry to John Pople.

In the 1990s, approximate density functional theory (DFT) took the lead for this purpose within computational chemistry owing to its convincing compromise of bearable computational cost and sufficient reliability, leading to the recognition of its impact on chemistry by the other share of the 1998 Nobel Prize in Chemistry to Walter Kohn. 
More than 90\
and about one third of all computer science applications on supercomputer systems . Hence, the practical and economic importance as well as the ecological footprint of DFT can hardly be overestimated.

The accuracy (and to some degree the efficiency) of DFT depends on the approximate form chosen for the so-called exchange--correlation (xc) density functional, typically denoted by one of the notorious capital-letter acronyms. Although an exact xc functional can be shown to exist, its analytical form is not known and would probably also be too involved for efficient computational chemistry approaches. Hence, rather drastic and often heavily param
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 该论文提出，以“基础机器学习原子间势”为代表的新型势能面替代模型，将因其“量子化学精度与分子力学速度”的结合，在十年内取代密度泛函理论成为计算化学获取势能面的首选方法，从而实现该领域的范式转变。

2. 关键结论: (1) 势能面是连接分子结构与能量、从而理解所有化学过程的核心概念; (2) 密度泛函理论因其在计算成本与精度间的平衡，已成为过去数十年获取势能面的主导实践方法，但其计算开销巨大; (3) 新兴的机器学习原子间势能函数已能实现接近量子化学的精度和分子力学的计算速度，但此前受限于需要针对特定体系进行大量数据训练; (4) 近期出现的“基础机器学习原子间势”模型通过预训练克服了这一数据瓶颈，有望彻底改变计算化学的研究范式。

3. 专家点评: 该观点极具前瞻性和冲击力，准确指出了计算化学领域因机器学习介入而面临的范式变革临界点。然而，其“十年内取代DFT”的断言可能过于激进，忽略了DFT方法本身在理论可解释性、普适性以及与新机器学习方法结合发展方面的潜力；同时，对“基础模型”在复杂电子结构、化学反应动态等关键场景的可靠性、可转移性及不确定性量化等根本性挑战未作深入探讨，这些将是决定其预言能否实现的关键。

title: A Self-Evolving Agentic Framework for Metasurface Inverse Design
abstract: Metasurface inverse design has become central to realizing complex optical functionality, yet translating target responses into executable, solver-compatible workflows still demands specialized expertise in computational electromagnetics and solver-specific software engineering. Recent large language models (LLMs) offer a complementary route to reducing this workflow-construction burden, but existing language-driven systems remain largely session-bounded and do not preserve reusable workflow knowledge across inverse-design tasks. We present an agentic framework for metasurface inverse design that addresses this limitation through context-level skill evolution. The framework couples a coding agent, evolving skill artifacts, and a deterministic evaluator grounded in physical simulation so that solver-specific strategies can be iteratively refined across tasks without modifying model weights or the underlying physics solver. We evaluate the framework on a benchmark spanning multiple metasurface inverse-design task types, with separate training-aligned and held-out task families. Evolved skills raise in-distribution task success from 38% to 74%, increase criteria pass fraction from 0.510 to 0.870, and reduce average attempts from 4.10 to 2.30. On held-out task families, binary success changes only marginally, but improvements in best margin together with shifts in error composition and agent behavior indicate partial transfer of workflow knowledge. These results suggest that the main value of skill evolution lies in accumulating reusable solver-specific expertise around reliable computational engines, thereby offering a practical path toward more autonomous and accessible metasurface inverse-design workflows.
zh_abstract: 超表面逆向设计已成为实现复杂光学功能的核心，但将目标响应转化为可执行且兼容求解器的工作流，仍然需要计算电磁学和求解器专用软件工程方面的专业知识。近期的大型语言模型为降低这种工作流构建负担提供了一条补充路径，但现有的语言驱动系统在很大程度上仍局限于单次会话，无法在跨逆向设计任务中保存可重用的工作流知识。我们提出了一种用于超表面逆向设计的智能体框架，该框架通过上下文级别的技能演化来解决这一局限。该框架将编码智能体、演化的技能构件以及基于物理仿真的确定性评估器相结合，使得特定于求解器的策略能够在不同任务间迭代优化，而无需修改模型权重或底层物理求解器。我们在涵盖多种超表面逆向设计任务类型的基准测试上评估该框架，测试集包括与训练对齐的任务族和预留的任务族。演化后的技能将分布内任务的成功率从38%提升至74%，将标准通过率从0.510提升至0.870，并将平均尝试次数从4.10降至2.30。在预留任务族上，二元成功率仅略有变化，但最佳裕度的提升以及错误构成和智能体行为的变化表明，工作流知识实现了部分迁移。这些结果表明，技能演化的主要价值在于围绕可靠的计算引擎积累可重用的、特定于求解器的专业知识，从而为构建更自主、更易访问的超表面逆向设计工作流提供了一条实用路径。
introduction:
Metasurface design is increasingly cast as an inverse problem, in which a target optical response is specified and the corresponding structure is sought . This paradigm reflects the growing demand for broadband, multifunctional, and highly integrated meta-optical devices, whose associated design spaces are high-dimensional, strongly coupled, and resistant to intuition-guided exploration, particularly under freeform parameterizations . In parallel, deep-learning-assisted methods have broadened the computational design landscape for metasurfaces and flat optics . Consequently, intuition-driven geometry tuning and parameter sweeps are no longer adequate for the efficient identification of high-performance structures, and computational inverse-design workflows have become central to metasurface research . Yet the growing centrality of inverse design has not translated into commensurate ease of automation. Converting a desired optical response into an executable design workflow still requires specialized knowledge of computational electromagnetics together with the software-engineering expertise needed for solver-specific workflow implementation and maintenance . These barriers often confine metasurface inverse-design workflows to relatively narrow, task-specific design problems, making them difficult to extend to more complex functionalities. The same limitations also make broader multiphysics applications harder to realize, thereby restricting further interdisciplinary exploration and development.


In practice, the difficulty lies in turning a target response into a working inverse-design program. To run an inverse-design task, the researcher must turn a target response into a working program: choose a parameterization, define the objective and constraints, decide how to initialize and optimize the variables, and verify the solver outputs . Recent progress in -based coding, tool use, and natural-language interaction makes part of this workflow easier. Early studie
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出了一个通过上下文级技能演化而非修改模型权重来实现跨任务可复用专业知识积累的智能体框架，用于降低超表面逆向设计工作流的构建门槛。

2. 关键结论: 该框架通过编码智能体、演化技能构件和基于物理模拟的确定性评估器耦合，实现了针对特定求解器的策略在任务间的迭代精化；在分布内任务上，技能演化将任务成功率从38%显著提升至74%，并将平均尝试次数减半；在分布外任务上，虽然二进制成功率提升有限，但最佳边际的改善、错误构成的转变以及智能体行为的改变表明，工作流知识实现了部分迁移。

3. 专家点评: 这项工作的核心价值在于将AI智能体的焦点从一次性任务求解转向了可积累、可复用的“技能”或“工作流知识”库的构建，这为复杂科学计算任务的长期自动化提供了一条务实路径。其局限性在于，技能的有效性严重依赖于底层物理求解器的可靠性和评估器的确定性，且“部分迁移”的结果表明，当前框架对于处理真正新颖、超出训练任务分布范围的问题泛化能力仍有待加强。若该框架能与更广泛的物理仿真器及多目标优化策略集成，有望成为连接高层次设计意图与底层专业仿真代码的通用中间层。

title: Towards Verifiable and Self-Correcting AI Physicists for Quantum Many-Body Simulations
abstract: Recent advances in automated scientific discovery have shown remarkable promise across frontier research domains, with agent systems driven by large language models (LLMs) emerging as powerful tools for physics research. However, in practical applications, LLM scientific research is prone to hallucinations, highlighting the need for reliable verification and error-correction mechanisms. Here we introduce PhysVEC, an automated multi-agent framework for verifiable and error-correcting AI-driven physics research. PhysVEC incorporates a programming verifier and a scientific verifier to ensure both coding correctness and physical validity, and provides human-auditable evidence at each stage. We curate QMB100, an end-to-end research-level benchmark dataset consisting of $100$ tasks extracted from $21$ high impact articles that focus on quantum many-body physics. We evaluated PhysVEC with four frontier LLMs and found that it significantly outperformed baselines in both programming tests and scientific tests across all LLMs and task categories. PhysVEC demonstrates effective inference-time scaling and delivers accurate physical predictions through integrated verification and error-correction mechanisms, paving the way for reliable and interpretable AI physicists.
zh_abstract: 自动化学术发现领域的最新进展在前沿研究领域展现出巨大潜力，其中基于大语言模型（LLM）驱动的智能体系统已成为物理学研究的强大工具。然而在实际应用中，LLM科研易产生幻觉现象，凸显了对可靠验证与纠错机制的需求。本文提出PhysVEC——一个可验证且具备纠错能力的自动多智能体框架，用于AI驱动的物理研究。PhysVEC集成编程验证器与科学验证器，确保代码正确性与物理有效性，并在各阶段提供可人工审计的证据链。我们构建了QMB100基准数据集，该端到端科研级数据集包含从21篇高影响力量子多体物理论文中提取的100项任务。通过四种前沿大语言模型的测试，PhysVEC在所有模型和任务类别的编程测试与科学测试中均显著超越基线方法。该框架展现出有效的推理时扩展能力，并通过集成验证与纠错机制实现精确的物理预测，为构建可靠且可解释的AI物理学家开辟了新路径。
introduction:
Automated scientific discovery has emerged as a transformative force across various frontier research fields, from accelerating machine learning , material synthesis , to reshaping experimental physics  and theoretical physics . Two developments underpin this surge: (1) large language models have markedly improved their capacity for multi-step reasoning, planning, and synthesis of technical information ; (2) the advancement of the agent paradigm has enabled these models to interact with external tools, execute code, and iteratively refine solutions in closed loops . Such systems dramatically lower the barrier for researchers to adopt diverse tools and compress the iteration cycle between theoretical insight and empirical verification. Beyond efficiency, automated systems open new possibilities for cross-disciplinary discovery, leveraging the LLMs' capability to connect and integrate insights across disciplines that human researchers might rarely bridge . Specifically, AI-driven systems find a particularly natural application in scientific simulations. Rather than merely processing literature, such systems can operate directly within the research pipeline by editing scripts, running simulations, post-processing data, and presenting results. Encouraged by these perspectives, several recent studies have demonstrated strong performance of LLM-based agents in various scientific simulation problems .

Despite this progress, critical gaps remain before AI-driven systems can be reliably deployed in practical research. In scientific simulations, ensuring both programming correctness and physical validity is essential. Although LLM-based agents have shown impressive performance in curated problems and exam-level tasks , reproducing the results of peer-reviewed journal articles presents a qualitatively more difficult challenge: it requires operating under realistic constraints and performing rigorous setup and computation. Moreover, LLM-generated scientific scripts often suf
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出了一个集成了编程验证器和科学验证器的多智能体框架，通过实时验证与自我修正机制，旨在解决AI驱动物理研究中普遍存在的幻觉与错误问题，并强调其过程的可审计性。

2. 关键结论: (1) 所提出的PhysVEC框架通过双重验证机制，在编程正确性和物理有效性上显著超越了基线方法；(2) 构建了QMB100基准数据集，该数据集源自高水平研究论文，为评估AI在真实复杂科研任务中的表现提供了高标准测试平台；(3) 框架展示了有效的推理时扩展能力，并能够通过集成验证与纠错机制产生准确的物理预测。

3. 专家点评: 该工作直面AI驱动科学研究中“幻觉”这一核心挑战，其提出的验证与自修正框架是迈向可靠、可解释“AI科学家”的关键一步，具有重要的方法论意义。然而，其有效性严重依赖于所构建的验证器（尤其是科学验证器）本身的完备性与正确性，这在开放、探索性的前沿科学问题中可能构成瓶颈；此外，框架在“纠错”后最终输出的物理结论，其新颖性与原创性尚未得到评估，这关系到此类系统是真正的研究伙伴还是高效的工具执行者。

title: Reliable and Efficient Automated Transition-State Searches with Machine-Learned Interatomic Potentials
abstract: Transition-state searches are central to understanding reaction mechanisms, but the high computational cost of density-functional theory (DFT) limits their application in high-throughput catalyst and materials discovery. Machine-learned interatomic potentials (MLIPs) offer near-DFT accuracy at orders-of-magnitude lower cost, yet their reliability for transition-state searches remains underexplored. Here, we systematically benchmark hybrid transition-state-search workflows combining six freely available potentials (MACE-OMol25, UMA-Small, UMA-Medium, eSEN-S, AIMNet2, and GFN2-xTB) with two reaction-path-finding algorithms (the freezing-string method and climbing-image nudged elastic band) across 58 diverse reactions spanning small organics, polymerization chemistry, and transition-metal catalysis. We find that models trained on the Open Molecules 2025 dataset exhibit markedly superior performance, with MACE-OMol25 achieving a 96.6% success rate while requiring fewer than four DFT-gradient evaluations per reaction on organic systems - a 94-96% reduction compared to conventional DFT-based searches. Low-level refinement on the MLIP surface before high-level DFT optimization reduces computational cost three-fold with minimal loss in reliability. For transition-metal systems, UMA-Medium demonstrates promising transferability to in-distribution transition metal complex reactions and out-of-distribution organometallic C-H activation. These results establish MLIP-accelerated workflows as practical tools for automated reaction discovery, enabling near-DFT accuracy at a fraction of traditional expense.
zh_abstract: 过渡态搜索是理解反应机理的核心，但密度泛函理论（DFT）的高计算成本限制了其在高通量催化剂与材料发现中的应用。机器学习原子间势（MLIPs）能以数量级更低的成本提供接近DFT的精度，然而其在过渡态搜索中的可靠性仍未得到充分探究。本文系统性地对混合过渡态搜索工作流程进行了基准测试，该流程结合了六种可自由获取的势函数（MACE-OMol25, UMA-Small, UMA-Medium, eSEN-S, AIMNet2 和 GFN2-xTB）与两种反应路径寻找算法（冻结弦方法和爬升图像微动弹性带法），测试涵盖58个涵盖小分子有机化学、聚合反应和过渡金属催化的多样化反应。我们发现，基于Open Molecules 2025数据集训练的模型表现出显著更优的性能，其中MACE-OMol25在有机体系上实现了96.6%的成功率，且每个反应所需的DFT梯度评估少于四次——相比传统的基于DFT的搜索，计算量减少了94-96%。在高级别DFT优化之前，先在MLIP势能面上进行低级别精修，能以极小的可靠性损失将计算成本降低三倍。对于过渡金属体系，UMA-Medium在分布内（in-distribution）的过渡金属配合物反应和分布外（out-of-distribution）的金属有机C-H活化反应中均展现出有前景的迁移性。这些结果确立了MLIP加速的工作流程可作为自动化反应发现的实用工具，以传统成本的一小部分实现接近DFT的精度。
introduction:
Determining reaction mechanisms is central to the design of new materials, catalysts, and synthetic routes. Experimental elucidation of mechanisms and reaction parameters is often challenging and resource intensive due to the rarity of barrier-crossing events and the fleeting nature of activated complexes such as transition states. Theoretical approaches therefore play an essential complementary role, providing mechanistic insight and, once validated, may enable high-throughput screening of reactive systems. Many theoretical methods center on identifying the transition state, whose relative energy and geometry determine the rate and selectivity of a reaction. The transition state is the highest energy point along the minimum-energy path (MEP) connecting reactant and product states, corresponding to a first-order saddle point on the Born–Oppenheimer potential-energy surface (PES). The energy of the transition state relative to the reactant and product states defines the activation barrier and thereby the reaction kinetics. Accurately capturing these energetics requires PESs from electronic-structure methods such as density-functional theory (DFT), which can accurately describe complex chemical phenomena including bond formation and dissociation. However, despite favorable scaling relative to post-Hartree–Fock methods, DFT-based searches quickly become prohibitively expensive in large systems or when multiple reactions are under investigation due to the non-linear scaling of DFT and large number of in-series PES evaluations required by TS-search algorithms. Consequently, there is a growing need for workflows that can generate high-quality TS guesses with minimal computational cost.

To address this issue, many algorithms have been developed to automate TS searches, including machine-learning algorithms that attempt to directly predict reaction parameters or TSs and methods based on a chain-of-states reaction-path representation that explore the PES. The latter group i
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 本文通过系统性的基准测试，首次明确建立了基于Open Molecules 2025数据集训练的机器学习原子间势函数（如MACE-OMol25）在自动化过渡态搜索工作流中的高可靠性（>96%成功率）与超高计算效率（相比传统DFT方法减少94-96%计算量），并将其适用范围从有机体系成功拓展至过渡金属催化反应。

2. 关键结论: 在有机反应体系中，基于OMol25数据集训练的MLIPs（特别是MACE-OMol25）表现出极高的成功率（96.6%）和计算效率（平均每个反应仅需不到4次DFT梯度计算）；在MLIP势能面上进行低精度预优化，再进行高精度DFT精修，能以三倍的计算成本降低换取可靠的结果；对于过渡金属体系，UMA-Medium模型显示出对分布内和部分分布外（如C-H活化）反应的良好迁移能力；综合而言，MLIP加速的工作流为实现高通量反应发现提供了兼具DFT精度与极低计算成本的实用工具。

3. 专家点评: 这项工作的核心价值在于其系统性和实用性，它并非提出新算法，而是通过严谨的基准测试，为计算化学社区提供了关于“哪些MLIP在过渡态搜索中真正可靠”的明确指南，有望显著推动MLIP从研究向日常应用的转变。然而，研究对“成功”的定义（如与DFT参考值的能量偏差阈值、几何收敛标准）需要更详细的说明，这直接影响结论的普适性。此外，尽管在过渡金属体系上展示了潜力，但测试集相对有限，其对于更复杂、多步或涉及强电子关联性的催化循环的普适性仍有待更严峻的考验。

title: Automating Computational Chemistry Workflows via OpenClaw and Domain-Specific Skills
abstract: Automating multistep computational chemistry tasks remains challenging because reasoning, workflow specification, software execution, and high-performance computing (HPC) execution are often tightly coupled. We demonstrate a decoupled agent-skill design for computational chemistry automation leveraging OpenClaw. Specifically, OpenClaw provides centralized control and supervision; schema-defined planning skills translate scientific goals into executable task specifications; domain skills encapsulate specific computational chemistry procedures; and DPDispatcher manages job execution across heterogeneous HPC environments. In a molecular dynamics (MD) case study of methane oxidation, the system completed cross-tool execution, bounded recovery from runtime failures, and reaction network extraction, illustrating a scalable and maintainable approach to multistep computational chemistry automation.
zh_abstract: 自动化执行多步骤计算化学任务仍然具有挑战性，因为推理、工作流规范、软件执行与高性能计算（HPC）执行通常紧密耦合。我们展示了一种基于 OpenClaw 的去耦合智能体-技能设计，用于实现计算化学自动化。具体而言，OpenClaw 提供集中式控制与监督；通过模式定义的规划技能将科学目标转化为可执行的任务规范；领域技能封装了特定的计算化学流程；而 DPDispatcher 则负责管理跨异构 HPC 环境的作业执行。在甲烷氧化的分子动力学（MD）案例研究中，该系统完成了跨工具执行、运行时故障的有界恢复以及反应网络提取，展示了一种可扩展且可维护的多步骤计算化学自动化方法。
introduction:
Computational chemistry has become an indispensable tool for probing,
predicting,
and rationalizing chemical and materials systems.
In practice,
however,
the major bottleneck is often not the lack of computational methods themselves,
but the difficulty of reliably coordinating heterogeneous software tools,
data representations,
and execution environments for multi-step research tasks.
Real applications routinely require molecular structure preparation,
input generation,
parameter configuration,
data-format conversion,
remote job submission,
monitoring,
error recovery,
and downstream analysis across multiple codes and platforms.
Because these operations are strongly interdependent,
automation depends not only on executing individual tools,
but also on maintaining consistency across task specification,
software invocation,
intermediate data handoff,
and HPC execution.
As such tasks become increasingly multi-step and data-intensive,
the central challenge is no longer simply to automate isolated calculations,
but to achieve robust,
reusable,
and auditable end-to-end automation.

One major line of prior work approaches this problem through workflow-based automation.
Representative examples include general workflow infrastructures such as AiiDA,
FireWorks,
and QMflows,
as well as domain-oriented workflow systems for specific scientific tasks.
In artificial intelligence (AI)-driven atomistic simulation,
for example,
DP-GEN and NepTrain automate active-learning cycles for machine-learning potentials; CatFlow and DP-TI support free-energy and thermodynamic-integration workflows; ChecMatE,
AutoSteper,
APEX,
and RiD-kit provide workflow support for machine-learning-potential-based materials and molecular simulations; and mech2d and maptool illustrate high-throughput materials-screening workflows.
These systems have proven highly effective for repetitive,
well-defined,
and high-throughput computational tasks by formalizing task dependencies,
provenance tracking,
data organizati
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出并验证了一种基于OpenClaw的、控制与执行解耦的“代理-技能”架构，用于实现可扩展、可维护且具备鲁棒性的端到端计算化学多步骤工作流自动化。

2. 关键结论: (1) 通过将高层推理与规划（代理）、领域特定计算过程（领域技能）以及异构高性能计算环境作业执行三者解耦，可以系统性地解决计算化学多步骤任务自动化中工具、数据和执行环境异质性强、相互依赖紧密的难题；(2) 该架构支持跨工具执行、运行时故障的有界恢复以及下游分析（如反应网络提取），在甲烷氧化分子动力学案例中得到了验证；(3) 相较于传统的、紧密耦合的工作流系统，该设计强调了可维护性和可扩展性，为构建复杂、长周期、数据密集型的自动化科学研究流程提供了新范式。

3. 专家点评: 这项工作从工程架构层面切入，精准地指出了当前计算化学自动化从“单点计算”迈向“智能流程”的核心瓶颈，其解耦思想具有重要的方法论意义。然而，其案例研究（甲烷氧化MD）相对经典，未能充分展示该框架在处理更复杂、不确定性更高的探索性任务（如未知反应路径自动搜索）时的能力与局限。此外，文中提及的“规划技能”如何获取与形式化复杂的化学直觉与决策逻辑，是决定该框架能否从“自动化”走向“智能化”的关键，但这一点未在现有材料中深入讨论，是未来需要关注的重点。

title: Mimosa Framework: Toward Evolving Multi-Agent Systems for Scientific Research
abstract: Current Autonomous Scientific Research (ASR) systems, despite leveraging large language models (LLMs) and agentic architectures, remain constrained by fixed workflows and toolsets that prevent adaptation to evolving tasks and environments. We introduce Mimosa, an evolving multi-agent framework that automatically synthesizes task-specific multi-agent workflows and iteratively refines them through experimental feedback. Mimosa leverages the Model Context Protocol (MCP) for dynamic tool discovery, generates workflow topologies via a meta-orchestrator, executes subtasks through code-generating agents that invoke available tools and scientific software libraries, and scores executions with an LLM-based judge whose feedback drives workflow refinement. On ScienceAgentBench, Mimosa achieves a success rate of 43.1% with DeepSeek-V3.2, surpassing both single-agent baselines and static multi-agent configurations. Our results further reveal that models respond heterogeneously to multi-agent decomposition and iterative learning, indicating that the benefits of workflow evolution depend on the capabilities of the underlying execution model. Beyond these benchmarks, Mimosa modular architecture and tool-agnostic design make it readily extensible, and its fully logged execution traces and archived workflows support auditability by preserving every analytical step for inspection and potential replication. Combined with domain-expert guidance, the framework has the potential to automate a broad range of computationally accessible scientific tasks across disciplines. Released as a fully open-source platform, Mimosa aims to provide an open foundation for community-driven ASR.
zh_abstract: 当前的自驱科学研究（ASR）系统，尽管利用了大型语言模型（LLMs）和智能体架构，仍受限于固定的工作流程和工具集，无法适应不断演进的任务与环境。我们提出了Mimosa，一个可演化的多智能体框架，它能够自动合成针对特定任务的多智能体工作流，并通过实验反馈对其进行迭代优化。Mimosa利用模型上下文协议（MCP）进行动态工具发现，通过一个元编排器生成工作流拓扑，通过调用可用工具和科学软件库的代码生成智能体执行子任务，并使用一个基于LLM的评判器对执行结果进行评分，其反馈驱动着工作流的持续改进。在ScienceAgentBench基准测试中，Mimosa结合DeepSeek-V3.2实现了43.1%的成功率，超越了单智能体基线以及静态多智能体配置。我们的结果进一步揭示，模型对多智能体任务分解和迭代学习的响应存在异质性，这表明工作流演化的效益取决于底层执行模型的能力。除了这些基准测试，Mimosa的模块化架构和工具无关设计使其易于扩展，其完整记录的执行轨迹和归档的工作流通过保留每一个分析步骤以供检查和潜在复现，支持了审计性。结合领域专家的指导，该框架有潜力跨学科自动化大量可通过计算完成的科学任务。作为完全开源的平台发布，Mimosa旨在为社区驱动的ASR提供一个开放的基础。
introduction:
Advances in automation, high-throughput experimentation, and computation
have greatly expanded the scientific community's capacity to generate
data---in fields such as biology, drug discovery, materials science, and
climate modeling---but the ability to transform these data into actionable
knowledge has not kept pace~. Researchers must
continually arbitrate between breadth and depth of analysis under the
practical constraints of time, expertise, and computational
resources~, even as pressing societal challenges
underscore the need for methods that accelerate knowledge generation
beyond current limits~.

Compounding this bottleneck, the fragmentation of methods, tools, and
reporting standards across laboratories has produced a reproducibility
crisis in which critical findings become difficult or impossible to
verify~. Reliable and unreliable results intermingle
within the scientific record, growing increasingly
indistinguishable~. When subsequent research builds
on this uncertain foundation without efficient means to audit prior
claims, the risk of misdirecting future work
escalates~.

Addressing these interconnected challenges requires systems that not only
automate scientific tasks at scale---whether purely computational or
involving laboratory instruments through digital interfaces---but do so
through transparent, adaptable workflows whose every analytical step is
recorded and auditable, both during the production cycle and when results
are communicated~.



Emerging paradigms such as Autonomous Scientific Research (ASR) and
Self-Driving Labs (SDLs)~ offer a
promising path forward by automating core scientific tasks and
experimentation. Recent systems leverage large language models (LLMs)
with expanded context windows, domain-specialized agentic architectures,
and reasoning frameworks such as tree-of-thought and tool-augmented
agents that execute multi-step experimental protocols with increasing
sophistication~.
State-of-the-art platforms propose to integrate in
conclusion:
We presented , a framework toward autonomous scientific research that adapts to available tools and iteratively refines multi-agent workflows for computational scientific tasks. Unlike static multi-agent systems,  combines adaptability during workflow evolution with predictability once refinement converges, yielding workflows that are both empirically optimized and stable for reuse.

 provides the scientific community a framework and toolset for helping conduct in-depth computational research, such as data analysis, statistical modeling, and simulation workflows. Both  and  are released as open-source software under the Apache License 2.0.

On the  benchmark, we achieved 43\

More broadly,  advocates a paradigm shift in scientific AI: from brittle, expert-designed pipelines to adaptive multi-agent frameworks that learn from experience. Population-based or open-ended evolutionary strategies remain a natural direction for future work.
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新：提出一个通过实验反馈驱动、能自动合成并迭代优化任务特定多智能体工作流的演化框架，实现了科学AI从静态、专家设计的管道向自适应、经验学习型系统的范式转变。
2. 关键结论：Mimosa框架在ScienceAgentBench基准测试上达到了43.1%的成功率，超越了单智能体基线和静态多智能体配置；不同的大语言模型对多智能体任务分解和迭代学习的响应存在异质性，表明工作流演化的收益依赖于底层执行模型的能力；其模块化、工具无关的设计以及全流程执行日志为实现可审计、可复现的自动化科学研究提供了开放基础。
3. 专家点评：该工作将动态工具发现、工作流拓扑生成与基于LLM的反馈闭环相结合，为解决当前自主科学研究系统流程僵化、难以适应动态任务环境的核心瓶颈提供了新颖且系统性的技术路径，其开源发布有望推动社区驱动的ASR发展。然而，43.1%的基准成功率虽具竞争力，但距离可靠、普适的自动化仍有显著差距，且其“黑盒”式LLM评判器的反馈质量与偏差可能成为迭代优化的关键瓶颈；未来需在更复杂的跨学科科学任务中验证其泛化能力，并深入探究工作流演化稳定性的内在机制。

title: SimMOF: AI agent for Automated MOF Simulations
abstract: Metal-organic frameworks (MOFs) offer a vast design space, and as such, computational simulations play a critical role in predicting their structural and physicochemical properties. However, MOF simulations remain difficult to access because reliable analysis require expert decisions for workflow construction, parameter selection, tool interoperability, and the preparation of computational ready structures. Here, we introduce SimMOF, a large language model based multi agent framework that automates end-to-end MOF simulation workflows from natural language queries. SimMOF translates user requests into dependency aware plans, generates runnable inputs, orchestrates multiple agents to execute simulations, and summarizes results with analysis aligned to the user query. Through representative case studies, we show that SimMOF enables adaptive and cognitively autonomous workflows that reflect the iterative and decision driven behavior of human researchers and as such provides a scalable foundation for data driven MOF research.
zh_abstract: 金属有机框架（MOFs）提供了广阔的设计空间，因此计算模拟在预测其结构和物理化学性质方面起着关键作用。然而，MOF模拟仍然难以普及，因为可靠的分析需要在工作流构建、参数选择、工具互操作性以及准备计算就绪结构等方面依赖专家决策。本文介绍SimMOF，一个基于大语言模型的多智能体框架，能够通过自然语言查询自动执行端到端的MOF模拟工作流。SimMOF将用户请求转化为具有依赖感知的计划，生成可运行的输入文件，协调多个智能体执行模拟，并根据用户查询对结果进行总结分析。通过代表性案例研究，我们展示了SimMOF能够实现自适应且认知自主的工作流，这些工作流反映了人类研究人员迭代和决策驱动的行为特征，从而为数据驱动的MOF研究提供了可扩展的基础。

title: A Comparative Study of Molecular Dynamics Approaches for Simulating Ionic Conductivity in Solid Lithium Electrolytes
abstract: Accurate prediction of ionic conductivity is critical for the design of high-performance solid-state electrolytes in next-generation batteries. We benchmark molecular dynamics (MD) approaches for computing ionic conductivity in 21 lithium solid electrolytes for which experimental ionic conductivity has been previously reported in the literature. In particular, we compare simulations driven by density functional theory (DFT) and by universal machine-learning interatomic potentials (uMLIPs), namely a MACE foundation model. We find comparable performance between DFT and MACE, despite MACE on one GPU more than 350 times faster than DFT on a 64-CPU node. The framework developed here is designed to enable systematic comparisons with additional uMLIPs and fine-tuned models in future work.
zh_abstract: 准确预测离子电导率对于设计下一代电池中的高性能固态电解质至关重要。我们对计算21种锂固态电解质离子电导率的分子动力学方法进行了基准测试，这些电解质的实验离子电导率先前已在文献中报道。具体而言，我们比较了基于密度泛函理论驱动的模拟与基于通用机器学习原子间势驱动的模拟，后者采用的是MACE基础模型。我们发现DFT与MACE性能相当，尽管MACE在单GPU上的计算速度比DFT在64核CPU节点上快350倍以上。本文开发的框架旨在为未来工作中与其他通用机器学习原子间势及微调模型进行系统性比较提供支持。

title: Neural operator accelerated atomistic to continuum concurrent multiscale simulations of viscoelasticity
abstract: We present a neural-operator-accelerated concurrent multiscale framework that couples atomistic simulations with continuum finite-element analysis for history-dependent materials, thereby making atomistic-continuum multiscale simulations of viscoelastic materials tractable. The approach replaces direct molecular dynamics (MD) evaluation of the constitutive response with a Recurrent Neural Operator (RNO) surrogate trained on atomistic simulations. The surrogate learns the strain-history-to-stress operator from molecular dynamics simulations and provides a discretization-independent approximation of the atomistic constitutive mapping, enabling efficient evaluation of stresses and latent internal variables at each quadrature point. The framework is implemented within an explicit finite-element solver, where the constitutive update reduces to inexpensive operator evaluations rather than repeated MD solves. Memory effects are represented through learned internal states, and transfer learning across temperature enables the surrogate to capture thermally dependent viscoelastic behavior. The method is assessed using polyurea through cyclic loading, Taylor impact, and plate impact simulations and compared with an experimentally calibrated viscoelastic polyurea model and a Johnson-Cook model. The neural-operator surrogate reproduces correct viscoelastic response while enabling atomistically informed dynamic simulations at scales that are not tractable with direct MD-FEM coupling.
zh_abstract: 本文提出一种神经算子加速的并发多尺度框架，该框架将原子尺度模拟与连续介质有限元分析相耦合，用于模拟具有历史依赖性的材料，从而使粘弹性材料的原子‑连续介质多尺度模拟变得可行。该方法采用基于原子模拟训练的循环神经算子替代本构响应的直接分子动力学计算。该代理模型从分子动力学模拟中学习应变历史‑应力算子，并提供与离散化无关的原子尺度本构映射近似，从而能够高效计算每个积分点处的应力与潜在内部变量。该框架在显式有限元求解器中实现，其本构更新简化为廉价的算子求值，而非重复的分子动力学求解。记忆效应通过学习得到的内部状态表示，跨温度的迁移学习使代理模型能够捕捉温度依赖的粘弹性行为。通过循环加载、泰勒冲击和平板冲击模拟对聚脲材料进行评估，并与实验标定的粘弹性聚脲模型及Johnson-Cook模型进行对比。神经算子代理模型在重现正确粘弹性响应的同时，实现了基于原子信息的大尺度动态模拟，其计算规模是直接分子动力学‑有限元耦合方法无法实现的。

title: AutoMS: Multi-Agent Evolutionary Search for Cross-Physics Inverse Microstructure Design
abstract: Designing microstructures that satisfy coupled cross-physics objectives is a fundamental challenge in material science. This inverse design problem involves a vast, discontinuous search space where traditional topology optimization is computationally prohibitive, and deep generative models often suffer from "physical hallucinations," lacking the capability to ensure rigorous validity. To address this limitation, we introduce AutoMS, a multi-agent neuro-symbolic framework that reformulates inverse design as an LLM-driven evolutionary search. Unlike methods that treat LLMs merely as interfaces, AutoMS integrates them as "semantic navigators" to initialize search spaces and break local optima, while our novel Simulation-Aware Evolutionary Search (SAES) addresses the "blindness" of traditional evolutionary strategies. Specifically, SAES utilizes simulation feedback to perform local gradient approximation and directed parameter updates, effectively guiding the search toward physically valid Pareto frontiers. Orchestrating specialized agents (Manager, Parser, Generator, and Simulator), AutoMS achieves a state-of-the-art 83.8\% success rate on 17 diverse cross-physics tasks, nearly doubling the performance of traditional NSGA-II (43.7\%) and significantly outperforming ReAct-based LLM baselines (53.3\%). Furthermore, our hierarchical architecture reduces total execution time by 23.3\%. AutoMS demonstrates that autonomous agent systems can effectively navigate complex physical landscapes, bridging the gap between semantic design intent and rigorous physical validity.
zh_abstract: 设计满足跨物理场耦合目标的微观结构是材料科学中的一个基础性挑战。该逆向设计问题涉及一个庞大且不连续的搜索空间，传统拓扑优化方法在此面临计算瓶颈，而深度生成模型则常出现“物理幻觉”，无法保证严格的物理有效性。为突破这一限制，我们提出了AutoMS，一个多智能体神经符号框架，将逆向设计重新构建为由大语言模型驱动的进化搜索。与仅将大语言模型作为接口的方法不同，AutoMS将其集成为“语义导航器”，以初始化搜索空间并打破局部最优，而我们提出的新型仿真感知进化搜索则解决了传统进化策略的“盲目性”问题。具体而言，SAES利用仿真反馈进行局部梯度近似和定向参数更新，有效地引导搜索朝向物理有效的帕累托前沿。通过协调多个专用智能体（管理器、解析器、生成器和模拟器），AutoMS在17项不同的跨物理场任务上实现了83.8%的最新成功率，几乎是传统NSGA-II方法（43.7%）性能的两倍，并显著优于基于ReAct的大语言模型基线方法（53.3%）。此外，我们的分层架构将总执行时间减少了23.3%。AutoMS证明了自主智能体系统能够有效探索复杂的物理设计空间，从而在语义设计意图与严格物理有效性之间架起桥梁。

title: Machine-Learned Interatomic Potentials for Predicting Physicochemical Properties of Molten Metal-Salt Systems for Calcium Electrolysis
abstract: The design of efficient electrolysis devices for pure metal production requires accurate data on the properties of the melts used in the process. This work focuses on two key systems for calcium production: the molten Ca-Cu alloy and the CaCl$_2$-KCl electrolyte. High-temperature experiments are often expensive and time-consuming; however, we demonstrate that molecular dynamics (MD) simulations driven by machine-learned Moment Tensor Potentials (MTPs), trained on highly accurate density functional theory data, offer an effective and accurate alternative. Our MTP-driven MD simulations accurately reproduce the structural, thermodynamic, and transport properties across a range of temperatures and compositions relevant to electrolysis systems. We report calculated densities, radial distribution functions, heat capacities, thermal conductivities, ionic conductivities (for the electrolyte), viscosities, and diffusion coefficients, with deviations from experimental data within 20%. The strong agreement between calculations and experiments validates the proposed approach, establishing a robust framework for the computational exploration and optimization of liquid systems in metallurgical applications.
zh_abstract: 设计用于纯金属生产的高效电解装置，需要准确掌握工艺中所用熔体的性质数据。本研究聚焦于钙生产的两个关键体系：熔融Ca-Cu合金与CaCl$_2$-KCl电解质。高温实验往往成本高昂且耗时，但我们证明，基于高精度密度泛函理论数据训练、由机器学习矩张量势能(MTPs)驱动的分子动力学(MD)模拟，提供了一种高效且精确的替代方案。我们的MTP驱动MD模拟准确复现了与电解体系相关的一系列温度和成分下的结构、热力学及输运性质。我们报道了计算得到的密度、径向分布函数、热容、热导率、离子电导率（针对电解质）、粘度及扩散系数，其与实验数据的偏差在20%以内。计算结果与实验的高度吻合验证了所提出的方法，为冶金应用中液体体系的计算机探索与优化建立了一个稳健的框架。
introduction:
Metallic calcium is a critical element with a wide range of industrial applications, including steelmaking, battery production, and the synthesis of advanced alloys and magnetic materials . As demand grows, improving calcium production methods is becoming increasingly important. The primary industrial route for producing high-purity calcium is molten salt electrolysis. This process involves two high-temperature liquid phases: a molten Ca-Cu alloy acting as a liquid cathode and a CaCl$_2$-based molten salt electrolyte .

Optimizing the efficiency of production processes is a key industrial objective. Multiphysics modeling using digital twins can greatly assist in these efforts . However, digital twins require precise knowledge of the structural, thermodynamic, and transport properties of both the electrolyte and the liquid cathode under operating conditions. This includes the temperature dependence of key properties such as density, viscosity, diffusion coefficients, thermal conductivity, heat capacity, and ionic conductivity.

To the best of our knowledge, a gap exists in the available data for several physicochemical properties of the liquid Ca-Cu alloy and CaCl$_2$-KCl molten salt. The temperature dependence of density has been measured for several compositions of molten Ca-Cu alloys . In contrast, structural investigations have been limited to pure Ca and Cu melts , leaving a gap in our understanding of the alloy structure. The heat capacity of Ca-Cu alloys remains unknown, and reported diffusion coefficients and viscosities require refinement, as they are available from only a single source  and contain inconsistencies. While the properties of the CaCl$_2$-KCl molten salts have been studied for other compositions , data for the specific 80:20 mass\

Acquiring these data through high-temperature experiments is often resource-intensive, expensive, and challenging, making such approaches impractical for the large-scale parameter screening—across composition, temp
conclusion:
In this work, we demonstrate that MTP-MD provides an accurate and efficient framework for simulating key systems in calcium electrolysis. Applied to the molten Ca-Cu cathode, the MTP's compositional transferability allows a single potential to reproduce physicochemical properties across the entire liquid composition range. For the CaCl$_2$-KCl molten salt electrolyte, we show that a local MTP effectively captures the structure and dynamics of the ionic melt. The results indicate that the MTP implicitly handles short-range electrostatics, enabling stable simulations. Furthermore, MTP-MD is significantly faster than AIMD.

An additional advantage of our approach is the use of MTP-MD to compute a wide range of physicochemical properties without fitting to experimental data. The calculated densities and radial distribution functions agree well with available experimental data, with errors of 3--4\

The success in modeling CaCl$_2$-KCl promises expansion to related electrolytes such as CaO-CaCl$_2$-KCl, CaCl$_2$-CaF$_2$, and CaCl$_2$-NaCl, enabling the prediction of how additives affect properties relevant to electrolysis. More broadly, the approach can be applied to optimize other high-temperature molten salt processes, e.g., production of aluminum, magnesium, and other metals.

Building on this validated foundation, the framework can be extended to tackle other critical challenges, such as calculating solubility and surface tension. Prior studies have successfully reported computed surface tension in alloys using MD , and given the accuracy of our MTPs in the bulk phase, we anticipate no impediment to modeling vacuum--alloy interfaces. Calculating solubility, as attempted for molten salt reactor-relevant salts , is a crucial next step, as it directly impacts electrolysis efficiency; for example, lower calcium solubility in the melt hinders Ca-Cu alloy enrichment and wastes energy. The calculation of these properties represents a clear and important direction for futu
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 本研究首次将基于机器学习矩张量势的分子动力学模拟系统地应用于钙电解体系，并验证了其在缺乏实验数据的熔融金属-合金和熔盐体系中，跨组分、跨物性类别的高精度预测能力。

2. 关键结论: (1) 训练于第一性原理数据的MTP势函数能够稳定、高效地模拟高温熔融Ca-Cu合金和CaCl2-KCl熔盐体系；(2) 单一MTP势函数对Ca-Cu合金展现出优异的成分迁移能力，可准确预测全液态成分范围内的多种物性；(3) MTP-MD计算的结构、热力学及输运性质（如密度、粘度、扩散系数、热导率、离子电导率等）与有限实验数据的偏差普遍在20%以内，部分关键物性（如密度）误差仅为3-4%；(4) 该方法计算效率远高于从头算分子动力学，为冶金过程液相体系的系统性计算探索和优化建立了可靠框架。

3. 专家点评: 这项工作展示了计算材料学在解决工业关键数据缺失问题上的巨大潜力，其构建的“第一性原理-机器学习势-分子动力学-宏观物性”全计算流程具有范式意义。然而，研究的说服力目前高度依赖于与有限且可能存在“不一致性”的实验数据的对比，缺乏更多独立、高精度实验的全面验证；此外，将方法推广至更复杂体系（如含杂质或其它阳离子的熔盐）时，势函数的迁移性和稳定性仍需进一步考验。若能通过后续研究填补这些空白，该方法有望成为冶金过程数字孪生的核心引擎。

title: The ground state of CuInP$_2$S$_6$ thin films: A study of the deep potential method
abstract: The two-dimensional ferroelectric (FE) material CuInP$_2$S$_6$ (CIPS) has garnered considerable interest due to its out-of-plane ferroelectricity at room temperature. However, a notable discrepancy exists between experiments and density functional theory (DFT) calculations regarding the ground state of CIPS thin films: experiments suggest a state with net polarization, while DFT predicts an antiferroelectric (AFE) state as the lowest-energy state. Here, we investigate the stability of polarization states in CIPS thin films by combining first-principles calculations with the deep potential (DP) method. Our results reveal that for films thicker than the bilayer, an AFE state that has intralayer AFE ordering in the inner layers and intralayer FE ordering in the two surface layers has the lowest electronic energy. This state is significantly lower than the uniform FE state. In addition, we find that a ferrielectric (FiE) state with pure intralayer FE ordering is very close to the AFE state in energy. By using the DP model, we calculated the phonon free energy of CIPS thin films. For the monolayer, the intralayer FE ordering possesses a lower phonon free energy than the intralayer AFE ordering. This energetic preference for the intralayer FE ordering maintains as the thickness grows. Consequently, when the phonon-free energy is incorporated, the FiE state becomes energetically favorable over the AFE state for multilayers CIPS. Our findings demonstrate that the inclusion of vibrational entropy stabilizes the FiE state as the ground state in multilayers CIPS at finite temperatures, reconciling the previous discrepancy between experimental observations and DFT predictions. This insight is vital for understanding the FE properties of CIPS and its potential applications in devices.
zh_abstract: 二维铁电材料CuInP$_2$S$_6$（CIPS）因其在室温下具有面外铁电性而受到广泛关注。然而，关于CIPS薄膜基态的实验结果与密度泛函理论计算之间存在显著差异：实验表明其存在净极化态，而DFT预测反铁电态为能量最低态。本文通过结合第一性原理计算与深度势能方法，研究了CIPS薄膜中极化态的稳定性。我们的结果表明，对于双层以上的薄膜，一种在内部层呈现层内反铁电序、在两个表面层呈现层内铁电序的反铁电态具有最低的电子能量。该状态的能量显著低于均匀铁电态。此外，我们发现具有纯层内铁电序的亚铁电态在能量上与反铁电态非常接近。通过使用DP模型，我们计算了CIPS薄膜的声子自由能。对于单层CIPS，层内铁电序的声子自由能低于层内反铁电序。这种对层内铁电序的能量偏好随着厚度增加而保持。因此，当计入声子自由能后，对于多层CIPS，亚铁电态在能量上变得比反铁电态更有利。我们的研究结果表明，振动熵的引入使得亚铁电态在有限温度下成为多层CIPS的稳定基态，这解释了先前实验观察与DFT预测之间的矛盾。这一认识对于理解CIPS的铁电性质及其在器件中的潜在应用至关重要。
introduction:
Ferroelectric (FE) materials have promising applications in non-volatile memory devices with ultra-high storage density and low power consumption~. The discovery of two-dimensional FE materials such as CuInP$_2$S$_6$ (CIPS)~, In$_2$Se$_3$~, and SnTe~ favors miniaturization of the devices. Among the 2D ferroelectrics, CIPS has attracted much attention due to its stable out-of-plane ferroelectricity at room temperature~. In addition, it exhibits various exotic properties, including tunable quadruple-well polarization states~, negative longitudinal piezoelectricity~, and the bulk photovoltaic effect~. In particular, a recent study found that CIPS thin films can be controlled in double, quadruple, and sextuple polarization states~. 

In the CIPS crystal, each monolayer consists of a sulfur framework with octahedral voids occupied by metal cations (Cu$^{}$, In$^{}$) and P-P pairs, which are arranged in triangular patterns. The emergence of out-of-plane ferroelectricity primarily stems from the antiparallel displacements of the two distinct cations relative to the layer's central plane~. Experimental studies have confirmed the persistence of 2D ferroelectricity in CIPS films down to 4 nm thickness (corresponding to $$ 6 CIPS layers)~. However, DFT calculations find that an intralayer AFE ordering has a much lower energy than the FE ordering for the monolayer~. Whereas the bilayer tends to have intralayer FE orderings that are antiferroelectrically coupled between layers, i.e., interlayer AFE ordering. For the trilayer, a state involving the intralayer AFE ordering in the inner layer and intralayer FE ordering in the two surface layers is found to be the lowest energy state~. Recently, an interlayer AFE state similar to that for the bilayer was found to be more stable than the FE state for CIPS thin films~. This state displays the intralayer FE ordering across all layers, with the surface layer exhibiting antiparallel polarization relative to its adjacent sublayer, forming
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 通过结合第一性原理计算与深度势能方法，首次将声子自由能纳入考量，揭示了振动熵在有限温度下稳定多层CuInP2S6薄膜铁电态的关键作用，从而弥合了实验观测与DFT预测之间的长期分歧。
2. 关键结论: (1) 对于超过双层的CIPS薄膜，基态电子能最低的是一种特殊的反铁电态，其内层为层内AFE序而两个表层为层内FE序；(2) 一种层内纯FE序的铁电态在电子能上与上述AFE态非常接近；(3) 在单层CIPS中，层内FE序的声子自由能低于层内AFE序，且这一趋势随厚度增加得以保持；(4) 当计入声子自由能（即考虑有限温度效应）后，铁电态在能量上变得比反铁电态更稳定，成为多层CIPS的基态。
3. 专家点评: 本工作的核心价值在于超越了传统零温DFT的静态能量比较框架，通过引入深度势能方法高效计算声子自由能，明确指出了熵效应在决定二维铁电体基态中的决定性作用。这不仅为CIPS体系的实验-理论矛盾提供了令人信服的解释，更强调了在预测低维功能材料性质时考虑有限温度效应的普适重要性。然而，研究主要关注体相振动模的贡献，对于二维薄膜中可能更为突出的表面声子模、非谐效应以及电子-声子耦合的贡献，未来可能需要更精细的考察以完善其物理图像。

title: How unconstrained machine-learning models learn physical symmetries
abstract: The requirement of generating predictions that exactly fulfill the fundamental symmetry of the corresponding physical quantities has profoundly shaped the development of machine-learning models for physical simulations. In many cases, models are built using constrained mathematical forms that ensure that symmetries are enforced exactly. However, unconstrained models that do not obey rotational symmetries are often found to have competitive performance, and to be able to \emph{learn} to a high level of accuracy an approximate equivariant behavior with a simple data augmentation strategy. In this paper, we introduce rigorous metrics to measure the symmetry content of the learned representations in such models, and assess the accuracy by which the outputs fulfill the equivariant condition. We apply these metrics to two unconstrained, transformer-based models operating on decorated point clouds (a graph neural network for atomistic simulations and a PointNet-style architecture for particle physics) to investigate how symmetry information is processed across architectural layers and is learned during training. Based on these insights, we establish a rigorous framework for diagnosing spectral failure modes in ML models. Enabled by this analysis, we demonstrate that one can achieve superior stability and accuracy by strategically injecting the minimum required inductive biases, preserving the high expressivity and scalability of unconstrained architectures while guaranteeing physical fidelity.
zh_abstract: 生成严格满足对应物理量基本对称性的预测要求，深刻影响了物理模拟机器学习模型的发展。在许多情况下，模型通过采用受约束的数学形式构建，以确保对称性被精确满足。然而，不遵循旋转对称性的无约束模型常表现出可竞争的性能，并能通过简单的数据增强策略，以高精度“学习”到近似等变行为。本文引入严格的度量标准，以衡量此类模型中学习到的表示所包含的对称性内容，并评估其输出满足等变条件的准确度。我们将这些度量应用于两种基于Transformer的无约束模型（一种用于原子模拟的图神经网络和一种用于粒子物理的PointNet风格架构），这些模型处理带标记的点云数据，以研究对称信息如何在架构层间传递并在训练过程中被学习。基于这些发现，我们建立了一个严格的框架，用于诊断机器学习模型中的谱失效模式。通过此分析，我们证明，通过策略性地注入所需的最小归纳偏置，可以在保持无约束架构高表达能力和可扩展性的同时保证物理保真度，从而实现更优的稳定性和准确性。
introduction:
Symmetries are a cornerstone of modern physics. Their profound connection with conservation laws is enshrined in Noether's theorem, a principle that has long guided the formalization of empirical phenomena into theoretical frameworks and served as a foundation for the development of new theories~. 
Different fields of physical science are characterized by distinct symmetry groups, such as the orthogonal group $$ in molecular mechanics~, the Lorentz group $$ in high-energy physics~, and the special unitary groups $(2^N)$ and $(3)$ in quantum mechanics and chromodynamics, respectively~.
Consequently, in the development of data-driven models for physics, incorporating physical symmetries has been often regarded as the most natural choice. This approach has led to the rapid and fruitful development of machine-learning (ML) approaches across the physical sciences, with atomistic simulations standing out as a very successful application domain~. However, ensuring that a model strictly preserves group equivariance, guaranteeing that outputs transform predictably under group actions on the input, imposes rigid architectural constraints that can be computationally expensive, and limits the expressivity of models~.

Conversely, mainstream computer science and machine learning methods have evolved to maximize architectural expressivity and efficiency, letting domain-specific inductive biases be learned directly from the data. 
Recently, there has been growing interest in applying these ``unconstrained'' models to physics and chemistry, with notable examples being the release of AlphaFold 3, which relaxed the strict equivariant constraints of previous versions~, the classification of plasma crystals~, galaxy morphology~, and particle traces~ using PointNet-like architectures~. 
By relaxing strict equivariance constraints, these models aim for increased fitting power and computational efficiency at the expense of having to learn fundamental symmetries from data, typically throug
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新：本文通过引入严格的度量标准来量化无约束机器学习模型在训练过程中学习到的物理对称性程度，并基于此分析建立了一个诊断模型频谱失效模式的严谨框架。
2. 关键结论：无约束模型（如基于Transformer的架构）能够通过数据增强等策略，以高精度近似学习到等变行为；通过分析模型各层对对称性信息的处理，可以识别其“频谱失效模式”；在无约束架构中策略性地注入最小限度的归纳偏置，可以在保持高表达力和可扩展性的同时，保证物理保真度，实现更优的稳定性和准确性。
3. 专家点评：这项工作为评估“黑箱”式无约束模型在物理应用中的可靠性提供了关键的分析工具，其诊断框架具有重要的方法论价值。然而，其结论高度依赖于所选择的度量标准和模型架构的普适性有待进一步验证；此外，文中提及的“最小限度归纳偏置”的注入策略缺乏普适性指导原则，如何在不同物理场景中具体实现仍是开放性问题。这标志着该领域从“是否使用约束模型”的争论，转向了“如何量化与优化无约束模型物理一致性”的更精细研究阶段。

title: Small-Data Machine Learning Uncovers Decoupled Control Mechanisms of Crystallinity and Surface Morphology in $β$-Ga2O3 Epitaxy
abstract: The ultrawide-bandgap semiconductor $β$-Ga2O3 holds exceptional promise for next-generation power electronics and deep-ultraviolet optoelectronics, yet its widespread application is hindered by the lack of cost-effective, high-quality heteroepitaxial thin films. Here, we demonstrate an interpretable machine learning framework that efficiently navigates the complex, multiparameter process space of pulsed laser deposition (PLD) to achieve high-crystallinity $β$-Ga2O3 epitaxy on c-plane sapphire. By systematically benchmarking nine regression algorithms under limited experimental data conditions, we identify quadratic polynomial ridge regression as the optimal surrogate model, which combines predictive accuracy (R$^2$ $\approx$ 0.86) with full physical transparency through explicit analytical coefficients. Coupling this model with SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations) analysis and iterative experimental design, we construct a closed-loop optimization workflow that progressively refines the process-performance landscape over only three experimental rounds. This data-efficient strategy reduces the X-ray rocking curve (RC) full-width at half-maximum (FWHM) by 70$\%$ from > 3$^{\circ}$ to 0.92$^{\circ}$, which is the best reported value for PLD-grown $β$-Ga2O3 on sapphire. Intriguingly, concurrent modeling of surface roughness reveals that crystalline quality and surface morphology are governed by distinct dominant factors: temperature primarily controls bulk crystallinity, whereas oxygen pressure dictates surface kinetics. This decoupled mechanism, quantitatively captured for the first time via feature importance analysis, provides actionable physical insight for independent optimization of structural and morphological properties. Our work establishes a generalizable, resource-efficient paradigm for intelligent process development in oxide epitaxy and beyond.
zh_abstract: 超宽禁带半导体β-Ga2O3在下一代功率电子学和深紫外光电子学领域展现出非凡潜力，但其广泛应用受制于缺乏成本效益高、质量优良的异质外延薄膜。本文提出一种可解释的机器学习框架，通过高效探索脉冲激光沉积（PLD）复杂多参数工艺空间，在c面蓝宝石上实现了高质量β-Ga2O3外延生长。通过在有限实验数据条件下系统评估九种回归算法，确定二次多项式岭回归为最优代理模型，该模型兼具预测精度（R²≈0.86）与通过显式解析系数实现的全物理透明性。结合SHAP（SHapley加性解释）分析与迭代实验设计，我们构建了闭环优化工作流，仅经过三轮实验便逐步完善了工艺-性能关系图谱。这种数据高效策略将X射线摇摆曲线半高宽从>3°降低至0.92°，降幅达70%，是当前报道中PLD在蓝宝石上生长β-Ga2O3的最佳结果。值得关注的是，对表面粗糙度的同步建模表明晶体质量与表面形貌受不同主导因素调控：温度主要控制体相结晶度，而氧压主导表面动力学。这种解耦机制首次通过特征重要性分析得以量化捕获，为结构和形貌特性的独立优化提供了可操作的物理见解。本研究为氧化物外延及其他领域的智能工艺开发建立了可推广、资源高效的范式。

title: Autotuning T-PaiNN: Enabling Data-Efficient GNN Interatomic Potential Development via Classical-to-Quantum Transfer Learning
abstract: Machine-learned interatomic potentials (MLIPs), particularly graph neural network (GNN)-based models, offer a promising route to achieving near-density functional theory (DFT) accuracy at significantly reduced computational cost. However, their practical deployment is often limited by the large volumes of expensive quantum mechanical training data required. In this work, we introduce a transfer learning framework, Transfer-PaiNN (T-PaiNN), that substantially improves the data efficiency of GNN-MLIPs by leveraging inexpensive classical force field data. The approach consists of pretraining a PaiNN MLIP architecture on large-scale datasets generated from classical molecular simulations, followed by fine-tuning (dubbed autotuning) using a comparatively small DFT dataset. We demonstrate the effectiveness of autotuning T-PaiNN on both gas-phase molecular systems (QM9 dataset) and condensed-phase liquid water. Across all cases, T-PaiNN significantly outperforms models trained solely on DFT data, achieving order-of-magnitude reductions in mean absolute error while accelerating training convergence. For example, using the QM9 data set, error reductions of up to 25 times are observed in low-data regimes, while liquid water simulations show improved predictions of energies, forces, and experimentally relevant properties such as density and diffusion. These gains arise from the model's ability to learn general features of the potential energy surface from extensive classical sampling, which are subsequently refined to quantum accuracy. Overall, this work establishes transfer learning from classical force fields as a practical and computationally efficient strategy for developing high-accuracy, data-efficient GNN interatomic potentials, enabling broader application of MLIPs to complex chemical systems.
zh_abstract: 机器学习原子间势函数（MLIPs），特别是基于图神经网络（GNN）的模型，为实现接近密度泛函理论（DFT）的精度同时显著降低计算成本提供了一条有前景的路径。然而，其实际应用往往受限于所需的大量昂贵的量子力学训练数据。在本工作中，我们引入了一种迁移学习框架——Transfer-PaiNN（T-PaiNN），该框架通过利用廉价的经典力场数据，大幅提升了GNN-MLIPs的数据效率。该方法包括先在经典分子模拟生成的大规模数据集上预训练一个PaiNN MLIP架构，然后使用相对较小的DFT数据集进行微调（称为自动调优）。我们在气相分子系统（QM9数据集）和凝聚相液态水上验证了自动调优T-PaiNN的有效性。在所有案例中，T-PaiNN均显著优于仅用DFT数据训练的模型，实现了平均绝对误差数量级的降低，同时加速了训练收敛。例如，使用QM9数据集，在低数据量情况下观察到误差降低高达25倍；而液态水模拟则显示其在能量、力以及密度和扩散系数等实验相关性质上的预测能力得到提升。这些改进源于模型能够从广泛的经典采样中学习势能面的一般特征，随后将其精修至量子精度。总体而言，这项工作确立了从经典力场进行迁移学习作为一种实用且计算高效的策略，可用于开发高精度、数据高效的GNN原子间势函数，从而推动MLIPs在复杂化学系统中更广泛的应用。

title: Fine-tuning universal machine learning potentials for transition state search in surface catalysis
abstract: Determining transition states (TSs) of surface reactions is central to understanding and designing heterogeneous catalysts but remains computationally prohibitive with density functional theory (DFT). While machine learning potentials (MLPs) offer significant speedups, task-specific models have limited transferability across catalytic systems, and universal MLPs (uMLPs) lack the accuracy needed for reactive configurations. Here, we present a workflow based on active learning to iteratively fine-tune uMLPs for DFT-quality TS search. Using 250 TSs from the CO2 hydrogenation reaction network on metal and single-atom alloy surfaces, we first benchmark TS search algorithms, identifying the Sella algorithm as most robust, and propose a modification (Bond-Aware Sella) that substantially improves its success rate. We then explore sequential and batch active-learning strategies for fine-tuning and show that DFT-quality TS structures can be found using only 8 DFT single-point calculations on average per structure. This demonstrates the viability of fine-tuned uMLPs for high-throughput catalyst screening.
zh_abstract: 确定表面反应的过渡态（TSs）是理解和设计多相催化剂的核心，但利用密度泛函理论（DFT）进行计算仍然成本高昂。虽然机器学习势函数（MLPs）能显著提升计算速度，但针对特定任务训练的模型在催化体系间的可迁移性有限，而通用机器学习势函数（uMLPs）在反应构型的准确性上有所不足。本文提出一种基于主动学习的工作流程，用于迭代微调uMLPs，以实现DFT精度的过渡态搜索。利用金属和单原子合金表面CO2加氢反应网络中的250个过渡态，我们首先对过渡态搜索算法进行了基准测试，确定Sella算法最为稳健，并提出一种改进版本（键感知Sella算法），大幅提升了其成功率。随后，我们探索了用于微调的序贯与批量主动学习策略，结果表明平均每个结构仅需约8次DFT单点计算即可找到DFT精度的过渡态结构。这证明了微调后的uMLPs用于高通量催化剂筛选的可行性。

title: Aluminum solidification and nanopolycrystal deformation via a Graph Neural Network Potential and Million-Atom Simulations
abstract: Solidification governs the microstructure and, therefore, the mechanical response of metal components, yet the atomistic details of nucleation and defect formation are often difficult to determine experimentally. Molecular dynamics can bridge this gap, but only if the interatomic model is both accurate and computationally efficient. Here, we develop a Machine Learning Potential (MLP) for aluminum and demonstrate its near ab initio fidelity when trained with the sequential-refinement workflow that fine-tunes the model on low-energy structures. The favorable scaling of the model enables nanosecond simulations involving millions of atoms, thereby overcoming finite-size effects in simulations of polycrystalline solidification and subsequent mechanical testing. Comparison with classical potentials and recent MLP models, including a general-purpose model, shows that inaccuracies in stacking-fault energetics and diffusion can lead to qualitatively incorrect solidified grain structures and post-solidification mechanical behavior. Since our framework is based on an equivariant graph neural network, it allows for straightforward extensions to multi-component systems, providing valuable guidance for the future design and fine-tuning of both specialized and universal MLPs in computational mechanics simulations.
zh_abstract: 凝固过程主导金属部件的微观结构，进而决定其力学响应，但成核与缺陷形成的原子尺度细节往往难以通过实验测定。分子动力学方法可以弥合这一鸿沟，但前提是原子间相互作用模型兼具高精度与计算高效性。本研究针对铝开发了一种机器学习势函数（Machine Learning Potential, MLP），并通过采用对低能结构进行微调的序贯优化工作流进行训练，证明了该势函数具有接近第一性原理的精度。该模型良好的计算缩放特性使得模拟数百万原子、历时纳秒的体系成为可能，从而克服了多晶凝固及后续力学测试模拟中的有限尺寸效应。通过与经典势函数及近期MLP模型（包括通用模型）的对比发现，堆垛层错能学与扩散性质的误差会导致凝固晶粒结构及凝固后力学行为出现定性层面的错误。由于本框架基于等变图神经网络（Equivariant Graph Neural Network），其可便捷扩展至多组元体系，为未来计算力学模拟中专用途与通用MLP的设计与微调提供了有价值的指导。

title: ChargeFlow: Flow-Matching Refinement of Charge-Conditioned Electron Densities
abstract: Accurate charge densities are central to electronic-structure theory, but computing charge-state-dependent densities with density functional theory remains too expensive for large-scale screening and defect workflows. We present ChargeFlow, a flow-matching refinement model that transforms a charge-conditioned superposition of atomic densities into the corresponding DFT electron density on the native periodic real-space grid using a 3D U-Net velocity field. Trained on 9,502 charged Materials Project-derived calculations and evaluated on an external 1,671-structure benchmark spanning perovskites, charged defects, diamond defects, metal-organic frameworks, and organic crystals, ChargeFlow is not uniformly best on every in-distribution class but is strongest on problems dominated by nonlocal charge redistribution and charge-state extrapolation, improving deformation-density error from 3.62% to 3.21% and charge- response cosine similarity from 0.571 to 0.655 relative to a ResNet baseline. The predicted densities remain chemically useful under downstream analysis, yielding successful Bader partitioning on all 1,671 benchmark structures and high-fidelity electrostatic potentials, which positions flow matching as a practical density-refinement strategy for charged materials.
zh_abstract: 精确的电荷密度是电子结构理论的核心，但通过密度泛函理论计算电荷态依赖的密度对于大规模筛选和缺陷工作流程而言仍然过于昂贵。我们提出了 ChargeFlow，一种流匹配优化模型，它利用三维 U-Net 速度场，将电荷条件化的原子密度叠加转换为对应的周期性实空间网格上的 DFT 电子密度。该模型在 9,502 个源自 Materials Project 的带电结构计算数据上进行训练，并在一个包含钙钛矿、带电缺陷、金刚石缺陷、金属有机框架和有机晶体的外部 1,671 个结构基准集上进行评估。ChargeFlow 并非在每一个分布内类别上都表现最佳，但在非局域电荷重分布和电荷态外推主导的问题上表现最强，相对于 ResNet 基线，它将形变密度误差从 3.62% 降低到 3.21%，将电荷响应余弦相似度从 0.571 提升到 0.655。预测的密度在下游分析中仍具有化学实用性，在全部 1,671 个基准结构上均成功实现了 Bader 划分，并能生成高保真的静电势。这确立了流匹配作为一种实用的带电材料密度优化策略的地位。

title: An Efficient High-Degree, High-Order Equivariant Graph Neural Network for Direct Crystal Structure Optimization
abstract: Crystal structure optimization is fundamental to materials modeling but remains computationally expensive when performed with density-functional theory (DFT). Machine-learning (ML) approaches offer substantial acceleration, yet existing methods face three key limitations: (i) most models operate solely on atoms and treat lattice vectors implicitly, despite their central role in structural optimization; (ii) they lack efficient mechanisms to capture high-degree angular information and higher-order geometric correlations simultaneously, which are essential for distinguishing subtle structural differences; and (iii) many pipelines are multi-stage or iterative rather than truly end-to-end, making them prone to error accumulation and limiting scalability. Here we present E$^{3}$Relax-H$^{2}$, an end-to-end high-degree, high-order equivariant graph neural network that maps an initial crystal directly to its relaxed structure. The key idea is to promote both atoms and lattice vectors to graph nodes, enabling a unified and symmetry-consistent representation of structural degrees of freedom. Building on this formulation, E$^{3}$Relax-H$^{2}$ introduces two message-passing mechanisms: (i) a high-degree, high-order message-passing module that efficiently captures high-degree angular representations and high-order many-body correlations; and (ii) a lattice-atom message-passing module that explicitly models the bidirectional coupling between lattice deformation and atomic displacement. In addition, we propose a differentiable periodicity-aware Cartesian displacement loss tailored for one-shot structure prediction under periodic boundary conditions.
zh_abstract: 晶体结构优化是材料建模的基础，但在使用密度泛函理论（DFT）进行计算时仍然非常耗时。机器学习（ML）方法提供了显著的加速，但现有方法面临三个关键局限：（i）大多数模型仅作用于原子，并隐含地处理晶格矢量，尽管晶格矢量在结构优化中起着核心作用；（ii）它们缺乏同时高效捕捉高角度信息和高阶几何关联的机制，而这些对于区分细微的结构差异至关重要；（iii）许多流程是多阶段或迭代式的，而非真正的端到端，这使得它们容易产生误差累积并限制可扩展性。在此，我们提出E$^{3}$Relax-H$^{2}$，一个端到端的高角度、高阶等变图神经网络，能够将初始晶体直接映射到其弛豫结构。其核心思想是将原子和晶格矢量都提升为图节点，从而实现结构自由度的统一且对称性一致的表示。基于此框架，E$^{3}$Relax-H$^{2}$引入了两种消息传递机制：（i）高角度、高阶消息传递模块，可高效捕捉高角度表示和高阶多体关联；（ii）晶格-原子消息传递模块，显式建模晶格变形与原子位移之间的双向耦合。此外，我们提出了一种专为周期性边界条件下单步结构预测设计的可微分、周期性感知的笛卡尔位移损失函数。
introduction:
Structural optimization, the process of driving a crystal structure to its minimum-energy configuration (commonly called the relaxed structure), is a fundamental step in computational materials science, as most material properties are evaluated based on the relaxed geometry. Traditionally, this task is carried out using  methods such as density functional theory (DFT) . However, DFT-based relaxation is computationally expensive due to its two nested iterative loops (Figure (a)): the inner loop repeatedly solves the Kohn-Sham equations to self-consistency to obtain energies and forces, while the outer loop updates atomic coordinates until the forces fall below a convergence threshold. Together, these loops require substantial computation to reach the minimum-energy structure.

[!tb]
  
  [width=2]{figure/structure_relaxation.jpg}
  {Comparison of structural optimization using DFT and machine learning.
  (a) Conventional DFT-based structural relaxation, which involves two nested loops: an inner self-consistent electronic optimization and an outer geometry update loop.
  (b) Iterative ML-based relaxation methods, where a learned force field replaces the DFT inner loop, but an explicit geometry-update loop is still required.
  (c) Existing iteration-free ML approaches that bypass iterative relaxation by first predicting relaxed interatomic distances and subsequently reconstructing atomic coordinates.
  (d) Our iteration-free, end-to-end structure optimization framework, which directly predicts atomic and lattice displacements under SE(3)-equivariance, enabling a single forward pass from the initial structure to the relaxed configuration without intermediate optimization steps.}
  


To mitigate the high computational cost of DFT-based structure optimization, machine learning (ML) has emerged as a promising alternative for efficiently predicting relaxed crystal structures. Existing ML approaches can be broadly categorized into iterative methods  and iteration-free method
conclusion: In this work, we presented E$^{3}$Relax-H$^{2}$, an end-to-end equivariant graph neural network for iteration-free crystal structure optimization. The proposed method addresses key limitations of existing approaches, including the lack of explicit lattice modeling, the difficulty of efficiently capturing high-degree angular information and high-order geometric correlations. Experiments on six benchmark datasets spanning both 2D and 3D materials show that E$^{3}$Relax-H$^{2}$ achieves state-of-the-art or highly competitive structural accuracy while maintaining high computational efficiency. DFT validation further confirms the physical validity of the predicted structures. Ablation and complexity analyses show that these gains come from the combined benefits of the novel designs, with only modest additional computational cost. These results establish E$^{3}$Relax-H$^{2}$ as an effective framework for one-shot crystal structure optimization.
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出了一种将晶格向量提升为图节点并与原子节点统一处理的端到端等变图神经网络，通过高效的高阶高次消息传递机制，直接一次性预测弛豫晶体结构，无需迭代优化。

2. 关键结论: (1) 通过将晶格向量作为图节点，实现了结构自由度（原子位移与晶格形变）在SE(3)等变约束下的统一建模；(2) 设计的高阶高次消息传递模块能同时高效捕捉高次角向信息与高阶几何关联，对区分细微结构差异至关重要；(3) 所提出的框架在多个基准数据集上实现了具有竞争力的结构预测精度与计算效率，并通过DFT验证了其物理合理性。

3. 专家点评: 该工作将晶格自由度显式纳入图神经网络框架是一个重要且务实的进展，直接回应了现有方法的关键缺陷。其“一步到位”的预测范式若能在更广泛的材料体系和更复杂的势能面场景（如存在多个亚稳态）中得到验证，将对高通量计算材料发现产生显著影响。然而，论文目前展示的“DFT验证”仍需更深入的分析，例如预测结构与DFT弛豫结构在能量上的直接对比、对相变边界附近结构稳定性的预测能力等，以充分证明其替代传统迭代弛豫流程的可靠性。

title: Active learning-enabled multi-objective design of thermally conductive and mechanically compliant polymers
abstract: Polymers are attractive in applications like flexible electronics and thermal interface materials due to their mechanical compliance and processability. However, conventional polymers have low thermal conductivity (TC), limiting their heat dissipation performance. Identifying polymers that simultaneously achieve high intrinsic TC and mechanical flexibility (i.e., low modulus) remains a challenge. Here, we develop an active learning (AL) framework based on multi-objective Bayesian optimization (MOBO) to discover polymers exhibiting both high TC and low bulk modulus. Initially, a high-throughput molecular dynamics (MD) pipeline generated an initial dataset, and independent Deep Kernel Learning (DKL) surrogate models were trained for TC and bulk modulus to predict properties and uncertainties. Using the parallel noisy expected hypervolume improvement (qNEHVI) acquisition function, the framework iteratively screens a larger unlabeled polymer database, systematically recommends new polymer candidates for MD evaluation, and updates the DKL models with newly acquired data. Ultimately, six candidates were identified on the Pareto front, representing optimal trade-offs between TC and modulus. Interpretability analysis further revealed molecular features associated with these trade-offs, and synthesizability assessment supported the practical relevance of the selected candidates. By combining MD simulations with AL-enabled MOBO, our workflow mitigates data scarcity, reduces development time, and provides actionable guidance for designing multifunctional polymers tailored for different applications.
zh_abstract: 聚合物因其良好的机械顺应性和加工性，在柔性电子器件和热界面材料等领域具有广阔的应用前景。然而，传统聚合物的导热系数较低，限制了其散热性能。寻找同时具备高本征导热系数和机械柔性（即低模量）的聚合物仍是一个挑战。本文开发了一种基于多目标贝叶斯优化的主动学习框架，用于发现兼具高导热系数和低体模量的聚合物。首先，通过高通量分子动力学流程生成了一个初始数据集，并分别针对导热系数和体模量训练了独立的深度核学习代理模型，以预测材料属性及其不确定性。利用并行噪声预期超体积改进采集函数，该框架迭代式地筛选一个更大的未标记聚合物数据库，系统性地推荐新的候选聚合物进行分子动力学评估，并使用新获取的数据更新深度核学习模型。最终，在帕累托前沿上确定了六个候选材料，代表了导热系数与模量之间的最优权衡。可解释性分析进一步揭示了与这些权衡相关的分子特征，可合成性评估也支持了所选候选材料的实际应用潜力。通过将分子动力学模拟与基于主动学习的多目标贝叶斯优化相结合，我们的工作流程缓解了数据稀缺问题，缩短了开发时间，并为设计面向不同应用的多功能聚合物提供了可行的指导。

title: Towards Computational Microscope of Chemical Order-Disorder via ML-Accelerated Monte Carlo Simulation
abstract: Tailoring the performance of next-generation high entropy materials requires a deep understanding of the competition between entropy-driven random solid solution and enthalpy-driven chemical ordering. Investigating such order and disorder complexity demands atomistic simulations that achieve high accuracy, efficiency, and generalizability across vast spatial, temporal, and especially chemical scales. While machine learning (ML) interatomic potentials have transformed molecular dynamics, they remain limited in capturing diffusion-driven chemical evolution over long timescales. The recently introduced SMC-X method brings exciting opportunities. Realizing its full potential requires a comprehensive study, which is the focus of this work. To assess model performance, we systematically benchmark invariant and equivariant architectures using a density functional theory dataset of more than 10,000 configurations spanning seven elements: Fe, Co, Ni, Al, Ti, Ta, and V. To understand the roles of pairwise and higher-order interactions, we decouple their contributions across chemical space using an explainable machine learning approach. We also examine the impact of lattice relaxation by comparing models trained on datasets with and without structural relaxation. Our results clarify how to choose ML surrogate models for Monte Carlo simulations, bridge the gap between theory and experiment, and lay a foundation for establishing ML-accelerated Monte Carlo as a computational microscope for chemical complexity.
zh_abstract: 调控下一代高熵材料的性能，需要深入理解熵驱动的随机固溶体与焓驱动的化学有序化之间的竞争关系。探究此类有序与无序的复杂性，要求原子尺度模拟能够在广阔的空间、时间尺度，尤其是化学尺度上，同时实现高精度、高效率与良好的泛化能力。尽管机器学习（ML）原子间势能函数已变革了分子动力学模拟，但其在捕捉长时间尺度扩散驱动的化学演化方面仍存在局限。新近提出的SMC-X方法带来了令人兴奋的机遇。要充分实现其潜力，需要进行全面的研究，这正是本工作的重点。为评估模型性能，我们利用一个涵盖铁（Fe）、钴（Co）、镍（Ni）、铝（Al）、钛（Ti）、钽（Ta）和钒（V）七种元素、超过10,000种构型的密度泛函理论（DFT）数据集，系统地对不变性和等变性架构进行了基准测试。为了理解双体相互作用与高阶相互作用的作用，我们采用可解释的机器学习方法，在化学空间中解耦了它们的贡献。我们还通过比较使用经过结构弛豫和未经过结构弛豫的数据集训练的模型，研究了晶格弛豫的影响。我们的研究结果阐明了如何为蒙特卡洛模拟选择机器学习代理模型，弥合了理论与实验之间的差距，并为建立ML加速的蒙特卡洛作为研究化学复杂性的“计算显微镜”奠定了基础。
introduction:
High-entropy alloys (HEAs) , and the broader class of high-entropy materials (HEMs) , represent a promising frontier in materials design, exhibiting exceptional properties across diverse applications including structural materials , functional electronics , and next-generation energy technologies . Initially, it was believed that the exceptional physical properties of HEAs mainly arise from their random solid solution structure, which is summarized by the ``four core effects'': high-entropy stabilization, sluggish diffusion, large lattice distortion, and cocktail effects . However, a growing body of evidence shows that these exceptional properties often stem from an intricate competition between chemical disorder and order . These complex patterns can span multiple length scales , from short-range order (SRO)  and long-range order (LRO)  to nanoprecipitates  and hierarchical chemical order , as illustrated in Fig.~. The resulting chemical heterogeneity can have a profound impact on the material behavior, such as hindering dislocation motion , modifying phonon spectra , and creating active catalytic sites . This complexity, combined with the vast compositional space of HEMs, opens exciting tuning opportunities for materials design .

Simulating the chemical complexity of high entropy materials requires atomistic models that simultaneously achieve high accuracy, efficiency, and generalizability, which we refer to as the AGE metrics. Here, generalizability specifically denotes a model's ability to perform reliable in-distribution interpolation and meaningful out-of-distribution extrapolation across compositional and configurational space. While high AGE performance is desirable in many areas of computational materials science, it is particularly critical for modeling order-disorder evolution in high entropy materials . These simulations must capture essential physics across large spatial scales, from nanometers to hundreds of nanometers, extended temporal scales govern
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出并系统论证了一套基于可解释机器学习方法筛选和构建高精度、高效率、高泛化性机器学习势函数，以驱动蒙特卡洛模拟成为研究高熵材料化学有序-无序演化的“计算显微镜”的完整技术路径。
2. 关键结论: (1) 通过系统性基准测试，明确了在构建用于模拟化学有序-无序演变的机器学习势函数时，不变性与等变性网络架构各自的适用场景与优劣；(2) 利用可解释机器学习方法解耦了化学空间中原子对相互作用与高阶相互作用的贡献，为理解势函数的物理基础提供了新视角；(3) 通过对比基于弛豫与非弛豫结构数据训练的模型，量化了晶格弛豫效应对于准确预测化学有序化过程的重要性。
3. 专家点评: 本工作的核心价值在于超越了单纯开发或应用某个机器学习势函数，而是从解决“化学有序-无序演化”这一具体且棘手的物理问题出发，对机器学习势函数的关键性能指标（AGE）进行了有针对性的、系统性的评估与解构。这种问题导向的研究范式，对于将机器学习势函数从“可用”推向“可靠”和“可信”至关重要，为复杂材料体系的模拟设立了新的方法论标准。然而，其结论的普适性仍需在更多元、更复杂的元素体系和高熵材料相中得到进一步验证，且将“计算显微镜”真正用于预测实验可观测的序参量或微观结构演化，是衡量其最终成功的关键。

title: Machine-Learned Leftmost Hessian Eigenvectors for Robust Transition State Finding
abstract: The reliable determination of transition states (TSs) benefits from second-order information for robust convergence and validation, but the computational expense of Hessians prohibits their routine use in TS optimization. Here, we present a machine-learning-driven TS optimizer that directly predicts the leftmost Hessian eigenvector (LMHE), the critical mode that locally approximates the reaction coordinate encompassing the TS. We demonstrate that our LMHE optimizer recovers TS solutions at the same rate as full Hessian optimizers, and more robustly from degraded initial guess geometries, thereby eliminating the excessively long wall times characteristic of full-Hessian approaches and reducing total gradient evaluations compared to standard quasi-Newton methods. We further improve accuracy and robustness using uncertainty quantification for identifying occasional LMHE prediction failures, that then falls back to a full Hessian update from the machine learned potential at that optimization step, avoiding expensive active learning. Overall our methodology and semi-automated workflow delivers second-order stability at first-order computational expense to provide a highly efficient engine for high-throughput reaction discovery.
zh_abstract: 过渡态（TS）的可靠确定得益于二阶信息带来的稳健收敛与验证能力，但计算Hessian矩阵的高昂成本阻碍了其在TS优化中的常规应用。本文提出一种机器学习驱动的TS优化器，可直接预测最左Hessian本征向量（LMHE）——该关键模态在局部近似包含TS的反应坐标。我们证明，该LMHE优化器能以与全Hessian优化器相当的速率找到TS解，且对低质量初始几何结构的鲁棒性更强，从而消除了全Hessian方法典型的长耗时瓶颈，并相比标准拟牛顿法减少了总梯度计算量。我们进一步通过不确定性量化提升精度与鲁棒性，以识别偶发的LMHE预测失败情况，此时系统将回退至当前优化步骤中基于机器学习势场的全Hessian更新，避免了昂贵的主动学习过程。总体而言，我们的方法与半自动化工作流程以一阶计算成本实现了二阶稳定性，为高通量反应发现提供了高效引擎。
introduction:
Understanding reaction chemistry and predicting kinetics requires a detailed knowledge of the potential energy surface (PES), especially the location and characterization of transition states (TSs). Mathematically defined as first-order saddle points on the PES, TSs represent the highest energy point along the minimum energy path connecting reactants to products of an elementary reaction. They are characterized by having exactly one negative eigenvalue in the Hessian matrix, corresponding to a single imaginary vibrational frequency. Unlike equilibrium structures which can be determined by optimizing along descent directions, locating saddle points is a more complex optimization as it requires maximizing the energy along a single specific mode, the reaction coordinate, while simultaneously minimizing it along all other degrees of freedom.

The central challenge in TS optimization is correctly identifying this single ascent direction. The success of a TS optimization often depends crucially on the quality of the curvature information from the Hessian matrix, as it provides the necessary geometric guidance to distinguish the reaction coordinate from orthogonal conformational or non-reactive modes. Second-order methods utilize the full Hessian matrix to explicitly identify the mode with the most negative curvature as the local approximation of the reaction coordinate. While robust, calculating the exact Hessian at every optimization step using  methods such as density functional theory (DFT) is prohibitively expensive for most practical applications. 

Consequently, modern geometry optimization on the  PES typically relies on quasi-Newton (QN) methods to construct cheaper approximate Hessians using only gradient information. While the Broyden-Fletcher-Goldfarb-Shanno (BFGS) algorithm is arguably the most widely used approach for minimization, its standard formulation enforces a positive-definite Hessian, making it inherently unsuitable for locating saddle points which r
conclusion:
We have presented a novel strategy for TS optimization that effectively bridges the gap between the robustness of second-order methods and the computational efficiency of first-order approaches. By directly predicting the LMHE which serves as the local approximation of the reaction coordinate, we demonstrated that a machine-learning model can provide the critical curvature information required for saddle point location without the prohibitive cost of DFT calculations nor the expense of automatic differentiation of the MLIP to create Hessians at each optimization step.

The central contribution of this study is the development of a robust optimizer that effectively integrates geometric deep learning with PRFO algorithms. Crucial to this success was addressing the geometric distinction between local atomic forces and the non-local nature of the LMHE. We showed that standard equivariant MPNNs, which rely on local diffusion of information, are insufficient for capturing the collective atomic motions characteristic of transition modes. The introduction of a scalable $E(3)$-equivariant global attention decoder was found to reduce both the prediction error and generalization gap by enabling the model to aggregate and broadcast information across the entire molecular graph.

Benchmarks on the Sella dataset reveal that LMHE optimization scheme is highly resilient to structural noise. Our approach recovers intended TS from degraded initial guesses with a success rate comparable to exact Hessian methods, yet does so with a wall-time distribution significantly faster than full Hessian methods. Furthermore, the implementation of an ensemble consistency check addresses the "black box" reliability issue common in machine learning. By using ensemble variance as a proxy for uncertainty, the optimizer dynamically identifies unreliable predictions and selectively falls back to the higher fidelity second order method, ensuring convergence stability.
